import { Controller, Get, Post, Body, Patch, Param, Delete, ParseIntPipe, UseGuards } from '@nestjs/common';
import { AchievementGroupsService } from './achievement-groups.service';
import { CreateAchievementGroupDto } from './dto/create-achievement-group.dto';
import { UpdateAchievementGroupDto } from './dto/update-achievement-group.dto';
import { JwtAuthGuard } from 'src/auth/guards/jwt-auth.guard';
import { RolesGuard } from 'src/auth/guards/roles.guard';
import { Roles } from 'src/auth/decorators/roles.decorator';
import { SystemRanks } from 'src/ranks/ranks.service';
import { ApiBearerAuth, ApiTags } from '@nestjs/swagger';

/**
 * Controller for managing achievement groups in the admin panel.
 * All endpoints are protected and require admin privileges.
 */
@ApiTags('Admin / Achievements')
@Controller('admin/achievement-groups')
@UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard, RolesGuard)
@Roles(SystemRanks.ADMIN.power_level)
@ApiBearerAuth()
export class AchievementGroupsController {
  constructor(private readonly groupsService: AchievementGroupsService) { }

  /**
   * Creates a new achievement group.
   * @param createDto - Data for creating the new group.
   */
  @Post()
  create(@Body() createDto: CreateAchievementGroupDto) {
    return this.groupsService.create(createDto);
  }

  /**
   * Retrieves all achievement groups.
   */
  @Get()
  findAll() {
    return this.groupsService.findAll();
  }

  /**
   * Updates an existing achievement group.
   * @param id - The ID of the group to update.
   * @param updateDto - The data to update.
   */
  @Patch(':id')
  update(@Param('id', ParseIntPipe) id: number, @Body() updateDto: UpdateAchievementGroupDto) {
    return this.groupsService.update(id, updateDto);
  }

  /**
   * Deletes an achievement group.
   * @param id - The ID of the group to delete.
   */
  @Delete(':id')
  remove(@Param('id', ParseIntPipe) id: number) {
    return this.groupsService.remove(id);
  }

  /**
   * Retrieves all unique server group names for UI selectors.
   */
  @Get('/server-groups')
  findAllServerGroups() {
    return this.groupsService.findAllServerGroups();
  }
}

--- START FILE: backend/src/achievements/achievement-groups.service.ts ---

import { Injectable, NotFoundException } from '@nestjs/common';
import { InjectRepository } from '@nestjs/typeorm';
import { Repository } from 'typeorm';
import { AchievementGroup } from './entities/achievement-group.entity';
import { CreateAchievementGroupDto } from './dto/create-achievement-group.dto';
import { UpdateAchievementGroupDto } from './dto/update-achievement-group.dto';
import { ServerGroup } from './entities/server-group.entity';

/**
 * Service responsible for business logic related to achievement groups.
 */
@Injectable()
export class AchievementGroupsService {
  constructor(
    @InjectRepository(AchievementGroup)
    private groupsRepository: Repository<AchievementGroup>,
    @InjectRepository(ServerGroup)
    private serverGroupsRepository: Repository<ServerGroup>,
  ) { }

  /**
   * Finds all achievement groups, ordered by display order and name.
   * @returns A promise that resolves to an array of achievement groups.
   */
  findAll(): Promise<AchievementGroup[]> {
    return this.groupsRepository.find({ order: { display_order: 'ASC', name: 'ASC' } });
  }

  /**
   * Finds a single achievement group by its ID.
   * @param id - The ID of the group to find.
   * @returns A promise that resolves to the found achievement group.
   * @throws NotFoundException if the group is not found.
   */
  async findOne(id: number): Promise<AchievementGroup> {
    const group = await this.groupsRepository.findOneBy({ id });
    if (!group) {
      throw new NotFoundException(`Achievement group with ID ${id} not found`);
    }
    return group;
  }

  /**
   * Creates a new achievement group based on the provided DTO.
   * @param dto - The data transfer object for creating the group.
   * @returns A promise that resolves to the newly created achievement group.
   */
  create(dto: CreateAchievementGroupDto): Promise<AchievementGroup> {
    const group = this.groupsRepository.create(dto);
    return this.groupsRepository.save(group);
  }

  /**
   * Updates an achievement group with the given ID.
   * @param id - The ID of the group to update.
   * @param dto - The data transfer object with update information.
   * @returns A promise that resolves to the updated achievement group.
   * @throws NotFoundException if the group to update is not found.
   */
  async update(id: number, dto: UpdateAchievementGroupDto): Promise<AchievementGroup> {
    const group = await this.groupsRepository.preload({ id, ...dto });
    if (!group) {
      throw new NotFoundException(`Achievement group with ID ${id} not found`);
    }
    return this.groupsRepository.save(group);
  }

  /**
   * Removes an achievement group by its ID.
   * @param id - The ID of the group to remove.
   * @throws NotFoundException if the group to remove is not found.
   */
  async remove(id: number): Promise<void> {
    const result = await this.groupsRepository.delete(id);
    if (result.affected === 0) {
      throw new NotFoundException(`Achievement group with ID ${id} not found`);
    }
  }

  /**
   * Finds all distinct server group names from the database.
   * @returns A promise that resolves to an array of server groups.
   */
  findAllServerGroups(): Promise<ServerGroup[]> {
    return this.serverGroupsRepository.find({ order: { name: 'ASC' } });
  }
}

--- START FILE: backend/src/achievements/achievements.config.ts ---

/**
 * Defines the possible event types that can trigger an achievement.
 */
export type AchievementTrigger =
    | 'PLAYER_KILL_ENTITY'
    | 'BLOCK_BREAK'
    | 'BLOCK_PLACE'
    | 'ITEM_CRAFT'
    | 'ITEM_CONSUME'
    | 'PLAYER_ENCHANT_ITEM'
    | 'PLAYER_TRAVEL_DISTANCE'
    | 'CUSTOM_API_TRIGGER'
    | 'REPUTATION_CHANGED'
    | 'POST_CREATED'
    | 'COMMENT_CREATED'
    | 'FRIEND_ADDED'
    | 'PERIODIC_CHECK'
    | 'PAPI_STAT_CHECK'
    | 'WEBSITE_EVENT'
    | 'GAME_EVENT';

/**
 * Defines the structure of the achievement configuration object.
 */
export interface AchievementConfig {
    version: string;
    triggers: AchievementTrigger[];
    targets: Partial<Record<AchievementTrigger, Record<string, string[]>>>;
    serverGroups: string[];
}

/**
 * Core configuration for the achievements system.
 * This object defines the base triggers available on the backend.
 * Game-specific targets are registered dynamically by plugins.
 */
export const ACHIEVEMENTS_CONFIG: AchievementConfig = {
    version: '2.0.0-core',

    // Core backend and website-related triggers
    triggers: [
        'REPUTATION_CHANGED',
        'POST_CREATED',
        'COMMENT_CREATED',
        'FRIEND_ADDED',
        'CUSTOM_API_TRIGGER'
    ],

    // Target objects are initialized as empty. They will be populated dynamically by game plugins.
    targets: {
        CUSTOM_API_TRIGGER: {},
        REPUTATION_CHANGED: {},
        POST_CREATED: {},
        COMMENT_CREATED: {},
        FRIEND_ADDED: {},
    },

    // Server groups are also populated dynamically.
    serverGroups: [

    ]
};

--- START FILE: backend/src/achievements/achievements.controller.ts ---

import { Controller, Get, Post, Body, UseGuards, Patch, Param, ParseIntPipe, Delete, Request, HttpStatus, HttpCode } from '@nestjs/common';
import { AchievementsService } from './achievements.service';
import { CreateAchievementDto } from './dto/create-achievement.dto';
import { UpdateAchievementDto } from './dto/update-achievement.dto';
import { JwtAuthGuard } from '../auth/guards/jwt-auth.guard';
import { RolesGuard } from '../auth/guards/roles.guard';
import { Roles } from '../auth/decorators/roles.decorator';
import { SystemRanks } from '../ranks/ranks.service';
import { ApiBearerAuth, ApiOperation, ApiTags } from '@nestjs/swagger';
import { PluginApiKeyGuard } from 'src/auth/guards/plugin-api-key.guard';
import { RegisterTargetsDto } from './dto/register-targets.dto';

/**
 * Controller for handling achievements.
 * Includes public endpoints for progress and admin endpoints for management.
 */
@ApiTags('Achievements')
@Controller('achievements')
export class AchievementsController {
  constructor(private readonly achievementsService: AchievementsService) { }

  /**
   * Gets all achievements along with the current user's progress.
   * Requires user authentication.
   */
  @Get('progress')
  @UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard)
  @ApiBearerAuth()
  @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Get all achievements with current user progress' })
  getAchievementsWithProgress(@Request() req) {
    const userId = req.user.userId;
    return this.achievementsService.findAllForUser(userId);
  }

  // --- Admin Endpoints ---

  /**
   * Creates a new achievement. (Admin only)
   * @param createAchievementDto - DTO with the achievement data.
   */
  @Post('admin')
  @UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard, RolesGuard)
  @Roles(SystemRanks.ADMIN.power_level)
  @ApiBearerAuth()
  @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Create a new achievement' })
  create(@Body() createAchievementDto: CreateAchievementDto) {
    return this.achievementsService.create(createAchievementDto);
  }

  /**
   * Retrieves all achievements for the admin panel.
   */
  @Get('admin')
  @UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard, RolesGuard)
  @Roles(SystemRanks.ADMIN.power_level)
  @ApiBearerAuth()
  @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Get all achievements (for admin panel)' })
  findAll() {
    return this.achievementsService.findAll();
  }

  /**
   * Gets combined static and dynamic config data for the achievement UI builder.
   */
  @Get('admin/config-data')
  @UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard, RolesGuard)
  @Roles(SystemRanks.ADMIN.power_level)
  @ApiBearerAuth()
  @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Get data for the achievement UI builder' })
  getConfigData() {
    return this.achievementsService.getAchievementConfigData();
  }

  /**
   * Retrieves a single achievement by ID for the admin panel.
   * @param id - The ID of the achievement to retrieve.
   */
  @Get('admin/:id')
  @UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard, RolesGuard)
  @Roles(SystemRanks.ADMIN.power_level)
  @ApiBearerAuth()
  @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Get a single achievement by ID (for admin panel)' })
  findOneForAdmin(@Param('id', ParseIntPipe) id: number) {
    return this.achievementsService.findOne(id);
  }

  /**
   * Updates an existing achievement. (Admin only)
   * @param id - The ID of the achievement to update.
   * @param updateAchievementDto - The data to update.
   */
  @Patch('admin/:id')
  @UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard, RolesGuard)
  @Roles(SystemRanks.ADMIN.power_level)
  @ApiBearerAuth()
  @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Update an achievement' })
  update(@Param('id', ParseIntPipe) id: number, @Body() updateAchievementDto: UpdateAchievementDto) {
    return this.achievementsService.update(id, updateAchievementDto);
  }

  /**
   * Deletes an achievement. (Admin only)
   * @param id - The ID of the achievement to delete.
   */
  @Delete('admin/:id')
  @UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard, RolesGuard)
  @Roles(SystemRanks.ADMIN.power_level)
  @ApiBearerAuth()
  @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Delete an achievement' })
  remove(@Param('id', ParseIntPipe) id: number) {
    return this.achievementsService.remove(id);
  }

  /**
   * Sends a WebSocket event to game plugins requesting they sync their targets.
   */
  @Post('admin/request-sync')
  @UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard, RolesGuard)
  @Roles(SystemRanks.ADMIN.power_level)
  @ApiBearerAuth()
  @HttpCode(HttpStatus.ACCEPTED)
  @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Request a target sync from the game plugin' })
  requestSync() {
    this.achievementsService.requestSyncFromPlugin();
    return { message: 'Sync request sent to the plugin.' };
  }

  /**
   * Endpoint for game plugins to register their achievable targets (e.g., block types, mob types).
   * Protected by a secret API key.
   * @param registrationDto - DTO containing plugin name and targets.
   */
  @Post('admin/register-targets')
  @UseGuards(PluginApiKeyGuard)
  @HttpCode(HttpStatus.OK)
  @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Register achievable targets from a game plugin' })
  registerTargets(@Body() registrationDto: RegisterTargetsDto) {
    this.achievementsService.registerDynamicTargets(registrationDto);
    return { message: 'Targets registered successfully.' };
  }

  /**
   * Retrieves all achievements that use the PERIODIC_CHECK trigger.
   * This is used by game plugins to know which stats to check periodically.
   */
  @Get('periodic-checks')
  @UseGuards(PluginApiKeyGuard)
  @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Get all achievements that use PERIODIC_CHECK trigger for a game plugin' })
  findPeriodicChecks() {
    return this.achievementsService.findPeriodicChecks();
  }
}

--- START FILE: backend/src/achievements/achievements.module.ts ---

import { Module, forwardRef } from '@nestjs/common';
import { TypeOrmModule } from '@nestjs/typeorm';
import { AchievementsController } from './achievements.controller';
import { AchievementsService } from './achievements.service';
import { Achievement } from './entities/achievement.entity';
import { AchievementProgress } from './entities/achievement-progress.entity';
import { AchievementGroup } from './entities/achievement-group.entity';
import { AchievementGroupsController } from './achievement-groups.controller';
import { AchievementGroupsService } from './achievement-groups.service';
import { ChatModule } from 'src/chat/chat.module';
import { ServerGroup } from './entities/server-group.entity';


/**
 * Module that encapsulates all features related to achievements.
 */
@Module({
  imports: [
    TypeOrmModule.forFeature([Achievement, AchievementProgress, AchievementGroup, ServerGroup]),
    forwardRef(() => ChatModule),
  ],
  controllers: [AchievementsController, AchievementGroupsController],
  providers: [AchievementsService, AchievementGroupsService],
  exports: [AchievementsService]
})
export class AchievementsModule { }

--- END FILE: backend/src/achievements/achievements.module.ts ---



--- START FILE: backend/src/achievements/achievements.service.ts ---

import { forwardRef, Inject, Injectable, Logger, NotFoundException } from '@nestjs/common';
import { InjectRepository } from '@nestjs/typeorm';
import { Repository } from 'typeorm';
import { Achievement } from './entities/achievement.entity';
import { CreateAchievementDto } from './dto/create-achievement.dto';
import { UpdateAchievementDto } from './dto/update-achievement.dto';
import { AchievementProgress } from './entities/achievement-progress.entity';
import { ACHIEVEMENTS_CONFIG } from './achievements.config';
import * as fs from 'fs/promises';
import { join } from 'path';
import { RegisterTargetsDto } from './dto/register-targets.dto';
import { ChatGateway } from 'src/chat/chat.gateway';

/**
 * Service handling all business logic for achievements and their progress.
 */
@Injectable()
export class AchievementsService {
  private readonly logger = new Logger(AchievementsService.name);
  private dynamicTargets: Record<string, Record<string, string[]>> = {};
  private readonly dynamicTargetsPath = join(__dirname, '..', 'dynamic-targets.json');

  constructor(
    @InjectRepository(Achievement)
    private achievementsRepository: Repository<Achievement>,
    @InjectRepository(AchievementProgress)
    private progressRepository: Repository<AchievementProgress>,
    @Inject(forwardRef(() => ChatGateway))
    private readonly chatGateway: ChatGateway,
  ) {
    this.loadDynamicTargetsFromFile();
  }

  /**
   * Sends a WebSocket event to the 'minecraft-plugins' room, prompting them to sync their targets.
   */
  public requestSyncFromPlugin(): void {
    this.logger.log('Sending "requestTargets" event to game plugins via WebSocket.');
    this.chatGateway.server.to('minecraft-plugins').emit('requestTargets');
  }

  /**
   * Registers or updates dynamic targets from a game plugin and saves them to a file.
   * @param dto - DTO containing the plugin name and its targets.
   */
  async registerDynamicTargets(dto: RegisterTargetsDto): Promise<void> {
    const { pluginName, targets } = dto;
    this.logger.log(`Registering targets from plugin: ${pluginName}. Received categories: [${Object.keys(targets).join(', ')}]`);
    const existingTargets = this.dynamicTargets[pluginName] || {};
    this.dynamicTargets[pluginName] = { ...existingTargets, ...targets };
    await this.saveDynamicTargetsToFile();
  }

  /**
   * Saves the current state of dynamic targets to a JSON file.
   */
  private async saveDynamicTargetsToFile() {
    try {
      await fs.writeFile(this.dynamicTargetsPath, JSON.stringify(this.dynamicTargets, null, 2));
    } catch (error) {
      this.logger.error('Failed to save dynamic targets to file', error);
    }
  }

  /**
   * Loads dynamic targets from the JSON file on service initialization.
   */
  private async loadDynamicTargetsFromFile() {
    try {
      const data = await fs.readFile(this.dynamicTargetsPath, 'utf-8');
      this.dynamicTargets = JSON.parse(data);
      this.logger.log('Successfully loaded dynamic targets from file.');
    } catch (error) {
      this.logger.warn('Dynamic targets file not found or corrupted. Starting with an empty set.');
      this.dynamicTargets = {};
    }
  }

  /**
   * Creates a new achievement.
   * @param createAchievementDto - DTO with achievement data.
   */
  create(createAchievementDto: CreateAchievementDto): Promise<Achievement> {
    if (!createAchievementDto.group_id) {
      createAchievementDto.group_id = null;
    }
    if (createAchievementDto.conditions) {
      createAchievementDto.conditions = this.processConditions(createAchievementDto.conditions);
    }
    const achievement = this.achievementsRepository.create(createAchievementDto);
    return this.achievementsRepository.save(achievement);
  }

  /**
   * Finds all achievements and formats them for the admin panel.
   * Parses condition JSON for easier frontend consumption.
   */
  async findAll(): Promise<any[]> {
    const achievements = await this.achievementsRepository.find({
      relations: ['group'],
      order: { group: { display_order: 'ASC' }, name: 'ASC' }
    });

    return achievements.map(ach => {
      const safeAchievement = {
        ...ach,
        conditions: typeof ach.conditions === 'string'
          ? JSON.parse(ach.conditions)
          : ach.conditions,
        group: ach.group
          ? { id: ach.group.id, name: ach.group.name }
          : null,
      };
      delete (safeAchievement as any).progress_entries;
      return safeAchievement;
    });
  }

  /**
   * Finds a single achievement by ID.
   * @param id - The ID of the achievement to find.
   */
  async findOne(id: number): Promise<Achievement> {
    const achievement = await this.achievementsRepository.findOne({ where: { id }, relations: ['group'] });
    if (!achievement) {
      throw new NotFoundException(`Achievement with ID ${id} not found`);
    }
    return achievement;
  }

  /**
   * Merges the base achievement configuration with dynamically registered targets
   * to provide a complete configuration object for the UI builder.
   */
  getAchievementConfigData() {
    const baseConfig = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(ACHIEVEMENTS_CONFIG));
    const newTargets = {};

    const websiteEventMapping = {
      'WEBSITE_EVENT:POST_CREATED': baseConfig.targets.POST_CREATED,
      'WEBSITE_EVENT:COMMENT_CREATED': baseConfig.targets.COMMENT_CREATED,
      'WEBSITE_EVENT:FRIEND_ADDED': baseConfig.targets.FRIEND_ADDED,
      'WEBSITE_EVENT:REPUTATION_CHANGED': baseConfig.targets.REPUTATION_CHANGED
    };
    Object.assign(newTargets, websiteEventMapping);

    for (const pluginName in this.dynamicTargets) {
      try {
        const pluginTargets = this.dynamicTargets[pluginName];
        if (typeof pluginTargets !== 'object' || pluginTargets === null) continue;

        for (const groupName in pluginTargets) {
          const items = pluginTargets[groupName];
          if (!Array.isArray(items)) continue;

          for (const item of items) {
            if (typeof item !== 'string') continue;
            const parts = item.split(':');
            if (parts.length < 3) continue;
            const action = (parts[1] || '').toUpperCase();
            let eventSubtype = '';
            let specificTarget = '';

            if (action === 'KILL') {
              eventSubtype = 'PLAYER_KILL_ENTITY';
              specificTarget = item;
            } else if (action === 'BREAK') {
              eventSubtype = 'BLOCK_BREAK';
              specificTarget = item;
            } else if (action === 'ITEM') {
              eventSubtype = 'ITEM_TARGET';
              specificTarget = item;
            } else if (action === 'ACTION') {
              eventSubtype = (parts[2] || '').toUpperCase();
            }

            if (eventSubtype) {
              const eventFullType = `GAME_EVENT:${eventSubtype}`;
              if (!newTargets[eventFullType]) newTargets[eventFullType] = {};
              if (!newTargets[eventFullType][groupName]) newTargets[eventFullType][groupName] = [];
              if (specificTarget) newTargets[eventFullType][groupName].push(specificTarget);
            }
          }
        }
      } catch (e) {
        this.logger.error(`Failed to process dynamic targets for plugin: ${pluginName}`, e.stack);
      }
    }

    if (newTargets['GAME_EVENT:ITEM_TARGET']) {
      const itemTargets = newTargets['GAME_EVENT:ITEM_TARGET'];
      const itemActions = ['PLAYER_ITEM_BREAK', 'ITEM_CRAFT', 'ITEM_CONSUME', 'PLAYER_ENCHANT_ITEM'];
      for (const action of itemActions) {
        const key = `GAME_EVENT:${action}`;
        newTargets[key] = { ...(newTargets[key] || {}), ...itemTargets };
      }
      delete newTargets['GAME_EVENT:ITEM_TARGET'];
    }

    return { ...baseConfig, targets: newTargets };
  }

  /**
   * Updates an existing achievement.
   * @param id - The ID of the achievement to update.
   * @param updateAchievementDto - DTO with the updated data.
   */
  async update(id: number, updateAchievementDto: UpdateAchievementDto): Promise<Achievement> {
    if (updateAchievementDto.hasOwnProperty('group_id') && !updateAchievementDto.group_id) {
      updateAchievementDto.group_id = null;
    }
    if (updateAchievementDto.conditions) {
      updateAchievementDto.conditions = this.processConditions(updateAchievementDto.conditions);
    }
    const achievement = await this.achievementsRepository.preload({ id: id, ...updateAchievementDto });
    if (!achievement) {
      throw new NotFoundException(`Achievement with ID ${id} not found`);
    }
    return this.achievementsRepository.save(achievement);
  }

  /**
   * Pre-processes condition objects before saving.
   * Merges `specific_target` into the main `target` field for unified storage.
   * @param conditions - The conditions object from the DTO.
   */
  private processConditions(conditions: any): any {
    if (conditions && Array.isArray(conditions.conditions)) {
      conditions.conditions.forEach(cond => {
        if (cond.specific_target) {
          cond.target = `${cond.target}:${cond.specific_target}`;
          delete cond.specific_target;
        }
      });
    }
    return conditions;
  }

  /**
   * Removes an achievement by its ID.
   * @param id - The ID of the achievement to delete.
   */
  async remove(id: number): Promise<void> {
    const result = await this.achievementsRepository.delete(id);
    if (result.affected === 0) {
      throw new NotFoundException(`Achievement with ID ${id} not found`);
    }
  }

  /**
   * Finds all achievements and joins them with a specific user's progress.
   * @param userId - The ID of the user whose progress to fetch.
   * @returns An object with achievements sorted into 'grouped' and 'single' arrays.
   */
  async findAllForUser(userId: number): Promise<{ grouped: any[], single: any[] }> {
    const allAchievements = await this.achievementsRepository.find({
      where: { is_enabled: true },
      relations: ['group'],
      order: { name: 'ASC' },
    });

    const userProgress = await this.progressRepository.find({ where: { user_id: userId } });
    const progressMap = new Map(userProgress.map(p => [p.achievement_id, p]));
    const groupedResult = new Map<number, { groupInfo: any, achievements: any[] }>();
    const singleResult: any[] = [];

    for (const achievement of allAchievements) {
      let progress = progressMap.get(achievement.id);
      if (!progress) {
        progress = this.progressRepository.create({
          user_id: userId,
          achievement_id: achievement.id,
          is_completed: false,
          progress_data: {}
        });
      }
      const achievementWithProgress = { ...achievement, progress };

      if (achievement.group) {
        if (!groupedResult.has(achievement.group.id)) {
          groupedResult.set(achievement.group.id, {
            groupInfo: achievement.group,
            achievements: [],
          });
        }
        groupedResult.get(achievement.group.id)!.achievements.push(achievementWithProgress);
      } else {
        singleResult.push(achievementWithProgress);
      }
    }
    return {
      grouped: Array.from(groupedResult.values()),
      single: singleResult,
    };
  }

  /**
   * Finds all enabled achievements that have a 'PERIODIC_CHECK' trigger.
   * This is used by game plugins to know which conditions to evaluate periodically.
   */
  public async findPeriodicChecks(): Promise<Achievement[]> {
    this.logger.log('[API-REQ] A plugin is fetching periodic check configurations.');
    return this.achievementsRepository
      .createQueryBuilder("achievement")
      .where("achievement.is_enabled = :isEnabled", { isEnabled: true })
      .andWhere(`"achievement"."conditions"::text LIKE :trigger`, {
        trigger: '%"trigger":"PERIODIC_CHECK"%'
      })
      .getMany();
  }
}

--- END FILE: backend/src/achievements/achievements.service.ts ---

import { IsString, IsNotEmpty, IsObject, IsOptional, IsBoolean, IsHexColor, IsInt } from 'class-validator';

/**
 * Data Transfer Object for creating a new achievement.
 */
export class CreateAchievementDto {
  @IsNotEmpty()
  @IsString()
  name: string;

  @IsNotEmpty()
  @IsString()
  description: string;

  @IsOptional()
  @IsString()
  icon_url?: string;

  @IsOptional()
  @IsHexColor()
  card_color?: string;

  @IsOptional()
  @IsHexColor()
  text_color?: string;

  @IsOptional()
  @IsInt()
  group_id?: number | null;

  @IsOptional()
  @IsBoolean()
  is_enabled?: boolean;

  @IsOptional()
  @IsString()
  reward_command?: string;

  @IsNotEmpty()
  @IsObject()
  conditions: Record<string, any>;
}

--- START FILE: backend/src/achievements/entities/achievement.entity.ts ---

// backend/src/achievements/entities/achievement.entity.ts

import {
  Entity,
  PrimaryGeneratedColumn,
  Column,
  CreateDateColumn,
  UpdateDateColumn,
  OneToMany,
  ManyToOne,
  JoinColumn,
} from 'typeorm';
import { AchievementProgress } from './achievement-progress.entity';
import { AchievementGroup } from './achievement-group.entity';

/**
 * Represents an achievement in the database.
 * Each achievement has properties like a name, description, conditions for completion,
 * and optional styling for its display card.
 */
@Entity('achievements')
export class Achievement {
  /**
   * The unique identifier for the achievement.
   */
  @PrimaryGeneratedColumn()
  id: number;

  /**
   * The display name of the achievement.
   */
  @Column({ type: 'varchar', length: 255 })
  name: string;

  /**
   * A detailed description of what the achievement is for.
   */
  @Column({ type: 'text' })
  description: string;

  /**
   * An optional URL for an icon to display with the achievement.
   */
  @Column({ type: 'varchar', length: 255, name: 'icon_url', nullable: true })
  icon_url: string | null;

  /**
   * Optional hex color for the achievement card's background.
   */
  @Column({ type: 'varchar', length: 7, name: 'card_color', nullable: true, default: '#32383E' })
  card_color: string | null;

  /**
   * Optional hex color for the text on the achievement card.
   */
  @Column({ type: 'varchar', length: 7, name: 'text_color', nullable: true, default: '#F0F4F8' })
  text_color: string | null;

  /**
   * A flag to enable or disable the achievement from being tracked or displayed.
   */
  @Column({ type: 'boolean', default: true, name: 'is_enabled' })
  is_enabled: boolean;

  /**
   * An optional command to be executed as a reward upon completion.
   * Can contain placeholders like {username}.
   */
  @Column({ type: 'text', name: 'reward_command', nullable: true })
  reward_command: string | null;

  /**
   * The core logic of the achievement, stored as a JSON object.
   * Defines the triggers, conditions, and required counts for completion.
   */
  @Column({ type: 'jsonb' })
  conditions: Record<string, any>;

  /**
   * The foreign key for the AchievementGroup this achievement may belong to.
   */
  @Column({ name: 'group_id', nullable: true })
  group_id: number | null;

  /**
   * The relationship to the AchievementGroup.
   * If the group is deleted, this achievement becomes a "single" achievement (`SET NULL`).
   */
  @ManyToOne(() => AchievementGroup, (group) => group.achievements, {
    onDelete: 'SET NULL',
    nullable: true,
  })
  @JoinColumn({ name: 'group_id' })
  group: AchievementGroup | null;

  /**
   * The timestamp when the achievement was created.
   */
  @CreateDateColumn({ name: 'created_at' })
  created_at: Date;

  /**
   * The timestamp when the achievement was last updated.
   */
  @UpdateDateColumn({ name: 'updated_at' })
  updated_at: Date;

  /**
   * A one-to-many relationship with the progress entries of all users for this achievement.
   */
  @OneToMany(() => AchievementProgress, (progress) => progress.achievement)
  progress_entries: AchievementProgress[];
}
--- END FILE: backend/src/achievements/entities/achievement.entity.ts ---



--- START FILE: backend/src/achievements/entities/achievement-group.entity.ts ---

// backend/src/achievements/entities/achievement-group.entity.ts

import { Entity, PrimaryGeneratedColumn, Column, OneToMany } from 'typeorm';
import { Achievement } from './achievement.entity';

/**
 * Represents a group of achievements in the database.
 * This is used to categorize achievements for better organization in the UI.
 */
@Entity('achievement_groups')
export class AchievementGroup {
  /**
   * The unique identifier for the group.
   */
  @PrimaryGeneratedColumn()
  id: number;

  /**
   * The unique name of the group.
   */
  @Column({ type: 'varchar', length: 100, unique: true })
  name: string;

  /**
   * An optional description of the achievement group.
   */
  @Column({ type: 'text', nullable: true })
  description: string | null;

  /**
   * An optional URL for an icon representing the group.
   */
  @Column({ type: 'varchar', length: 255, name: 'icon_url', nullable: true })
  icon_url: string | null;

  /**
   * The order in which this group should be displayed in lists.
   * Lower numbers appear first.
   */
  @Column({ type: 'int', default: 0 })
  display_order: number;

  /**
   * A one-to-many relationship with the achievements belonging to this group.
   */
  @OneToMany(() => Achievement, (achievement) => achievement.group)
  achievements: Achievement[];
}

--- START FILE: backend/src/achievements/entities/achievement-progress.entity.ts ---

// backend/src/achievements/entities/achievement-progress.entity.ts

import {
  Entity,
  PrimaryGeneratedColumn,
  Column,
  ManyToOne,
  JoinColumn,
  Unique,
  CreateDateColumn,
} from 'typeorm';
import { User } from '../../users/entities/user.entity';
import { Achievement } from './achievement.entity';

/**
 * Represents the progress of a single user on a specific achievement.
 * A unique constraint ensures that a user can only have one progress entry per achievement.
 */
@Entity('achievement_progress')
@Unique(['user_id', 'achievement_id'])
export class AchievementProgress {
  /**
   * The unique identifier for the progress entry.
   */
  @PrimaryGeneratedColumn()
  id: number;

  /**
   * The foreign key of the user this progress belongs to.
   */
  @Column({ name: 'user_id' })
  user_id: number;

  /**
   * The relationship to the User entity. If the user is deleted, their progress is also deleted.
   */
  @ManyToOne(() => User, { onDelete: 'CASCADE' })
  @JoinColumn({ name: 'user_id' })
  user: User;

  /**
   * The foreign key of the achievement being tracked.
   */
  @Column({ name: 'achievement_id' })
  achievement_id: number;

  /**
   * The relationship to the Achievement entity. If the achievement is deleted, this progress is also deleted.
   */
  @ManyToOne(() => Achievement, { onDelete: 'CASCADE' })
  @JoinColumn({ name: 'achievement_id' })
  achievement: Achievement;

  /**
   * A JSON object storing the current progress values for each condition of the achievement.
   * e.g., {"condition_0": 5, "condition_1": 20}
   */
  @Column({ type: 'jsonb', default: {} })
  progress_data: Record<string, any>;

  /**
   * A flag indicating whether the achievement has been completed by the user.
   */
  @Column({ type: 'boolean', default: false, name: 'is_completed' })
  is_completed: boolean;

  /**
   * The timestamp when the achievement was completed. Null if not yet completed.
   */
  @Column({ type: 'timestamp', name: 'completed_at', nullable: true })
  completed_at: Date | null;
}
--- END FILE: backend/src/achievements/entities/achievement-progress.entity.ts ---

// backend/src/admin/admin.controller.spec.ts

import { Test, TestingModule } from '@nestjs/testing';
import { AdminController } from './admin.controller';
import { UsersService, PublicUser } from '../users/users.service';
import { JwtAuthGuard } from '../auth/guards/jwt-auth.guard';
import { RolesGuard } from '../auth/guards/roles.guard';
import { AdminUpdateUserDto } from './dto/admin-update-user.dto';
import { RanksService } from '../ranks/ranks.service';
import { Rank } from '../ranks/entities/rank.entity';

describe('AdminController', () => {
  let controller: AdminController;
  let usersService: Partial<UsersService>;

  const mockRank: Rank = {
    id: 4,
    name: 'Default',
    system_name: 'default',
    power_level: 1,
    display_color: '#AAAAAA',
    is_removable: false,
    command_template: null,
    command_template_remove: null,
    users: [],
  };

  // --- ИЗМЕНЕНИЕ: Добавляем все недостающие поля как пустые массивы ---
  const mockUser: PublicUser = {
    id: 2,
    username: 'TestUser',
    email: 'test@user.com',
    balance: 100,
    is_banned: false,
    rank: mockRank,
    rank_id: 4,
    minecraft_username: null,
    profile_slug: null,
    minecraft_uuid: null,
    first_login: new Date(),
    description: null,
    pfp_url: null,
    banner_url: null,
    email_verified_at: null,
    last_login: null,
    reputation_count: 0,
    is_minecraft_online: false,
    updated_at: new Date(),
    is_verified_youtuber: false,
    // Вот недостающие свойства, которые ожидает тип User/PublicUser
    posts: [],
    news: [],
    sent_friend_requests: [],
    received_friend_requests: [],
    sent_messages: [],
    received_messages: [],
    notifications: [],
    comments: [],
    purchases: [],
    votes: [],
  };

  beforeEach(async () => {
    usersService = {
      banUser: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue({ ...mockUser, is_banned: true }),
      unbanUser: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue({ ...mockUser, is_banned: false }),
      adminUpdateUser: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue({ ...mockUser, username: 'UpdatedUser' }),
    };

    const module: TestingModule = await Test.createTestingModule({
      controllers: [AdminController],
      providers: [
        {
          provide: UsersService,
          useValue: usersService,
        },
        {
          provide: RanksService,
          useValue: {},
        }
      ],
    })
    .overrideGuard(JwtAuthGuard)
    .useValue({ canActivate: () => true })
    .overrideGuard(RolesGuard)
    .useValue({ canActivate: () => true })
    .compile();

    controller = module.get<AdminController>(AdminController);
  });

  it('should be defined', () => {
    expect(controller).toBeDefined();
  });

  describe('banUser', () => {
    it('should call usersService.banUser and return the banned user', async () => {
      const targetUserId = 2;
      const mockRequest = { user: { userId: 1 } }; 

      const result = await controller.banUser(targetUserId, mockRequest);

      expect(usersService.banUser).toHaveBeenCalledWith(targetUserId);
      expect(result.is_banned).toBe(true);
    });
  });

  describe('unbanUser', () => {
    it('should call usersService.unbanUser and return the unbanned user', async () => {
      const targetUserId = 2;
      const mockRequest = { user: { userId: 1 } };

      const result = await controller.unbanUser(targetUserId, mockRequest);

      expect(usersService.unbanUser).toHaveBeenCalledWith(targetUserId);
      expect(result.is_banned).toBe(false);
    });
  });

  describe('updateUser', () => {
    it('should call usersService.adminUpdateUser with correct parameters', async () => {
      const targetUserId = 2;
      const actorId = 1;
      const mockRequest = { user: { userId: actorId } };
      const adminUpdateUserDto: AdminUpdateUserDto = { rank_id: 5 };

      const result = await controller.updateUser(targetUserId, adminUpdateUserDto, mockRequest);

      expect(usersService.adminUpdateUser).toHaveBeenCalledWith(targetUserId, adminUpdateUserDto, actorId);
      expect(result.username).toBe('UpdatedUser');
    });
  });
});

--- START FILE: backend/src/admin/admin.controller.ts ---

import { Controller, Post, Param, ParseIntPipe, UseGuards, Body, Patch, Request, Logger } from '@nestjs/common';
import { ApiTags, ApiBearerAuth, ApiOperation, ApiResponse } from '@nestjs/swagger';
import { UsersService, PublicUser } from '../users/users.service';
import { JwtAuthGuard } from '../auth/guards/jwt-auth.guard';
import { RolesGuard } from '../auth/guards/roles.guard';
import { Roles } from '../auth/decorators/roles.decorator';
import { AdminUpdateUserDto } from './dto/admin-update-user.dto';
import { SystemRanks } from '../ranks/ranks.service';
import { BanUserDto } from '../admin/dto/ban-user.dto';

/**
 * Controller for handling high-level administrative actions, primarily focused on user management.
 * All endpoints are protected by authentication and role-based access control.
 */
@ApiTags('Admin')
@Controller('admin')
@UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard, RolesGuard)
@ApiBearerAuth()
export class AdminController {
    private readonly logger = new Logger(AdminController.name);

    constructor(private readonly usersService: UsersService) { }

    /**
     * Bans a user by their ID. Requires at least Moderator privileges.
     * @param id - The numeric ID of the user to ban.
     * @param req - The incoming request object, used to identify the actor.
     * @param banDto - The DTO containing the reason and optional duration for the ban.
     * @returns A Promise resolving to the updated public user data.
     */
    @Post('/users/:id/ban')
    @Roles(SystemRanks.MODERATOR.power_level)
    @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Ban a user' })
    @ApiResponse({ status: 200, description: 'User has been banned successfully.' })
    banUser(
        @Param('id', ParseIntPipe) id: number,
        @Request() req,
        @Body() banDto: BanUserDto
    ): Promise<PublicUser> {
        const actorId = req.user.userId;
        this.logger.warn(`[BAN] 🚫 Actor ID: ${actorId} is banning User ID: ${id}. Reason: ${banDto.reason}`);
        return this.usersService.banUser(id, banDto);
    }

    /**
     * Unbans a user by their ID. Requires Admin privileges.
     * @param id - The numeric ID of the user to unban.
     * @param req - The incoming request object, used to identify the actor.
     * @returns A Promise resolving to the updated public user data.
     */
    @Post('/users/:id/unban')
    @Roles(SystemRanks.ADMIN.power_level)
    @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Unban a user' })
    @ApiResponse({ status: 200, description: 'User has been unbanned successfully.' })
    unbanUser(
        @Param('id', ParseIntPipe) id: number,
        @Request() req,
    ): Promise<PublicUser> {
        const actorId = req.user.userId;
        this.logger.log(`[UNBAN] ✅ Actor ID: ${actorId} is unbanning User ID: ${id}`);
        return this.usersService.unbanUser(id);
    }

    /**
     * Updates a user's profile with administrative privileges.
     * Allows changing rank, reputation, and verification status.
     * @param id - The numeric ID of the user to update.
     * @param adminUpdateUserDto - The DTO containing the data to update.
     * @param req - The incoming request object, used to identify the actor.
     * @returns A Promise resolving to the updated public user data.
     */
    @Patch('/users/:id/update')
    @Roles(SystemRanks.ADMIN.power_level)
    @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Update a user by admin' })
    @ApiResponse({ status: 200, description: 'User has been updated successfully.' })
    updateUser(
        @Param('id', ParseIntPipe) id: number,
        @Body() adminUpdateUserDto: AdminUpdateUserDto,
        @Request() req,
    ): Promise<PublicUser> {
        const actorId = req.user.userId;
        this.logger.log(`[UPDATE] 📝 Actor ID: ${actorId} is updating User ID: ${id}. Data: ${JSON.stringify(adminUpdateUserDto)}`);
        return this.usersService.adminUpdateUser(id, adminUpdateUserDto, actorId);
    }
}

--- END FILE: backend/src/admin/admin.controller.ts ---

import { Module } from '@nestjs/common';
import { AdminController } from './admin.controller';
import { BanReasonsController } from './ban-reasons.controller';
import { BanReasonsService } from './ban-reasons.service';
import { TypeOrmModule } from '@nestjs/typeorm';

/**
 * Encapsulates all administrative functionalities of the application.
 *
 * This module imports and configures all necessary components for the admin panel,
 * including controllers for user management and ban reason presets, and their
 * corresponding services and entities.
 */
@Module({
  imports: [TypeOrmModule.forFeature([BanReason])],
  controllers: [AdminController, BanReasonsController],
  providers: [BanReasonsService],
})
export class AdminModule {}

--- START FILE: backend/src/admin/ban-reasons.controller.ts ---

import { Controller, Get, Post, Body, Param, Delete, ParseIntPipe, UseGuards } from '@nestjs/common';
import { ApiTags, ApiBearerAuth } from '@nestjs/swagger';
import { JwtAuthGuard } from '../auth/guards/jwt-auth.guard';
import { RolesGuard } from '../auth/guards/roles.guard';
import { Roles } from '../auth/decorators/roles.decorator';
import { SystemRanks } from '../ranks/ranks.service';
import { BanReasonsService } from './ban-reasons.service';
import { CreateBanReasonDto } from './dto/create-ban-reason.dto';

/**
 * Controller for managing preset ban reasons in the admin panel.
 * All endpoints are protected and require administrator privileges.
 */
@ApiTags('Admin / Ban Reasons')
@Controller('admin/ban-reasons')
@UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard, RolesGuard)
@Roles(SystemRanks.ADMIN.power_level)
@ApiBearerAuth()
export class BanReasonsController {
  constructor(private readonly banReasonsService: BanReasonsService) {}

  /**
   * Creates a new preset ban reason.
   * @param createDto - Data for creating the new ban reason.
   */
  @Post()
  create(@Body() createDto: CreateBanReasonDto) {
    return this.banReasonsService.create(createDto);
  }

  /**
   * Retrieves all preset ban reasons.
   */
  @Get()
  findAll() {
    return this.banReasonsService.findAll();
  }

  /**
   * Deletes a preset ban reason.
   * @param id - The ID of the reason to delete.
   */
  @Delete(':id')
  remove(@Param('id', ParseIntPipe) id: number) {
    return this.banReasonsService.remove(id);
  }
}

--- END FILE: backend/src/admin/ban-reasons.controller.ts ---



--- START FILE: backend/src/admin/ban-reasons.service.ts ---

import { Injectable, NotFoundException } from '@nestjs/common';
import { InjectRepository } from '@nestjs/typeorm';
import { Repository } from 'typeorm';
import { BanReason } from './entities/ban-reason.entity';
import { CreateBanReasonDto } from './dto/create-ban-reason.dto';

/**
 * Service responsible for managing preset ban reasons.
 * This allows administrators to create a list of common reasons for banning users,
 * simplifying the moderation process.
 */
@Injectable()
export class BanReasonsService {
  constructor(
    @InjectRepository(BanReason)
    private reasonsRepository: Repository<BanReason>,
  ) {}

  /**
   * Creates a new preset ban reason.
   * @param dto - The DTO containing the reason text.
   * @returns A promise that resolves to the newly created BanReason entity.
   */
  create(dto: CreateBanReasonDto): Promise<BanReason> {
    const reason = this.reasonsRepository.create(dto);
    return this.reasonsRepository.save(reason);
  }

  /**
   * Retrieves all preset ban reasons, ordered by creation date.
   * @returns A promise that resolves to an array of all BanReason entities.
   */
  findAll(): Promise<BanReason[]> {
    return this.reasonsRepository.find({ order: { created_at: 'ASC' } });
  }

  /**
   * Deletes a preset ban reason by its ID.
   * @param id - The numeric ID of the ban reason to delete.
   * @throws NotFoundException if no reason with the given ID is found.
   */
  async remove(id: number): Promise<void> {
    const result = await this.reasonsRepository.delete(id);
    if (result.affected === 0) {
      throw new NotFoundException(`Ban reason with ID ${id} not found`);
    }
  }
}

--- END FILE: backend/src/admin/ban-reasons.service.ts ---



--- START FILE: backend/src/admin/dto/admin-update-user.dto.ts ---

import { IsInt, IsOptional, IsBoolean } from 'class-validator';

/**
 * Data Transfer Object (DTO) for updating a user's profile via an admin endpoint.
 * Defines the fields that an administrator is allowed to modify.
 */
export class AdminUpdateUserDto {
  /**
   * The ID of the new rank to assign to the user.
   */
  @IsOptional()
  @IsInt({ message: 'Rank ID must be an integer.' })
  rank_id?: number;

  /**
   * A new value for the user's reputation count.
   */
  @IsOptional()
  @IsInt()
  reputation_count?: number;

  /**
   * The verification status for a YouTuber or partner.
   */
  @IsOptional()
  @IsBoolean()
  is_verified_youtuber?: boolean;
}

/**

 */
export class BanUserDto {
  /**
   * The reason for the ban.
   */
  @IsString()
  @IsNotEmpty()
  reason: string;

  /**
   * The duration of the ban in hours.
   * If not provided, the ban is considered permanent.
   */

  @IsInt()
  @Min(1)

}

import { Entity, PrimaryGeneratedColumn, Column, CreateDateColumn } from 'typeorm';

/**
 * Represents a preset ban reason in the database.
 * Administrators can manage these reasons to ensure consistency in moderation.
 */
@Entity('ban_reasons')
export class BanReason {
  /**
   * The unique identifier for the ban reason.
   */
  @PrimaryGeneratedColumn()
  id: number;

  /**
   * The text of the ban reason.
   */
  @Column({ type: 'varchar', length: 255 })
  reason: string;

  /**
   * The timestamp when the ban reason was created.
   */
  @CreateDateColumn({ name: 'created_at' })
  created_at: Date;
}

--- START FILE: backend/src/auth/auth.controller.ts ---

import { Controller, Post, Body, UsePipes, ValidationPipe, Request, UseGuards, Get, HttpCode, HttpStatus, Logger } from '@nestjs/common';
import { AuthService } from './auth.service';
import { CreateUserDto } from '../users/dto/create-user.dto';
import { LoginDto } from './dto/login.dto';
import { JwtAuthGuard } from './guards/jwt-auth.guard';
import { UsersService, PublicUser } from '../users/users.service';
import { ApiBearerAuth, ApiTags } from '@nestjs/swagger';
import { ChangePasswordDto } from './dto/change-password.dto';

/**
 * Controller responsible for handling authentication-related HTTP requests,
 * such as user registration, login, and profile management.
 */
@ApiTags('Authentication & Profiles')
@Controller('auth')
export class AuthController {
  private readonly logger = new Logger(AuthController.name);

  constructor(
      private authService: AuthService,
      private usersService: UsersService,
    ) {}

  /**
   * Endpoint for new user registration.
   * @param createUserDto - The user's registration data (username, email, password).
   * @returns A promise resolving to the newly created public user data.
   */
  @Post('register')
  @UsePipes(new ValidationPipe({ whitelist: true, forbidNonWhitelisted: true }))
  async register(@Body() createUserDto: CreateUserDto) {
    this.logger.log(`[REGISTER] 📝 New registration attempt for email: ${createUserDto.email}`);
    return this.authService.register(createUserDto);
  }

  /**
   * Endpoint for user login.
   * @param loginDto - The user's login credentials (email, password).
   * @returns A promise resolving to an object containing the JWT access token and user data.
   */
  @Post('login')
  @UsePipes(new ValidationPipe({ whitelist: true, forbidNonWhitelisted: true }))
  async login(@Body() loginDto: LoginDto) {
    this.logger.log(`[LOGIN] ➡️ Login attempt for email: ${loginDto.email}`);
    return this.authService.login(loginDto);
  }

  /**
   * Endpoint to retrieve the profile of the currently authenticated user.
   * @param req - The incoming request object containing the authenticated user's data.
   * @returns A promise resolving to the public user data of the authenticated user.
   */
  @Get('profile')
  @UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard)
  @ApiBearerAuth()
  async getProfile(@Request() req): Promise<PublicUser> {
    const userId = req.user.userId;
    return this.usersService.findOne(userId);
  }

  /**
   * Endpoint for an authenticated user to change their password.
   * @param req - The incoming request object.
   * @param changePasswordDto - DTO containing the current and new passwords.
   */
  @Post('change-password')
  @UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard)
  @ApiBearerAuth()
  @HttpCode(HttpStatus.OK)
  async changePassword(@Request() req, @Body() changePasswordDto: ChangePasswordDto) {
    const userId = req.user.userId;
    this.logger.log(`[PWD-CHANGE] 🔑 User ID: ${userId} is attempting to change password.`);
    return this.authService.changePassword(req.user.userId, changePasswordDto);
  }
}

--- END FILE: backend/src/auth/auth.controller.ts ---



--- START FILE: backend/src/auth/auth.module.ts ---

import { Module, Global } from '@nestjs/common';
import { AuthService } from './auth.service';
import { AuthController } from './auth.controller';
import { UsersModule } from '../users/users.module';
import { PassportModule } from '@nestjs/passport';
import { JwtModule } from '@nestjs/jwt';
import { ConfigModule, ConfigService } from '@nestjs/config';
import { JwtStrategy } from './jwt.strategy';

/**
 * A global module responsible for handling all authentication-related concerns.
 *
 * It imports the UsersModule to interact with user data, configures Passport.js for
 * authentication strategies, and sets up the JWT module for token generation and
 * verification using settings from the environment configuration.
 *
 * By being a @Global() module, its exported providers (AuthService, JwtModule)
 * are available application-wide without needing to import AuthModule in other modules.
 */
@Global()
@Module({
  imports: [
    UsersModule,
    PassportModule,
    ConfigModule,
    JwtModule.registerAsync({
      imports: [ConfigModule],
      inject: [ConfigService],
      useFactory: async (configService: ConfigService) => ({
        secret: configService.get<string>('JWT_SECRET'),
        signOptions: { expiresIn: configService.get<string>('JWT_EXPIRATION_TIME') },
      }),
    }),
  ],
  providers: [AuthService, JwtStrategy],
  controllers: [AuthController],
  exports: [AuthService, JwtModule],
})
export class AuthModule {}

--- START FILE: backend/src/auth/auth.service.spec.ts ---

// backend/src/auth/auth.service.spec.ts

import { Test, TestingModule } from '@nestjs/testing';
import { AuthService } from './auth.service';
import { UsersService } from '../users/users.service';
import { JwtService } from '@nestjs/jwt';
import { UnauthorizedException, ForbiddenException } from '@nestjs/common';
import * as bcrypt from 'bcrypt';
import { User } from '../users/entities/user.entity';

// Мокируем bcrypt, чтобы не выполнять реальное хэширование в тестах
jest.mock('bcrypt');

describe('AuthService', () => {
    let authService: AuthService;
    let usersService: DeepMocked<UsersService>;
    let jwtService: DeepMocked<JwtService>;

    // Тип для глубокого мокирования
    type DeepMocked<T> = {
        [K in keyof T]: T[K] extends (...args: any[]) => any ? jest.Mock : DeepMocked<T[K]>;
    };

    beforeEach(async () => {
        const module: TestingModule = await Test.createTestingModule({
            providers: [
                AuthService,
                {
                    provide: UsersService,
                    useValue: {
                        findOneWithPasswordByEmail: jest.fn(),
                        create: jest.fn(),
                        updatePassword: jest.fn(),
                        findOneWithPasswordById: jest.fn(),
                    },
                },
                {
                    provide: JwtService,
                    useValue: {
                        sign: jest.fn(),
                    },
                },
            ],
        }).compile();

        authService = module.get<AuthService>(AuthService);
        usersService = module.get(UsersService);
        jwtService = module.get(JwtService);
    });

    it('should be defined', () => {
        expect(authService).toBeDefined();
    });

    describe('validateUser', () => {
        it('should return user data if credentials are valid and user is not banned', async () => {
            const mockUser = {
                id: 1,
                email: 'test@test.com',
                is_banned: false,
                validatePassword: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue(true),
                password_hash: 'hashed_password',
            } as unknown as User;

            usersService.findOneWithPasswordByEmail.mockResolvedValue(mockUser);
            const { password_hash, validatePassword, ...publicData } = mockUser;

            const result = await authService.validateUser('test@test.com', 'password');
            expect(result).toEqual(publicData);
        });

        it('should return null if user is not found', async () => {
            usersService.findOneWithPasswordByEmail.mockResolvedValue(null);
            const result = await authService.validateUser('notfound@test.com', 'password');
            expect(result).toBeNull();
        });

        it('should return null if password is invalid', async () => {
            const mockUser = {
                id: 1,
                email: 'test@test.com',
                is_banned: false,
                validatePassword: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue(false),
            } as unknown as User;
            usersService.findOneWithPasswordByEmail.mockResolvedValue(mockUser);
            const result = await authService.validateUser('test@test.com', 'wrongpassword');
            expect(result).toBeNull();
        });

        it('should throw ForbiddenException if user is banned', async () => {
            const mockUser = { id: 1, email: 'banned@test.com', is_banned: true } as User;
            usersService.findOneWithPasswordByEmail.mockResolvedValue(mockUser);

            await expect(authService.validateUser('banned@test.com', 'password'))
                .rejects.toThrow(ForbiddenException);
        });
    });

    describe('login', () => {
        it('should return access token and user data on successful login', async () => {
            const userPayload = { id: 1, username: 'Test', email: 'test@test.com' };
            const token = 'test_token';

            // Мокируем validateUser внутри сервиса
            jest.spyOn(authService, 'validateUser').mockResolvedValue(userPayload as any);
            jwtService.sign.mockReturnValue(token);

            const result = await authService.login({ email: 'test@test.com', password: 'password' });

            expect(result).toEqual({ access_token: token, user: userPayload });
        });

        it('should throw UnauthorizedException on failed login', async () => {
            jest.spyOn(authService, 'validateUser').mockResolvedValue(null);

            await expect(authService.login({ email: 'test@test.com', password: 'wrongpassword' }))
                .rejects.toThrow(UnauthorizedException);
        });
    });

    describe('changePassword', () => {
        it('should successfully change password with correct current password', async () => {
            const userId = 1;
            const changePasswordDto = { currentPassword: 'oldPassword', newPassword: 'newPassword' };
            const user = { id: userId, password_hash: 'hashedOldPassword' } as User;

            usersService.findOneWithPasswordById.mockResolvedValue(user);
            (bcrypt.compare as jest.Mock).mockResolvedValue(true);
            (bcrypt.hash as jest.Mock).mockResolvedValue('hashedNewPassword');
            usersService.updatePassword.mockResolvedValue(undefined);

            await expect(authService.changePassword(userId, changePasswordDto)).resolves.not.toThrow();

            expect(bcrypt.compare).toHaveBeenCalledWith('oldPassword', 'hashedOldPassword');
            expect(bcrypt.hash).toHaveBeenCalledWith('newPassword', 10);
            expect(usersService.updatePassword).toHaveBeenCalledWith(userId, 'hashedNewPassword');
        });

        it('should throw UnauthorizedException with incorrect current password', async () => {
            const userId = 1;
            const changePasswordDto = { currentPassword: 'wrongOldPassword', newPassword: 'newPassword' };
            const user = { id: userId, password_hash: 'hashedOldPassword' } as User;

            usersService.findOneWithPasswordById.mockResolvedValue(user);
            (bcrypt.compare as jest.Mock).mockResolvedValue(false);

            await expect(authService.changePassword(userId, changePasswordDto))
                .rejects.toThrow(UnauthorizedException);
        });
    });
});
--- END FILE: backend/src/auth/auth.service.spec.ts ---



--- START FILE: backend/src/auth/auth.service.ts ---

import { Injectable, UnauthorizedException, ForbiddenException, Logger } from '@nestjs/common';
import { UsersService, PublicUser } from '../users/users.service';
import { JwtService } from '@nestjs/jwt';
import { LoginDto } from './dto/login.dto';
import { CreateUserDto } from '../users/dto/create-user.dto';
import { User } from '../users/entities/user.entity';
import { ChangePasswordDto } from './dto/change-password.dto';
import * as bcrypt from 'bcrypt';

/**
 * Service responsible for the core authentication logic, including user validation,
 * registration, login, and password management.
 */
@Injectable()
export class AuthService {
  private readonly logger = new Logger(AuthService.name);

  constructor(
    private usersService: UsersService,
    private jwtService: JwtService,
  ) {}

  /**
   * Validates a user's credentials against the database.
   * @param email - The user's email address.
   * @param pass - The user's plain-text password.
   * @returns A promise resolving to the public user object if valid, otherwise null.
   * @throws ForbiddenException if the user is banned.
   */
  async validateUser(email: string, pass: string): Promise<PublicUser | null> {
    const user: User | null = await this.usersService.findOneWithPasswordByEmail(email);
    if (!user) {
      return null;
    }
    if (user.is_banned) {
      this.logger.warn(`[LOGIN-BANNED] 🚫 Banned User ID: ${user.id} (${email}) attempted to log in.`);
      throw new ForbiddenException('This account has been banned.');
    }
    if (await user.validatePassword(pass)) {
      const { password_hash, validatePassword, ...publicData } = user;
      return publicData as PublicUser;
    }
    return null;
  }

  /**
   * Handles the user login process. Validates credentials and returns a JWT access token.
   * @param loginDto - The DTO containing the user's email and password.
   * @returns A promise resolving to an object with the access token and public user data.
   * @throws UnauthorizedException if credentials are invalid.
   */
  async login(loginDto: LoginDto) {
    const userPayload: PublicUser | null = await this.validateUser(loginDto.email, loginDto.password);
    if (!userPayload) {
      this.logger.warn(`[LOGIN-FAIL] ❌ Failed login attempt for email: ${loginDto.email}. Invalid credentials.`);
      throw new UnauthorizedException('Invalid credentials');
    }
    this.logger.log(`[LOGIN-SUCCESS] ✅ User ${userPayload.username} (ID: ${userPayload.id}) logged in successfully.`);
    const jwtTokenPayload = { username: userPayload.username, sub: userPayload.id, rank: userPayload.rank };
    return {
      access_token: this.jwtService.sign(jwtTokenPayload),
      user: userPayload
    };
  }

  /**
   * Handles new user registration.
   * @param createUserDto - The DTO containing the new user's details.
   * @returns A promise resolving to the newly created public user data.
   */
  async register(createUserDto: CreateUserDto): Promise<PublicUser> {
    const newUser = await this.usersService.create(createUserDto);
    this.logger.log(`[REGISTER-SUCCESS] ✅ User ${newUser.username} successfully registered with ID: ${newUser.id}`);
    return newUser;
  }

  /**
   * Changes the password for an authenticated user.
   * @param userId - The ID of the user changing their password.
   * @param changePasswordDto - The DTO containing the current and new passwords.
   * @throws ForbiddenException if the user is not found.
   * @throws UnauthorizedException if the current password is incorrect.
   */
  async changePassword(userId: number, changePasswordDto: ChangePasswordDto): Promise<void> {
    const user = await this.usersService.findOneWithPasswordById(userId);
    if (!user) {
        this.logger.error(`[PWD-CHANGE-FAIL] ❌ Attempted to change password for non-existent User ID: ${userId}`);
        throw new ForbiddenException('User not found.');
    }
    const isPasswordMatching = await bcrypt.compare(
        changePasswordDto.currentPassword,
        user.password_hash,
    );
    if (!isPasswordMatching) {
        this.logger.warn(`[PWD-CHANGE-FAIL] ❌ User ID: ${userId} failed to change password due to incorrect current password.`);
        throw new UnauthorizedException('Wrong current password.');
    }
    const newHashedPassword = await bcrypt.hash(changePasswordDto.newPassword, 10);
    await this.usersService.updatePassword(userId, newHashedPassword);
    this.logger.log(`[PWD-CHANGE-SUCCESS] ✅ User ID: ${userId} successfully updated their password.`);
  }
}

--- END FILE: backend/src/auth/auth.service.ts ---



--- START FILE: backend/src/auth/decorators/roles.decorator.ts ---

import { SetMetadata } from '@nestjs/common';

/**
 * Key used to store the required power level in the metadata.
 */
export const ROLES_KEY = 'power_level';

/**
 * A custom decorator to specify the minimum power level required to access a route.
 * Attaches the power level as metadata to the route handler, which is later read by the RolesGuard.
 * @param powerLevel - The minimum power level required.
 */
export const Roles = (powerLevel: number) => SetMetadata(ROLES_KEY, powerLevel);

--- START FILE: backend/src/auth/dto/change-password.dto.ts ---

import { IsString, MinLength } from 'class-validator';

/**
 * Data Transfer Object (DTO) for the change password request.
 * It defines the structure and validation rules for the incoming data.
 */
export class ChangePasswordDto {
  /**
   * The user's current password.
   */
  @IsString()
  @MinLength(8, { message: 'Current password must be at least 8 characters long' })
  currentPassword: string;

  /**
   * The user's desired new password.
   */
  @IsString()
  @MinLength(8, { message: 'New password must be at least 8 characters long' })
  newPassword: string;
}

--- END FILE: backend/src/auth/dto/change-password.dto.ts ---



--- START FILE: backend/src/auth/dto/login.dto.ts ---

import { IsEmail, IsNotEmpty, IsString, MinLength } from 'class-validator';
import { ApiProperty } from '@nestjs/swagger';

/**
 * Data Transfer Object (DTO) for user login.
 * Defines the structure and validation rules for login credentials.
 */
export class LoginDto {
  /**
   * The email address of the user attempting to log in.
   */
  @ApiProperty({ example: 'user@example.com', description: 'User email address for login' })
  @IsNotEmpty()
  @IsEmail()
  email: string;

  /**
   * The plain-text password of the user.
   */
  @ApiProperty({ example: 'SecurePassword123!', description: 'User password for login' })
  @IsNotEmpty()
  @IsString()
  @MinLength(8)
  password: string;
}
