            };
        }
    }, [clan.id, authToken, socket]);

    useEffect(() => {
        messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
    }, [messages]);

    const handleSendMessage = (e) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        if (newMessage.trim() && socket) {
            socket.emit('sendClanMessage', {
                clanId: clan.id,
                content: newMessage,
                channel: activeChannel,
                parentId: replyingTo ? replyingTo.id : undefined,
            });
            setNewMessage('');
            setReplyingTo(null);
        }
    };

    const handleReplyLinkClick = (event, messageId) => {
        event.preventDefault();
        const element = document.getElementById(`msg-${messageId}`);
        if (element) {
            element.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' });
            setHighlightedMessageId(messageId);
            setTimeout(() => { setHighlightedMessageId(null); }, 1500);
        }
    };

    const handleOpenDeleteModal = (message) => {
        setMessageToDelete(message);
        setIsConfirmModalOpen(true);
    };

    const handleConfirmDelete = () => {
        if (!messageToDelete || !socket) return;
        setIsActionLoading(true);
        socket.emit('deleteClanMessage', {
            clanId: clan.id,
            messageId: messageToDelete.id
        });
        setIsActionLoading(false);
        setIsConfirmModalOpen(false);
        setMessageToDelete(null);
    };

    const handleStartEdit = (message) => {
        setEditingMessage({ id: message.id, content: message.content });
        setReplyingTo(null); // Убедимся, что мы не отвечаем и редактируем одновременно
    };

    const handleCancelEdit = () => {
        setEditingMessage(null);
    };

    const handleSaveEdit = () => {
        if (!editingMessage || !editingMessage.content.trim() || !socket) return;

        socket.emit('editClanMessage', {
            clanId: clan.id,
            messageId: editingMessage.id,
            content: editingMessage.content
        });

        setEditingMessage(null); // Сразу скрываем поле редактирования для лучшего UX
    };

    return (
        <>
            <Sheet variant="outlined" sx={{ mt: 3, borderRadius: 'md', height: '70vh', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column' }}>
                <Box sx={{ p: 1, borderBottom: '1px solid', borderColor: 'divider' }}>
                    <Tabs value={activeChannel} onChange={(e, newValue) => setActiveChannel(newValue)}>
                        <TabList variant="plain" size="sm" sx={{ '--List-decorator-size': '0px' }}>
                            <Tab value="general">General</Tab>
                            {canAccessAdminChat && <Tab value="admin">Admin</Tab>}
                        </TabList>
                    </Tabs>
                </Box>
                <List sx={{ flex: 1, overflowY: 'auto', p: { xs: 1, sm: 2 } }}>
                    {loading ? <CircularProgress /> : error ? <Alert color="danger">{error}</Alert> :
                        messages.filter(m => m.channel === activeChannel).map((msg, index, arr) => {
                            const prevMsg = arr[index - 1];
                            const isConsecutive = prevMsg && prevMsg.author?.id === msg.author?.id;
                            const isOwn = msg.author?.id === currentUser?.id;

                            if (editingMessage && editingMessage.id === msg.id) {
                                return (
                                    <ListItem key={msg.id}>
                                        <Stack spacing={1} sx={{ width: '100%' }}>
                                            <Textarea
                                                value={editingMessage.content}
                                                onChange={(e) => setEditingMessage(prev => ({ ...prev, content: e.target.value }))}
                                                minRows={1}
                                                autoFocus
                                                onKeyDown={(e) => {
                                                    if (e.key === 'Enter' && !e.shiftKey) {
                                                        e.preventDefault();
                                                        handleSaveEdit();
                                                    }
                                                    if (e.key === 'Escape') {
                                                        handleCancelEdit();
                                                    }
                                                }}
                                            />
                                            <Stack direction="row" spacing={1} sx={{ alignSelf: 'flex-end' }}>
                                                <Button size="sm" variant="plain" color="neutral" onClick={handleCancelEdit}>Cancel</Button>
                                                <Button size="sm" variant="solid" color="primary" onClick={handleSaveEdit}>Save</Button>
                                            </Stack>
                                        </Stack>
                                    </ListItem>
                                );
                            }

                            return (
                                <MessageBubble
                                    key={msg.id}
                                    message={msg}
                                    isOwn={isOwn}
                                    isConsecutive={isConsecutive}
                                    onReply={() => setReplyingTo(msg)}
                                    onDelete={() => handleOpenDeleteModal(msg)}
                                    onEdit={() => handleStartEdit(msg)} // <-- ДОБАВЬ ЭТУ СТРОКУ
                                    onReplyLinkClick={handleReplyLinkClick}
                                />
                            );
                        })
                    }
                    <div ref={messagesEndRef} />
                </List>

                {!editingMessage && (
                    <Box component="form" onSubmit={handleSendMessage} sx={{ p: { xs: 1, sm: 2 }, borderTop: '1px solid', borderColor: 'divider' }}>
                        {replyingTo && (
                            <Sheet variant="soft" sx={{ p: 0.5, mb: 1, borderRadius: 'sm', display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'center' }}>
                                <Box sx={{ overflow: 'hidden', pl: 1 }}>
                                    <Typography level="body-xs">Replying to {replyingTo.author?.username}</Typography>
                                    <Typography noWrap level="body-xs" sx={{ opacity: 0.7 }}>{replyingTo.content}</Typography>
                                </Box>
                                <IconButton size="sm" variant="plain" onClick={() => setReplyingTo(null)}>
                                    <CloseIcon />
                                </IconButton>
                            </Sheet>
                        )}
                        <Textarea
                            placeholder={`Message in #${activeChannel}...`}
                            value={newMessage}
                            onChange={(e) => setNewMessage(e.target.value)}
                            minRows={1}
                            maxRows={4}
                            endDecorator={
                                <Stack direction="row" spacing={0.5} sx={{ alignItems: 'center' }}>
                                    <Dropdown>
                                        <MenuButton
                                            slots={{ root: IconButton }}
                                            slotProps={{ root: { variant: 'plain', color: 'neutral', size: 'sm' } }}
                                        >
                                            <HelpOutlineIcon />
                                        </MenuButton>
                                        <Menu size="lg" placement="top-end" sx={{ minWidth: 320, p: 2 }}>
                                            <Typography level="title-md" sx={{ mb: 1 }}>Chat Command Guide</Typography>
                                            <Typography level="body-xs" sx={{ mb: 2 }}>
                                                All commands must be sent as a reply to a user's message.
                                            </Typography>
                                            <List size="sm">
                                                <ListItem>
                                                    <Typography level="body-sm"><code>/kick &lt;reason&gt;</code> - Kicks the member.</Typography>
                                                </ListItem>
                                                <ListItem>
                                                    <Typography level="body-sm"><code>/mute [mins] &lt;reason&gt;</code> - Mutes the member (permanently if no time).</Typography>
                                                </ListItem>
                                                <ListItem>
                                                    <Typography level="body-sm"><code>/unmute</code> - Unmutes the member.</Typography>
                                                </ListItem>
                                                <ListItem>
                                                    <Typography level="body-sm"><code>/warn &lt;reason&gt;</code> - Issues a warning.</Typography>
                                                </ListItem>
                                                <ListItem>
                                                    <Typography level="body-sm"><code>/unwarn</code> - Revokes the last warning.</Typography>
                                                </ListItem>
                                                <ListItem>
                                                    <Typography level="body-sm"><code>/role &lt;name|up|down&gt; [num]</code> - Changes the member's role.</Typography>
                                                </ListItem>
                                            </List>
                                        </Menu>
                                    </Dropdown>

                                    <IconButton type="submit" disabled={!newMessage.trim()}>
                                        <SendIcon />
                                    </IconButton>
                                </Stack>
                            }
                            onKeyDown={(e) => { if (e.key === 'Enter' && !e.shiftKey) handleSendMessage(e); }}
                        />
                    </Box>
                )}
            </Sheet>

            <ConfirmationModal
                open={isConfirmModalOpen}
                onClose={() => setIsConfirmModalOpen(false)}
                onConfirm={handleConfirmDelete}
                title="Confirm Message Deletion"
                content="Are you sure you want to delete this message? This action cannot be undone."
                confirmText="Delete"
                confirmColor="danger"
                loading={isActionLoading}
            />
        </>
    );
}

export default ClanChat;
--- END FILE: frontend/src/components/ClanChat.jsx ---



--- START FILE: frontend/src/components/ClanRoleManager.jsx ---

// frontend/src/components/ClanRoleManager.jsx

import React, { useState } from 'react';
import axios from 'axios';
import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext';
import {
    Box, Typography, Button, Sheet, Table, IconButton, Tooltip, Stack,
    Modal, ModalDialog, ModalClose, FormControl, FormLabel, Input, FormHelperText,
    Chip, Switch, Divider, Select, Option, Alert,
    // [!code focus start]
    // --- 1. Добавляем новые импорты ---
    List, ListItem, useTheme
} from '@mui/joy';
import { useMediaQuery } from '@mui/material';
// [!code focus end]
import AddIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Add';
import EditIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Edit';
import DeleteForeverIcon from '@mui/icons-material/DeleteForever';
import toast from 'react-hot-toast';
import ConfirmationModal from './ConfirmationModal';

// [!code focus start]
// --- 2. Добавляем вспомогательную функцию для цвета ---
function isColorLight(hexColor) {
    if (!hexColor) return false;
    const hex = hexColor.replace('#', '');
    const r = parseInt(hex.substring(0, 2), 16);
    const g = parseInt(hex.substring(2, 4), 16);
    const b = parseInt(hex.substring(4, 6), 16);
    const brightness = ((r * 299) + (g * 587) + (b * 114)) / 1000;
    return brightness > 155;
}

// --- 3. Создаем отдельный компонент для карточки роли ---
const RoleCard = ({ role, onEdit, onDelete }) => (
    <Sheet variant="outlined" sx={{ p: 2, borderRadius: 'sm' }}>
        <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'center', gap: 2 }}>
            <Box>
                <Chip size="md" variant="soft" sx={{ bgcolor: role.color, color: isColorLight(role.color) ? '#000' : '#FFF', mb: 0.5 }}>
                    {role.name}
                </Chip>
                <Typography level="body-xs">Power Level: {role.power_level}</Typography>
            </Box>
            <Stack direction="row" spacing={0.5}>
                <Tooltip title="Edit Role">
                    <IconButton size="sm" color="neutral" onClick={() => onEdit(role)}>
                        <EditIcon />
                    </IconButton>
                </Tooltip>
                <Tooltip title={role.is_system_role ? "Cannot delete system roles" : "Delete Role"}>
                    {/* Обертка <span> нужна, чтобы Tooltip работал на заблокированных кнопках */}
                    <span>
                        <IconButton size="sm" color="danger" onClick={() => onDelete(role)} disabled={role.is_system_role}>
                            <DeleteForeverIcon />
                        </IconButton>
                    </span>
                </Tooltip>
            </Stack>
        </Box>
    </Sheet>
);
// [!code focus end]

const getInitialFormData = () => ({
    name: '',
    color: '#AAAAAA',
    power_level: 10,
    clanPermissions: {
        canEditDetails: false, canEditAppearance: false, canEditRoles: false,
        canEditApplicationForm: false, canAcceptMembers: false, canInviteMembers: false,
        canUseClanTags: false, canAccessAdminChat: false,
    },
    memberPermissions: {
        maxKickPower: 0, maxMutePower: 0, maxPromotePower: 0,
        maxDemotePower: 0, maxWarnPower: 0,
    }
});

function ClanRoleManager({ clan, onRolesUpdate }) {
    const { authToken, user: currentUser } = useAuth();
    const [isEditModalOpen, setIsEditModalOpen] = useState(false);
    const [editingRole, setEditingRole] = useState(null);
    const [modalError, setModalError] = useState('');
    const [isConfirmModalOpen, setIsConfirmModalOpen] = useState(false);
    const [roleToDelete, setRoleToDelete] = useState(null);
    const [isActionLoading, setIsActionLoading] = useState(false);
    const [formData, setFormData] = useState(getInitialFormData());

    // [!code focus start]
    // --- 4. Определяем, является ли экран мобильным ---
    const theme = useTheme();
    const isMobile = useMediaQuery(theme.breakpoints.down('md'));
    // [!code focus end]

    const sortedRoles = [...clan.roles].sort((a, b) => b.power_level - a.power_level);
    const currentUserRole = clan.members.find(m => m.user_id === currentUser.id)?.role;

    const handleOpenEditModal = (role = null) => {
        setModalError('');
        if (role) {
            setEditingRole(role);
            const initialData = getInitialFormData();
            setFormData({
                name: role.name,
                color: role.color,
                power_level: role.power_level,
                clanPermissions: { ...initialData.clanPermissions, ...role.permissions?.clanPermissions },
                memberPermissions: { ...initialData.memberPermissions, ...role.permissions?.memberPermissions },
            });
        } else {
            setEditingRole(null);
            setFormData(getInitialFormData());
        }
        setIsEditModalOpen(true);
    };
    
    const handleCloseEditModal = () => setIsEditModalOpen(false);

    const handleFormChange = (e) => {
        const { name, value } = e.target;
        const finalValue = name === 'power_level' ? parseInt(value, 10) || 0 : value;
        setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, [name]: finalValue }));
    };

    const handlePermissionChange = (permissionType, key, value) => {
        setFormData(prev => ({
            ...prev,
            [permissionType]: { ...prev[permissionType], [key]: value, }
        }));
    };

    const handleSaveRole = async (event) => {
        event.preventDefault();
        setIsActionLoading(true);
        setModalError('');
        let payload = { ...formData };
        if (editingRole?.is_system_role) {
            payload = { name: formData.name, color: formData.color, };
        }
        const apiCall = editingRole
            ? axios.patch(`/api/clans/${clan.id}/roles/${editingRole.id}`, payload, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } })
            : axios.post(`/api/clans/${clan.id}/roles`, payload, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } });
        try {
            await apiCall;
            toast.success(`Role successfully ${editingRole ? 'updated' : 'created'}!`);
            onRolesUpdate();
            handleCloseEditModal();
        } catch (err) {
            const message = err.response?.data?.message;
            setModalError(Array.isArray(message) ? message.join(', ') : (message || 'An error occurred.'));
        } finally {
            setIsActionLoading(false);
        }
    };
    
    const handleOpenDeleteConfirm = (role) => {
        setRoleToDelete(role);
        setIsConfirmModalOpen(true);
    };

    const handleConfirmDelete = async () => {
        if (!roleToDelete) return;
        setIsActionLoading(true);
        try {
            await axios.delete(`/api/clans/${clan.id}/roles/${roleToDelete.id}`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } });
            toast.success(`Role "${roleToDelete.name}" was deleted.`);
            onRolesUpdate();
        } catch (err) {
            toast.error(err.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to delete role.');
        } finally {
            setIsActionLoading(false);
            setIsConfirmModalOpen(false);
        }
    };

    return (
        <Sheet variant="outlined" sx={{ p: { xs: 2, md: 3 }, borderRadius: 'md', mt: 3 }}>
            <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'center', mb: 2 }}>
                <Typography level="h4" component="h2">Role Management</Typography>
                <Button startDecorator={<AddIcon />} onClick={() => handleOpenEditModal()}>Create Role</Button>
            </Box>
            
            {/* [!code focus start] */}
            {/* --- 5. Добавляем условный рендеринг --- */}
            {isMobile ? (
                // ВЕРСИЯ ДЛЯ МОБИЛЬНЫХ
                <Stack spacing={1.5}>
                    {sortedRoles.map((role) => (
                        <RoleCard
                            key={role.id}
                            role={role}
                            onEdit={handleOpenEditModal}
                            onDelete={handleOpenDeleteConfirm}
                        />
                    ))}
                </Stack>
            ) : (
                // ВЕРСИЯ ДЛЯ ДЕСКТОПА
                <Sheet variant="outlined" sx={{ borderRadius: 'sm', overflow: 'auto' }}>
                    <Table hoverRow>
                        <thead>
                            <tr>
                                <th>Role</th>
                                <th>Power Level</th>
                                <th>Actions</th>
                            </tr>
                        </thead>
                        <tbody>
                            {sortedRoles.map((role) => (
                                <tr key={role.id}>
                                    <td><Chip size="md" variant="soft" sx={{ bgcolor: role.color, color: isColorLight(role.color) ? '#000' : '#FFF' }}>{role.name}</Chip></td>
                                    <td>{role.power_level}</td>
                                    <td>
                                        <Stack direction="row" spacing={1}>
                                            <Tooltip title="Edit Role"><IconButton size="sm" color="neutral" onClick={() => handleOpenEditModal(role)}><EditIcon /></IconButton></Tooltip>
                                            <Tooltip title="Delete Role"><IconButton size="sm" color="danger" onClick={() => handleOpenDeleteConfirm(role)} disabled={role.is_system_role}><DeleteForeverIcon /></IconButton></Tooltip>
                                        </Stack>
                                    </td>
                                </tr>
                            ))}
                        </tbody>
                    </Table>
                </Sheet>
            )}
            {/* --- КОНЕЦ УСЛОВНОГО РЕНДЕРИНГА --- */}
            {/* [!code focus end] */}

            <Modal open={isEditModalOpen} onClose={handleCloseEditModal}>
                <ModalDialog component="form" onSubmit={handleSaveRole} sx={{width: '90vw', maxWidth: '600px'}}>
                    <ModalClose />
                    <Typography level="h4">{editingRole ? 'Edit Role' : 'Create New Role'}</Typography>
                    <Stack spacing={2} sx={{ mt: 2, maxHeight: '70vh', overflowY: 'auto', pr: 1 }}>
                        <FormControl required><FormLabel>Role Name</FormLabel><Input name="name" value={formData.name} onChange={handleFormChange} autoFocus /></FormControl>
                        <FormControl required disabled={!!editingRole?.is_system_role}><FormLabel>Power Level</FormLabel><Input name="power_level" type="number" value={formData.power_level} onChange={handleFormChange} /><FormHelperText>1-999. Higher is more powerful.</FormHelperText></FormControl>
                        <FormControl required><FormLabel>Display Color</FormLabel><Input name="color" type="color" value={formData.color} onChange={handleFormChange} sx={{ p: 0.5 }} /></FormControl>
                        <Divider /><Typography level="title-md">Clan Permissions</Typography>
                        <Sheet variant="outlined" sx={{ p: 2, borderRadius: 'sm', display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: {xs: '1fr', sm: '1fr 1fr'}, gap: 2 }}>
                            {Object.keys(formData.clanPermissions).map(key => (
                                <FormControl key={key} orientation="horizontal" sx={{ justifyContent: 'space-between' }} disabled={!!editingRole?.is_system_role}>
                                    <FormLabel>{key.replace(/([A-Z])/g, ' $1').replace(/^./, str => str.toUpperCase())}</FormLabel>
                                    <Switch checked={formData.clanPermissions[key]} onChange={(e) => handlePermissionChange('clanPermissions', key, e.target.checked)}/>
                                </FormControl>
                            ))}
                        </Sheet>
                        <Divider /><Typography level="title-md">Member Permissions</Typography>
                        <Sheet variant="outlined" sx={{ p: 2, borderRadius: 'sm', display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: {xs: '1fr', sm: '1fr 1fr'}, gap: 2 }}>
                            {Object.keys(formData.memberPermissions).map(key => (
                                <FormControl key={key} disabled={!!editingRole?.is_system_role}>
                                    <FormLabel>{key.replace(/([A-Z])/g, ' $1').replace(/^./, str => str.toUpperCase())}</FormLabel>
                                    <Select 
                                        value={formData.memberPermissions[key]} 
                                        onChange={(_, newValue) => handlePermissionChange('memberPermissions', key, newValue)}
                                    >
                                        <Option value={0}>None (0)</Option>
                                        {sortedRoles
                                            .filter(r => r.power_level < formData.power_level && r.power_level < (currentUserRole?.power_level || 1000))
                                            .map(r => (
                                                <Option key={r.id} value={r.power_level}>{r.name} ({r.power_level})</Option>
                                            ))
                                        }
                                    </Select>
                                </FormControl>
                            ))}
                        </Sheet>
                        {modalError && <Alert color="danger">{modalError}</Alert>}
                        <Button type="submit" loading={isActionLoading} sx={{ mt: 1, alignSelf: 'flex-end' }}>{editingRole ? 'Save Changes' : 'Create Role'}</Button>
                    </Stack>
                </ModalDialog>
            </Modal>
            
            <ConfirmationModal
                open={isConfirmModalOpen}
                onClose={() => setIsConfirmModalOpen(false)}
                onConfirm={handleConfirmDelete}
                title="Confirm Role Deletion"
                content={`Are you sure you want to delete the role "${roleToDelete?.name}"?`}
                confirmText="Delete"
                confirmColor="danger"
                loading={isActionLoading}
            />
        </Sheet>
    );
}

export default ClanRoleManager;
--- END FILE: frontend/src/components/ClanRoleManager.jsx ---



--- START FILE: frontend/src/components/CollapsiblePushSidebar.jsx ---

// frontend/src/components/CollapsiblePushSidebar.jsx

import React, { useState, useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useCallback } from 'react';
import { NavLink, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext';
import NotificationBell from './NotificationBell';
import {
    Box, Sheet, List, ListItem, ListItemButton, ListItemDecorator, ListItemContent, IconButton, Typography, Button, Input, Dropdown, Menu, MenuItem, MenuButton, Divider, Drawer, Stack, Chip, CircularProgress
} from '@mui/joy';
import { useTheme } from '@mui/joy/styles';
import { useMediaQuery } from '@mui/material';
import axios from 'axios';
import MinecraftAvatar from './MinecraftAvatar';

// --- Icon Imports ---
// Importing all necessary icons for the sidebar navigation.
import HomeIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Home';
import ArticleIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Article';
import ForumIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Forum';
import PeopleIcon from '@mui/icons-material/People';
import StorefrontIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Storefront';
import SupportAgentIcon from '@mui/icons-material/SupportAgent';
import AdminPanelSettingsIcon from '@mui/icons-material/AdminPanelSettings';
import AccountCircleIcon from '@mui/icons-material/AccountCircle';
import SettingsIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Settings';
import GroupAddIcon from '@mui/icons-material/GroupAdd';
import ChevronRightIcon from '@mui/icons-material/ChevronRight';
import ChevronLeftIcon from '@mui/icons-material/ChevronLeft';
import SearchIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Search';
import KeyboardArrowDownIcon from '@mui/icons-material/KeyboardArrowDown';
import KeyboardArrowUpIcon from '@mui/icons-material/KeyboardArrowUp';
import LogoutIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Logout';
import MailIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Mail';
import EmojiEventsIcon from '@mui/icons-material/EmojiEvents';
import SupervisedUserCircleIcon from '@mui/icons-material/SupervisedUserCircle';
import DynamicFeedIcon from '@mui/icons-material/DynamicFeed';
import MenuIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Menu';
import ShieldIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Shield';
import LoginIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Login';
import BlockIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Block';
import DiamondIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Diamond';
import AdbIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Adb';
import CategoryIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Category';
import DescriptionIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Description';

// --- Component Constants ---
const SIDEBAR_WIDTH = 280;
const MAIN_CONTENT_MAX_WIDTH = '1000px';

// --- Static Navigation Items ---
// These are the core, hardcoded sections of the sidebar menu.
const staticNavItems = [
    { name: 'Home Page', icon: <HomeIcon />, path: '/' },
    { name: 'News', icon: <ArticleIcon />, path: '/news' },
    {
        name: 'Community', icon: <PeopleIcon />, subItems: [
            { name: 'Posts', icon: <ForumIcon />, path: '/posts' },
            { name: 'Players', icon: <PeopleIcon />, path: '/players' },
            { name: 'Clans', icon: <ShieldIcon />, path: '/clans' },
        ],
    },
    {
        name: 'Store', icon: <StorefrontIcon />, subItems: [
            { name: 'Ranks', icon: <AdbIcon />, path: '/store/ranks' },
            { name: 'Items', icon: <DiamondIcon />, path: '/shop' },
        ],
    },
];

// --- User-specific Navigation ---
// This menu appears for logged-in users.
const userNavItems = {
    name: 'My Profile', icon: <AccountCircleIcon />, subItems: [
        { name: 'Profile', icon: <AccountCircleIcon />, path: '/profile/me' },
        { name: 'Messages', icon: <MailIcon />, path: '/messages' },
        { name: 'Friends', icon: <GroupAddIcon />, path: '/friends' },
        { name: 'Settings', icon: <SettingsIcon />, path: '/profile/settings' },
        { name: 'Achievements', icon: <EmojiEventsIcon />, path: '/achievements' },
    ],
};

// --- Administrator Navigation ---
// This menu is visible only to users with administrative privileges.
const adminNavItem = {
    name: 'Admin Panel', icon: <AdminPanelSettingsIcon />, subItems: [
        { name: 'User Management', icon: <SupervisedUserCircleIcon />, path: '/admin/users' },
        { name: 'Post Management', icon: <DynamicFeedIcon />, path: '/admin/posts' },
        { name: 'Rank Management', icon: <ShieldIcon />, path: '/admin/ranks' },
        { name: 'Shop Management', icon: <StorefrontIcon />, path: '/admin/shop' },
        { name: 'Custom Page Editor', icon: <ArticleIcon />, path: '/admin/pages' },
        { name: 'Page Categories', icon: <CategoryIcon />, path: '/admin/pages/categories' },
        { name: 'Achievement Builder', icon: <EmojiEventsIcon />, path: '/admin/achievements' },
        { name: 'Ban Reasons', icon: <BlockIcon />, path: '/admin/ban-reasons' }
    ],
};

/**
 * Main component for the application layout, featuring a collapsible sidebar
 * and a fixed header. It dynamically builds the navigation menu.
 */
const CollapsiblePushSidebar = ({ children }) => {
    // --- React Hooks ---
    const theme = useTheme();
    const isMobile = useMediaQuery(theme.breakpoints.down('md'));
    const navigate = useNavigate();
    const { isLoggedIn, user, logout } = useAuth();

    // --- State Management ---
    // State for the navigation items, initially set to the static items.
    const [sidebarItems, setSidebarItems] = useState(staticNavItems);
    const [loadingSidebar, setLoadingSidebar] = useState(true);

    // UI state for sidebar visibility and interaction.
    const [sidebarOpen, setSidebarOpen] = useState(!isMobile);
    const [mobileDrawerOpen, setMobileDrawerOpen] = useState(false);
    const [openCategories, setOpenCategories] = useState({ Community: true, Store: true, 'Admin Panel': true, 'My Profile': true });
    const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
    const headerRef = useRef(null);
    const [headerHeight, setHeaderHeight] = useState(0);
    const isAdmin = user?.rank?.power_level >= 800;

    // --- Data Fetching Effect ---
    // Fetches dynamic page categories from the API and merges them with the static menu.
    useEffect(() => {
        const fetchAndCombineSidebar = async () => {
            setLoadingSidebar(true);
            try {
                const response = await axios.get('/api/pages/sidebar-categories');
                const dynamicCategories = response.data.map(category => ({
                    ...category,
                    icon: <DescriptionIcon />, // Default icon for custom categories
                    subItems: category.subItems.map(sub => ({
                        ...sub,
                        icon: <ChevronRightIcon fontSize="sm" /> // Icon for pages within a category
                    }))
                }));

                // Automatically expand new dynamic categories.
                const newOpen = {};
                dynamicCategories.forEach(item => { newOpen[item.name] = true; });
                setOpenCategories(prev => ({ ...prev, ...newOpen }));

                // Combine static, dynamic, and final static items.
                setSidebarItems([
                    ...staticNavItems,
                    ...dynamicCategories,
                    { name: 'Support', icon: <SupportAgentIcon />, path: '/support' }
                ]);

            } catch (error) {
                console.error("Failed to load dynamic sidebar categories:", error);
                // Fallback to a simpler menu if the API fails.
                setSidebarItems([...staticNavItems, { name: 'Support', icon: <SupportAgentIcon />, path: '/support' }]);
            } finally {
                setLoadingSidebar(false);
            }
        };

        fetchAndCombineSidebar();
    }, []); // Empty dependency array ensures this runs only once on mount.

    // --- Memoization ---
    // Recalculates the user's personal navigation only when the `user` object changes.
    const dynamicUserNavItems = useMemo(() => {
        if (!user) return userNavItems;
        const newSubItems = [...userNavItems.subItems];
        // Add a "My Clan" link if the user is part of a clan.
        if (user.clan) {
            newSubItems.unshift({ name: 'My Clan', icon: <ShieldIcon />, path: `/clans/${user.clan.clan.tag}` });
        }
        return { ...userNavItems, subItems: newSubItems };
    }, [user]);
    
    // --- UI Effects ---
    // Calculates the height of the sticky header to prevent content overlap.
    useEffect(() => {
        const updateHeaderHeight = () => {
            if (headerRef.current) {
                setHeaderHeight(headerRef.current.offsetHeight);
            }
        };
        updateHeaderHeight();
        window.addEventListener('resize', updateHeaderHeight);
        const timer = setTimeout(updateHeaderHeight, 350);
        return () => {
            window.removeEventListener('resize', updateHeaderHeight);
            clearTimeout(timer);
        };
    }, [sidebarOpen]);

    // Manages the sidebar's open/closed state based on screen size.
    useEffect(() => {
        if (isMobile) {
            setSidebarOpen(false);
        } else {
            setSidebarOpen(true);
            setMobileDrawerOpen(false);
        }
    }, [isMobile]);

    // --- Event Handlers ---
    const toggleSidebar = () => !isMobile && setSidebarOpen(!sidebarOpen);
    const toggleMobileDrawer = () => setMobileDrawerOpen(!mobileDrawerOpen);
    const toggleCategory = (categoryName) => setOpenCategories((prev) => ({ ...prev, [categoryName]: !prev[categoryName] }));
    const handleSearch = (event) => {
        if (event.key === 'Enter' && searchQuery.trim()) {
            navigate(`/search?query=${searchQuery.trim()}`);
            setSearchQuery('');
        }
    };
    const handleLogout = () => {
        logout();
        navigate('/');
    };

    /**
     * Renders a list of navigation items.
     * @param {Array} items - The array of navigation item objects to render.
     * @param {boolean} isMobileView - Flag to adjust behavior for mobile drawer.
     */
    const renderNavItems = useCallback((items, isMobileView = false) => {
        const handleItemClick = () => {
            if (isMobileView) {
                setMobileDrawerOpen(false);
            }
        };
        return items.map((item) => (
            <ListItem key={item.name} nested={!!item.subItems}>
                {item.subItems ? (
                    <div>
                        <ListItemButton onClick={() => toggleCategory(item.name)}>
                            {item.icon && <ListItemDecorator>{item.icon}</ListItemDecorator>}
                            <ListItemContent>{item.name}</ListItemContent>
                            {openCategories[item.name] ? <KeyboardArrowUpIcon /> : <KeyboardArrowDownIcon />}
                        </ListItemButton>
                        {openCategories[item.name] && (
                            <List sx={{ '--List-nestedInsetStart': '20px', pt: 0.5 }}>
                                {item.subItems.map((subItem) => (
                                    <ListItem key={subItem.name}>
                                        <NavLink to={subItem.path} style={{ textDecoration: 'none', color: 'inherit', width: '100%' }} onClick={handleItemClick}>
                                            {({ isActive }) => (
                                                <ListItemButton selected={isActive}>
                                                    {subItem.icon && <ListItemDecorator sx={{ color: 'text.tertiary' }}>{subItem.icon}</ListItemDecorator>}
                                                    <ListItemContent>{subItem.name}</ListItemContent>
                                                </ListItemButton>
                                            )}
                                        </NavLink>
                                    </ListItem>
                                ))}
                            </List>
                        )}
                    </div>
                ) : (
                    <NavLink to={item.path} style={{ textDecoration: 'none', color: 'inherit', width: '100%' }} onClick={handleItemClick}>
                        {({ isActive }) => (
                            <ListItemButton selected={isActive}>
                                {item.icon && <ListItemDecorator>{item.icon}</ListItemDecorator>}
                                <ListItemContent>{item.name}</ListItemContent>
                            </ListItemButton>
                        )}
                    </NavLink>
                )}
            </ListItem>
        ));
    }, [openCategories, navigate, toggleCategory]);

    /**
     * Renders the entire content of the sidebar, including title and navigation list.
     * @param {boolean} isMobileView - Flag to adjust layout for mobile.
     */
    const renderSidebarContent = (isMobileView = false) => (
        <div>
            <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'space-between', mb: 1, mt: 0.5, pl: 1.5 }}>
                <Typography level='h4' letterSpacing={0.5}>Navigation</Typography>
                {!isMobileView && (<IconButton onClick={toggleSidebar} variant="plain" color="neutral" size="sm"><ChevronLeftIcon /></IconButton>)}
            </Box>
            <List sx={{ '--List-nestedInsetStart': '20px' }}>
                {loadingSidebar ? (
                    <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', p: 2 }}><CircularProgress size="sm" /></Box>
                ) : (
                    renderNavItems(sidebarItems, isMobileView)
                )}
                {isLoggedIn && renderNavItems([dynamicUserNavItems], isMobileView)}
                {isLoggedIn && isAdmin && renderNavItems([adminNavItem], isMobileView)}
            </List>
        </div>
    );

    // --- Main Component JSX ---
    return (
        <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', minHeight: '100vh' }}>
            {/* Desktop Sidebar */}
            <Sheet
                variant="outlined"
                sx={{
                    display: { xs: 'none', md: 'block' },
                    width: sidebarOpen ? SIDEBAR_WIDTH : 0,
                    minWidth: sidebarOpen ? SIDEBAR_WIDTH : 0,
                    height: '100vh',
                    position: 'sticky',
                    top: 0,
                    zIndex: 1100,
                    overflow: 'auto',
                    transition: 'width 0.3s ease, min-width 0.3s ease, opacity 0.3s ease',
                    boxShadow: 'md',
                    p: sidebarOpen ? 2 : 0,
                    opacity: sidebarOpen ? 1 : 0,
                    borderRight: '1px solid',
                    borderColor: 'divider',
                }}
            >
                {sidebarOpen && renderSidebarContent()}
            </Sheet>

            {/* Mobile Drawer */}
            <Drawer open={mobileDrawerOpen} onClose={() => setMobileDrawerOpen(false)} size="md">
                <Box sx={{ p: 2 }}>{renderSidebarContent(true)}</Box>
            </Drawer>

            {/* Main Content Area */}
            <Box component="main" sx={{ flexGrow: 1 }}>
                {/* Fixed Header */}
                <Box
                    ref={headerRef}
                    sx={{
                        position: 'fixed',
                        top: 0,
                        left: { xs: 0, md: sidebarOpen ? `${SIDEBAR_WIDTH}px` : 0 },
                        right: 0,
                        zIndex: 1000,
                        transition: 'left 0.3s ease',
                        display: 'flex',
                        alignItems: 'center',
                        justifyContent: 'space-between',
                        bgcolor: 'background.body',
                        p: { xs: 2, md: 3 },
                        borderBottom: '1px solid',
                        borderColor: 'divider',
                    }}
                >
                    {/* Header Left Section (Toggles & Search) */}
                    <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 1.5, flexShrink: 0, minWidth: { md: '200px' } }}>
                        {!isMobile && !sidebarOpen && (
                            <IconButton onClick={toggleSidebar} variant="plain" color="neutral" size="lg"><ChevronRightIcon /></IconButton>
                        )}
                        {isMobile && (
                            <IconButton onClick={toggleMobileDrawer} variant="plain" color="neutral" size="lg"><MenuIcon /></IconButton>
                        )}

                        <Input
                            size="md"
                            placeholder="Search..."
                            startDecorator={<SearchIcon />}
                            sx={{ display: 'inline-flex', width: { xs: 120, md: 'auto' }, mr: 0.5 }}
                            value={searchQuery}
                            onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
                            onKeyDown={handleSearch}
                        />
                    </Box>

                    {/* Header Center Section (Logo) */}
                    <Box sx={{ flexGrow: 1, display: { xs: 'none', sm: 'flex' }, alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center', gap: 1 }}>
                        <img src="/logo.png" alt="FlameWall Logo" style={{ width: '35px', height: '35px' }} />
                        <Typography fontWeight="lg" level="h2" component="div" letterSpacing={0.5}>FlameWall</Typography>
                    </Box>

                    {/* Header Right Section (User Actions) */}
                    <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', gap: { xs: 0.5, sm: 1.5 }, alignItems: 'center', flexShrink: 0, minWidth: { md: '200px' }, justifyContent: 'flex-end' }}>
                        {isLoggedIn ? (
                            <Stack direction="row" spacing={1.5} alignItems="center">
                                <Chip color="warning" variant="outlined" size="sm" startDecorator={<DiamondIcon sx={{ fontSize: 'md' }} />}>
                                    {user?.balance}
                                </Chip>
                                <NotificationBell />
                                <Dropdown>
                                    <MenuButton slots={{ root: Button }} slotProps={{ root: { variant: 'plain', color: 'neutral', size: 'md', startDecorator: <MinecraftAvatar user={user} /> } }}>
                                        <Typography sx={{ display: { xs: 'none', sm: 'inline' } }}>{user?.username}</Typography>
                                    </MenuButton>
                                    <Menu>
                                        <MenuItem component={NavLink} to="/profile/me">Profile</MenuItem>
                                        <MenuItem component={NavLink} to="/profile/settings">Settings</MenuItem>
                                        <Divider />
                                        <MenuItem onClick={handleLogout} sx={{ color: 'danger.500' }}><ListItemDecorator><LogoutIcon /></ListItemDecorator>Logout</MenuItem>
                                    </Menu>
                                </Dropdown>
                            </Stack>
                        ) : (
                            <Stack direction="row" spacing={1}>
                                <Button component={NavLink} to="/login" variant="outlined" color="primary" size="md">
                                    <Typography sx={{ display: { xs: 'none', sm: 'inline' } }}>Log in</Typography>
                                    <LoginIcon sx={{ display: { sm: 'none' } }} />
                                </Button>
                                <Button component={NavLink} to="/register" variant="solid" color="primary" size="md">
                                    <Typography sx={{ display: { xs: 'none', sm: 'inline' } }}>Register</Typography>
                                    <GroupAddIcon sx={{ display: { sm: 'none' } }} />
                                </Button>
                            </Stack>
                        )}
                    </Box>
                </Box>

                {/* Main Content (Child routes will be rendered here) */}
                <Box sx={{ pt: `calc(${headerHeight}px + 1.5rem)`, px: { xs: 2, md: 3 }, pb: { xs: 2, md: 3 } }}>
                    <Box sx={{ width: '100%', maxWidth: MAIN_CONTENT_MAX_WIDTH, mx: 'auto' }}>
                        {children}
                    </Box>
                </Box>
            </Box>
        </Box>
    );
};

export default CollapsiblePushSidebar;


--- END FILE: frontend/src/components/CollapsiblePushSidebar.jsx ---



--- START FILE: frontend/src/components/Comment.jsx ---

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Box, Typography, Avatar, Stack, Button, Textarea, IconButton, Dropdown, Menu, MenuButton, MenuItem } from '@mui/joy';
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';
import { formatDistanceToNow } from 'date-fns';
import { enUS, ru } from 'date-fns/locale';
import axios from 'axios';
import toast from 'react-hot-toast';
import { useMediaQuery, useTheme } from '@mui/material';

import { constructImageUrl } from '../utils/url';
import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext';
import ConfirmationModal from './ConfirmationModal';
import VoteButtons from './VoteButtons';
import SendIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Send';
import ReplyIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Reply';
import MoreVertIcon from '@mui/icons-material/MoreVert';
import EditIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Edit';
import DeleteForeverIcon from '@mui/icons-material/DeleteForever';

const INITIAL_VISIBLE_REPLIES = 2;

const Comment = ({ comment, onCommentAdded, onReplyClick }) => {
  const { user, authToken } = useAuth();
  const theme = useTheme();
  const isMobile = useMediaQuery(theme.breakpoints.down('sm'));

  const [isDesktopReplying, setIsDesktopReplying] = useState(false);
  const [desktopReplyContent, setDesktopReplyContent] = useState('');
  const [isEditing, setIsEditing] = useState(false);
  const [editedContent, setEditedContent] = useState('');
  const [isDeleteModalOpen, setDeleteModalOpen] = useState(false);
  const [isActionLoading, setIsActionLoading] = useState(false);
  const [visibleReplies, setVisibleReplies] = useState(INITIAL_VISIBLE_REPLIES);

  const isAuthorDeleted = !comment.author;
  const safeChildren = comment.children || [];
  const hasMoreReplies = safeChildren.length > visibleReplies;
  const canManage = user && (Number(user.id) === Number(comment.authorId) || user.rank?.power_level >= 800);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (isDesktopReplying) {
      setTimeout(() => document.getElementById(`desktop-reply-textarea-${comment.id}`)?.focus(), 0);
    }
  }, [isDesktopReplying, comment.id]);

  const handleDesktopReplySubmit = async () => {
    if (!desktopReplyContent.trim()) return;
    setIsActionLoading(true);
    try {
      await axios.post(`/api/posts/${comment.postId}/comments`, {
        content: desktopReplyContent,
        parentId: comment.id,
      }, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } });
      toast.success('Reply posted!');
      setDesktopReplyContent('');
      setIsDesktopReplying(false);
      onCommentAdded();
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to post reply.');
    } finally {
      setIsActionLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleVote = async (value) => {
    if (!user) return toast.error("Please log in to vote.");
    try {
      await axios.post(`/api/votes/comments/${comment.id}`, { value }, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } });
      onCommentAdded();
    } catch (err) {
      toast.error(err.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to vote.');
    }
  };

  const handleEdit = () => {
    setEditedContent(comment.content);
    setIsEditing(true);
  };

  const handleUpdate = async () => {
    setIsActionLoading(true);
    try {
      await axios.patch(`/api/comments/${comment.id}`, { content: editedContent }, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } });
      onCommentAdded();
      setIsEditing(false);
      toast.success("Comment updated!");
    } catch (err) {
      toast.error(err.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to update comment.');
    } finally {
      setIsActionLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleDelete = async () => {
    setIsActionLoading(true);
    try {
      await axios.delete(`/api/comments/${comment.id}`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } });
      toast.success("Comment deleted!");
      onCommentAdded();
    } catch (err) {
      toast.error(err.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to delete comment.');
    } finally {
      setIsActionLoading(false);
      setDeleteModalOpen(false);
    }
  };


  return (
    <>
      <Stack spacing={1.5} sx={{ width: '100%' }}>
        <Stack direction="row" spacing={2} alignItems="flex-start">
          {isAuthorDeleted ? <Avatar /> : <Link to={`/users/${comment.author.profile_slug || comment.author.id}`}><Avatar src={constructImageUrl(comment.author.pfp_url)} /></Link>}
          
          <Box sx={{ flex: 1 }}>
            <Stack direction="row" justifyContent="space-between" alignItems="flex-start">
              <Stack direction="row" spacing={1} alignItems="center">
                 {isAuthorDeleted ? (
                  <Typography level="title-lg" sx={{ fontStyle: 'italic', color: 'text.tertiary' }}>
                    [Deleted]
                  </Typography>
                ) : (
                  <Typography component={Link} to={`/users/${comment.author.profile_slug || comment.author.id}`} level="title-lg" sx={{ textDecoration: 'none', color: comment.author.rank?.display_color || 'text.primary' }}>
                    {comment.author.username}
                  </Typography>
                )}
                <Typography level="body-xs" textColor="text.tertiary">
                   {formatDistanceToNow(new Date(comment.createdAt), { addSuffix: true, locale: enUS })}
                </Typography>
              </Stack>

              {user && canManage && (
                <Dropdown>
                  <MenuButton slots={{ root: IconButton }} slotProps={{ root: { variant: 'plain', color: 'neutral', size: 'sm', sx: { mt: -0.5 } } }}>
                    <MoreVertIcon />
                  </MenuButton>
                  <Menu size="sm">
                    <MenuItem onClick={handleEdit}><EditIcon /> Edit</MenuItem>
                    <MenuItem color="danger" onClick={() => setDeleteModalOpen(true)}><DeleteForeverIcon /> Delete</MenuItem>
                  </Menu>
                </Dropdown>
              )}
            </Stack>

            {isEditing ? (
              <Stack spacing={1} sx={{ mt: 1 }}>
                <Textarea value={editedContent} onChange={(e) => setEditedContent(e.target.value)} minRows={2} autoFocus />
                <Stack direction="row" spacing={1} sx={{ alignSelf: 'flex-end' }}>
                  <Button size="sm" variant="plain" color="neutral" onClick={() => setIsEditing(false)}>Cancel</Button>
                  <Button size="sm" variant="solid" color="primary" onClick={handleUpdate} loading={isActionLoading}>Save</Button>
                </Stack>
              </Stack>
            ) : (
              <>
                <Typography level="body-md" sx={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap', wordBreak: 'break-word' }}>
                  {comment.content}
                </Typography>
                
                <Stack direction="row" spacing={2} alignItems="center" sx={{ mt: 1 }}>
                   <VoteButtons
                    initialScore={comment.score}
                    currentUserVote={comment.currentUserVote}
                    onVote={handleVote}
                    disabled={!user || isAuthorDeleted}
                  />
                  {user && !isAuthorDeleted && (
                    <Button
                      size="sm"
                      variant="plain"
                      color="primary"
                      startDecorator={<ReplyIcon />}
                      onClick={() => {
                        if (isMobile) {
                          onReplyClick(comment);
                        } else {
                          setIsDesktopReplying(!isDesktopReplying);
                        }
                      }}
                      sx={{ p: 0.5 }}
                    >
                      Reply
                    </Button>
                  )}
                </Stack>
              </>
            )}
          </Box>
        </Stack>
        
        {isDesktopReplying && !isMobile && (
            <Stack direction="row" spacing={1} sx={{ pl: '56px' }}>
            <Textarea
                id={`desktop-reply-textarea-${comment.id}`}
                value={desktopReplyContent}
                onChange={(e) => setDesktopReplyContent(e.target.value)}
                placeholder={`Replying to ${isAuthorDeleted ? '[Deleted User]' : comment.author.username}...`}
                onKeyDown={(e) => {
                    if (e.key === 'Enter' && !e.shiftKey) {
                        e.preventDefault();
                        handleDesktopReplySubmit();
                    }
                }}
                minRows={1}
                sx={{ flex: 1 }}
            />
            <IconButton onClick={handleDesktopReplySubmit} loading={isActionLoading} variant="solid" color="primary">
                <SendIcon />
            </IconButton>
            </Stack>
        )}

        {safeChildren.length > 0 && (
          <Box sx={{ pl: '28px', borderLeft: '2px solid', borderColor: 'divider', ml: '20px' }}>
            <Stack spacing={2} sx={{ pt: 1.5 }}>
              {safeChildren.slice(0, visibleReplies).map(childComment => (
                <Comment
                    key={childComment.id}
                    comment={childComment}
                    onCommentAdded={onCommentAdded}
                    onReplyClick={onReplyClick}
                />
              ))}
              {hasMoreReplies && (
                <Button variant="plain" onClick={() => setVisibleReplies(safeChildren.length)}>
                  Show {safeChildren.length - visibleReplies} more replies
                </Button>
              )}
            </Stack>
          </Box>
        )}
      </Stack>

      <ConfirmationModal
        open={isDeleteModalOpen}
        onClose={() => setDeleteModalOpen(false)}
        onConfirm={handleDelete}
        title="Confirm Deletion"
        content="Are you sure you want to permanently delete this comment? This action cannot be undone."
        confirmText="Delete"
        confirmColor="danger"
        loading={isActionLoading}
      />
    </>
  );
};

export default Comment;
--- END FILE: frontend/src/components/Comment.jsx ---



--- START FILE: frontend/src/components/ConfirmationModal.jsx ---

// frontend/src/components/ConfirmationModal.js
import React from 'react';
import { Modal, ModalDialog, Typography, Box, Button, Divider } from '@mui/joy';
import WarningAmberIcon from '@mui/icons-material/WarningAmber';

/**
 * A reusable confirmation modal dialog.
 * @param {object} props
 * @param {boolean} props.open - Whether the modal is open.
 * @param {function} props.onClose - Function to call when the modal is closed (e.g., by clicking the 'Cancel' button or outside).
 * @param {function} props.onConfirm - Function to call when the confirmation button is clicked.
 * @param {string} props.title - The title of the modal dialog.
 * @param {string|React.ReactNode} props.content - The main text or content of the modal.
 * @param {string} [props.confirmText='Confirm'] - The text for the confirmation button.
 * @param {'primary'|'danger'|'success'|'warning'|'neutral'} [props.confirmColor='primary'] - The color of the confirmation button.
 * @param {boolean} [props.loading=false] - If true, shows a loading spinner on the confirm button.
 */
function ConfirmationModal({
  open,
  onClose,
  onConfirm,
  title,
  content,
  confirmText = 'Confirm',
  confirmColor = 'primary',
  loading = false,
}) {
  return (
    <Modal open={open} onClose={onClose}>
      <ModalDialog
        variant="outlined"
        role="alertdialog"
        sx={{ minWidth: { xs: 'calc(100% - 32px)', sm: 400 } }}
      >
        <Typography
          component="h2"
          level="h4"
          startDecorator={<WarningAmberIcon />}
          textColor={`${confirmColor}.500`}
        >
          {title}
        </Typography>
        <Divider sx={{ my: 2 }} />
        <Typography textColor="text.secondary">{content}</Typography>
        <Box
          sx={{ display: 'flex', gap: 2, justifyContent: 'flex-end', mt: 3 }}
        >
          <Button variant="plain" color="neutral" onClick={onClose}>
            Cancel
          </Button>
          <Button
            variant="solid"
            color={confirmColor}
            loading={loading}
            onClick={onConfirm}
          >
            {confirmText}
          </Button>
        </Box>
      </ModalDialog>
    </Modal>
  );
}

export default ConfirmationModal;
--- END FILE: frontend/src/components/ConfirmationModal.jsx ---



--- START FILE: frontend/src/components/GlobalChatWidget.jsx ---

// frontend/src/components/GlobalChatWidget.js

import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef, useCallback } from 'react';
import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext';
import {
    Box, Typography, Sheet, List, ListItem, Avatar, Textarea, IconButton,
    Link as JoyLink, Badge, Tooltip, Stack, useTheme
} from '@mui/joy';
import { useMediaQuery } from '@mui/material';
import { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'framer-motion';
import ChatIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Chat';
import CloseIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Close';
import SendIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Send';
import ReplyIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Reply';
import DragIndicatorIcon from '@mui/icons-material/DragIndicator';
import OpenInFullIcon from '@mui/icons-material/OpenInFull';
import { constructImageUrl } from '../utils/url';
import { Link as RouterLink } from 'react-router-dom';


const MessageBubble = ({ msg, onReply, onReplyLinkClick, isHighlighted }) => (
    <ListItem
        id={`msg-${msg.id}`}
        sx={{
            backgroundColor: isHighlighted ? 'rgba(144, 202, 249, 0.12)' : undefined,
            display: 'flex',
            alignItems: 'flex-start',
            gap: 1.5,
            py: 0.75,
            mx: -1.5,
            px: 1.5,
            borderRadius: 0,
            transition: 'background-color 0.2s ease-in-out',
        }}
    >
        <Avatar src={constructImageUrl(msg.author?.pfp_url)} size="sm" />
        <Stack sx={{ flexGrow: 1, minWidth: 0 }}>
            <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'center' }}>
                <JoyLink
                    component={RouterLink}
                    to={`/users/${msg.author?.profile_slug || msg.author?.id}`}
                    sx={{ color: msg.author?.rank?.display_color || 'inherit', fontWeight: 'lg' }}
                >
                    {msg.author?.username || 'System'}
                </JoyLink>
                <IconButton size="sm" variant="plain" onClick={() => onReply(msg)} sx={{ mt: -0.5, mr: -0.5 }}>
                    <ReplyIcon fontSize="sm" />
                </IconButton>
            </Box>

            {msg.parent && (
                <JoyLink
                    onClick={(e) => onReplyLinkClick(e, msg.parent.id)}
                    href={`#msg-${msg.parent.id}`}
                    sx={{ textDecoration: 'none', color: 'inherit', my: 0.5 }}
                >
                    <Sheet variant="soft" sx={{ p: 1, borderRadius: 'sm', borderLeft: '2px solid', borderColor: 'divider', '&:hover': { bgcolor: 'background.level2' } }}>
                        <Stack spacing={0.25}>
                             <Typography level="body-sm" fontWeight="lg">{msg.parent.author?.username}</Typography>
                             <Typography level="body-xs" sx={{ opacity: 0.8, fontStyle: 'italic', whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap', wordBreak: 'break-word' }}>
                                 {msg.parent.content}
                            </Typography>
                        </Stack>
                    </Sheet>
                </JoyLink>
            )}

            <Typography level="body-md" sx={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap', wordBreak: 'break-word' }}>
                {msg.content}
            </Typography>
        </Stack>
    </ListItem>
);

function GlobalChatWidget() {
    const { socket, isLoggedIn } = useAuth();
    const theme = useTheme();
    const isMobile = useMediaQuery(theme.breakpoints.down('sm')); 

    const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);
    const [messages, setMessages] = useState([]);
    const [newMessage, setNewMessage] = useState('');
    const [unread, setUnread] = useState(0);
    const messagesEndRef = useRef(null);
    const [replyingTo, setReplyingTo] = useState(null);
    const [highlightedMessageId, setHighlightedMessageId] = useState(null);
    const scrollContainerRef = useRef(null);
    const [shouldAutoScroll, setShouldAutoScroll] = useState(true);
    
    const [dimensions, setDimensions] = useState({ width: 400, height: Math.min(600, window.innerHeight * 0.7) });
    const [isDragging, setIsDragging] = useState(false);
    const dragStartPos = useRef({ x: 0, y: 0 });
    const dragStartSize = useRef({ width: 0, height: 0 });


    useEffect(() => {
        if (!socket || !isLoggedIn) return;
        const handleHistory = (history) => {
            if (history) setMessages(history.reverse());
        };
        const handleNewMessage = (message) => {
            setMessages(prev => [...prev, message]);
            if (!isOpen) {
                setUnread(prev => prev + 1);
            }
        };
        socket.on('globalChatHistory', handleHistory);
        socket.on('newGlobalMessage', handleNewMessage);
        return () => {
            socket.off('globalChatHistory', handleHistory);
            socket.off('newGlobalMessage', handleNewMessage);
        };
    }, [socket, isLoggedIn, isOpen]);

    useEffect(() => {
        const container = scrollContainerRef.current;
        if (!isOpen || !container) return;
        if (shouldAutoScroll) {
            messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
        }
    }, [messages, isOpen, shouldAutoScroll]);

    const handleScroll = () => {
        const container = scrollContainerRef.current;
        if (!container) return;
        const isAtBottom = container.scrollTop + container.clientHeight >= container.scrollHeight - 10;
        setShouldAutoScroll(isAtBottom);
    };
    
    const handleSendMessage = (e) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        if (newMessage.trim() && socket) {
            const payload = {
                content: newMessage,
                parentId: replyingTo ? replyingTo.id : undefined,
            };
            socket.emit('sendGlobalMessage', payload);
            setNewMessage('');
            setReplyingTo(null);
            setShouldAutoScroll(true);
        }
    };
    
    const handleReplyLinkClick = (event, messageId) => {
        event.preventDefault(); 
        const element = document.getElementById(`msg-${messageId}`);
        if (element) {
            element.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' });
            setHighlightedMessageId(messageId);
            setTimeout(() => { setHighlightedMessageId(null); }, 1500);
        }
    };
    
    const toggleChat = () => {
        setIsOpen(!isOpen);
        if (!isOpen) {
            setUnread(0);
        } else {
            setReplyingTo(null);
        }
    };
    
    const handleDragMove = useCallback((e) => {
        if (!isDragging) return;
        const dx = e.clientX - dragStartPos.current.x;
        const dy = e.clientY - dragStartPos.current.y;
        
        let newWidth = dragStartSize.current.width - dx;
        let newHeight = dragStartSize.current.height - dy;

        // Ограничения
        if (newWidth < 300) newWidth = 300;
        if (newHeight < 250) newHeight = 250;
        if (newWidth > window.innerWidth - 40) newWidth = window.innerWidth - 40;
        if (newHeight > window.innerHeight - 100) newHeight = window.innerHeight - 100;

        setDimensions({ width: newWidth, height: newHeight });
    }, [isDragging]);

    const handleDragEnd = useCallback(() => {
        setIsDragging(false);
    }, []);
    
    const handleDragStart = useCallback((e) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        setIsDragging(true);
        dragStartPos.current = { x: e.clientX, y: e.clientY };
        dragStartSize.current = { ...dimensions };
    }, [dimensions]);

    useEffect(() => {
        if (isDragging) {
            window.addEventListener('mousemove', handleDragMove);
            window.addEventListener('mouseup', handleDragEnd);
        }
        return () => {
            window.removeEventListener('mousemove', handleDragMove);
            window.removeEventListener('mouseup', handleDragEnd);
        };
    }, [isDragging, handleDragMove, handleDragEnd]);


        useEffect(() => {
        const root = document.documentElement;
        // Высота виджета в свернутом виде (с учетом паддингов и текста) примерно 40px
        const WIDGET_CLOSED_HEIGHT = '40px'; 
        
        // Если виджет свернут и мы на мобильном устройстве...
        if (!isOpen && isMobile) {
            // ...устанавливаем CSS-переменную --chat-widget-height
            root.style.setProperty('--chat-widget-height', WIDGET_CLOSED_HEIGHT);
        } else {
            // ...иначе, сбрасываем ее в 0
            root.style.setProperty('--chat-widget-height', '0px');
        }

        // Очистка при размонтировании компонента
        return () => {
            root.style.setProperty('--chat-widget-height', '0px');
        };
    }, [isOpen, isMobile]); // Этот эффект будет срабатывать при изменении состояния виджета или типа устройства

    if (!isLoggedIn) {
        return null;
    }

    const motionDivStyle = isMobile ? {
        position: 'fixed',
        bottom: 0,
        left: 0,
        zIndex: 1250, 
        width: '100vw',
        height: '100dvh', 
    } : {
        position: 'fixed',
        bottom: 90,
        right: 24,
        zIndex: 1199,
        width: dimensions.width,
        height: dimensions.height,
    };

    return (
        <>
            {isMobile ? (
                <AnimatePresence>
                {!isOpen && (
                    <motion.div initial={{ y: '100%' }} animate={{ y: 0 }} exit={{ y: '100%' }} transition={{ ease: 'easeInOut' }}>
                        <Sheet
                            variant="solid"
                            color="primary"
                            onClick={toggleChat}
                            sx={{
                                position: 'fixed',
                                bottom: 0,
                                left: 0,
                                right: 0,
                                zIndex: 1200,
                                p: 1,
                                display: 'flex',
                                justifyContent: 'space-between',
                                alignItems: 'center',
                                cursor: 'pointer',
                            }}
                        >
                            <Typography startDecorator={<Badge badgeContent={unread} color="danger"><ChatIcon /></Badge>} sx={{ml: 1}}>
                                Global Chat
                            </Typography>
                            <OpenInFullIcon />
                        </Sheet>
                    </motion.div>
                )}
                </AnimatePresence>

            ) : (
                <Box sx={{ position: 'fixed', bottom: 24, right: 24, zIndex: 1200 }}>
                    <Tooltip title="Global Chat" variant="outlined">
                        <Badge badgeContent={unread} color="danger">
                            <IconButton color="primary" size="lg" variant="solid" onClick={toggleChat} sx={{ borderRadius: '50%', boxShadow: 'lg' }}>
                                {isOpen ? <CloseIcon /> : <ChatIcon />}
                            </IconButton>
                        </Badge>
                    </Tooltip>
                </Box>
            )}

            <AnimatePresence>
                {isOpen && (
                    <motion.div
                        initial={isMobile ? { y: '100%', opacity: 0 } : { y: 30, opacity: 0 }}
                        animate={{ y: 0, opacity: 1 }}
                        exit={isMobile ? { y: '100%', opacity: 0 } : { y: 30, opacity: 0 }}
                        transition={{ ease: 'easeInOut', duration: 0.3 }}
                        style={motionDivStyle}
                    >
                        <Sheet variant="outlined" sx={{ height: '100%', borderRadius: isMobile ? 0 : 'lg', boxShadow: 'lg', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column' }}>
                            {/* [!code focus start] */}
                            {/* --- НАЧАЛО ИЗМЕНЕНИЙ В ЗАГОЛОВКЕ --- */}
                            <Box sx={{ p: 1.5, borderBottom: '1px solid', borderColor: 'divider', display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'center' }}>
                                <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 1.5 }}>
                                     {!isMobile && (
                                        <Box onMouseDown={handleDragStart} sx={{ cursor: 'nwse-resize', color: 'text.tertiary', display: 'flex' }}>
                                            <DragIndicatorIcon />
                                        </Box>
                                    )}
                                    <Typography level="title-md">Global Chat</Typography>
                                </Box>
                                
                                {isMobile && (
                                    <IconButton onClick={toggleChat}><CloseIcon/></IconButton>
                                )}
                            </Box>
                            {/* --- КОНЕЦ ИЗМЕНЕНИЙ В ЗАГОЛОВКЕ --- */}
                            {/* [!code focus end] */}

                            <List
                                ref={scrollContainerRef}
                                onScroll={handleScroll}
                                sx={{ p: 1.5, overflowY: 'auto', flexGrow: 1, display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', gap: 1 }}
                            >
                                {messages.map(msg =>
                                    <MessageBubble
                                        key={msg.id}
                                        msg={msg}
                                        onReply={setReplyingTo}
                                        onReplyLinkClick={handleReplyLinkClick}
                                        isHighlighted={highlightedMessageId === msg.id}
                                    />
                                )}
                                <div ref={messagesEndRef} />
                            </List>
                            <Box component="form" onSubmit={handleSendMessage} sx={{ p: 1, borderTop: '1px solid', borderColor: 'divider' }}>
                                {replyingTo && (
                                    <Sheet variant="soft" sx={{ p: 0.5, mb: 1, borderRadius: 'sm', display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'center' }}>
                                        <Box sx={{ overflow: 'hidden' }}>
                                            <Typography level="body-xs">Replying to {replyingTo.author?.username}</Typography>
                                            <Typography noWrap level="body-xs" sx={{ opacity: 0.7 }}>{replyingTo.content}</Typography>
                                        </Box>
                                        <IconButton size="sm" variant="plain" onClick={() => setReplyingTo(null)}>
                                            <CloseIcon />
                                        </IconButton>
                                    </Sheet>
                                )}
                                <Textarea
                                    value={newMessage}
                                    onChange={(e) => setNewMessage(e.target.value)}
                                    placeholder="Type a message..."
                                    onKeyDown={(e) => { if (e.key === 'Enter' && !e.shiftKey) { handleSendMessage(e); }}}
                                    endDecorator={
                                        <IconButton type="submit" disabled={!newMessage.trim()}>
                                            <SendIcon />
                                        </IconButton>
                                    }
                                />
                            </Box>
                        </Sheet>
                    </motion.div>
                )}
            </AnimatePresence>
        </>
    );
}

export default GlobalChatWidget;
--- END FILE: frontend/src/components/GlobalChatWidget.jsx ---



--- START FILE: frontend/src/components/ImageCropperModal.jsx ---

// frontend/src/components/ImageCropperModal.jsx

import React, { useState, useRef } from 'react';
import { Modal, ModalDialog, ModalClose, Typography, Box, Button, Slider, Stack, FormControl, FormLabel } from '@mui/joy';
import ReactCrop, { centerCrop, makeAspectCrop } from 'react-image-crop';
import 'react-image-crop/dist/ReactCrop.css'; // Важно импортировать стили

/**
 * Вспомогательная функция для получения обрезанного изображения
 * @param {HTMLImageElement} image - Исходное изображение
 * @param {object} crop - Объект с данными обрезки в пикселях
 * @returns {Promise<Blob>} - Обрезанное изображение в виде Blob
 */
function getCroppedImg(image, crop) {
  const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
  const scaleX = image.naturalWidth / image.width;
  const scaleY = image.naturalHeight / image.height;
  canvas.width = crop.width;
  canvas.height = crop.height;
  const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

  ctx.drawImage(
    image,
    crop.x * scaleX,
    crop.y * scaleY,
    crop.width * scaleX,
    crop.height * scaleY,
    0,
    0,
    crop.width,
    crop.height
  );

  return new Promise((resolve) => {
    canvas.toBlob((blob) => {
      resolve(blob);
    }, 'image/png'); // Можно использовать 'image/jpeg' для меньшего размера файла
  });
}


function ImageCropperModal({ open, onClose, imageSrc, onCropComplete, aspect = 1 }) {
  const [crop, setCrop] = useState();
  const [completedCrop, setCompletedCrop] = useState(null);
  const [zoom, setZoom] = useState(1);
  const imgRef = useRef(null);

  // Вызывается при загрузке изображения в редактор, чтобы задать начальную область обрезки
  function onImageLoad(e) {
    const { width, height } = e.currentTarget;
    const crop = centerCrop(
      makeAspectCrop(
        {
          unit: '%',
          width: 90,
        },
        aspect,
        width,
        height
      ),
      width,
      height
    );
    setCrop(crop);
    setCompletedCrop(crop); // Устанавливаем и завершенный кроп для первоначального отображения
    return false; // Возвращаем false, чтобы предотвратить сброс кропа библиотекой
  }

  // Обработчик нажатия на кнопку "Сохранить"
  const handleConfirmCrop = async () => {
    if (!completedCrop || !imgRef.current) {
      return;
    }
    const croppedImageBlob = await getCroppedImg(imgRef.current, completedCrop);
    onCropComplete(croppedImageBlob);
  };
  
  return (
    <Modal open={open} onClose={onClose}>
      <ModalDialog sx={{ minWidth: {xs: '90vw', sm: 500, md: 600} }}>
        <ModalClose />
        <Typography level="h4">Crop your Image</Typography>
        <Typography textColor="text.tertiary" sx={{mt: 1, mb: 2}}>
            Drag to select the area you want to keep.
        </Typography>

        {imageSrc && (
          <ReactCrop
            crop={crop}
            onChange={(_, percentCrop) => setCrop(percentCrop)}
            onComplete={(c) => setCompletedCrop(c)}
            aspect={aspect}
            minWidth={100}
            minHeight={100}
          >
            <img
              ref={imgRef}
              src={imageSrc}
              alt="Crop me"
              onLoad={onImageLoad}
              style={{
                transform: `scale(${zoom})`,
                maxHeight: '60vh', // Ограничиваем высоту, чтобы помещалось на экране
              }}
            />
          </ReactCrop>
        )}
        
        <Stack spacing={2} sx={{ mt: 2 }}>
            <FormControl>
                <FormLabel>Zoom</FormLabel>
                <Slider
                    value={zoom}
                    onChange={(e, newValue) => setZoom(newValue)}
                    min={1}
                    max={3}
                    step={0.1}
                    aria-labelledby="zoom-slider"
                />
            </FormControl>
        
            <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', gap: 2, justifyContent: 'flex-end', mt: 2 }}>
                <Button variant="plain" color="neutral" onClick={onClose}>
                    Cancel
                </Button>
                <Button onClick={handleConfirmCrop}>Save</Button>
            </Box>
        </Stack>
      </ModalDialog>
    </Modal>
  );
}

export default ImageCropperModal;
--- END FILE: frontend/src/components/ImageCropperModal.jsx ---



--- START FILE: frontend/src/components/JoyPagination.jsx ---
