    Autocomplete, ToggleButtonGroup, Avatar
} from '@mui/joy';
import AddIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Add';
import SaveIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Save';
import DeleteForeverIcon from '@mui/icons-material/DeleteForever';
import VideogameAssetIcon from '@mui/icons-material/VideogameAsset';
import WebIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Web';
import QueryStatsIcon from '@mui/icons-material/QueryStats';
import UpdateIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Update';
import ImageIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Image';
import AchievementCard from '../components/AchievementCard';
import toast from 'react-hot-toast';
import { constructImageUrl } from '../utils/url';

const ConditionBlock = ({ condition, index, onUpdate, onRemove, configData, onUpdateCheck, onAddCheck, onRemoveCheck, serverGroups }) => {
    const generateConditionTitle = () => {
        if (condition.alias) {
            return condition.alias;
        }
        if (condition.trigger === 'PAPI_STAT_CHECK' && condition.target) {
            return condition.target;
        }
        if (condition.specific_target) {
            return condition.specific_target.split(':').pop();
        }
        if (condition.target) {
            return condition.target.split(':')[1];
        }
        return '';
    };
    const summary = generateConditionTitle();
    const handleInputChange = (field, value) => {
        if (field === 'target') {
            onUpdate(index, { ...condition, target: value, specific_target: '' });
        } else {
            onUpdate(index, { ...condition, [field]: value });
        }
    };

    const handleServerGroupsChange = (event, newValue) => {
        // newValue будет массивом выбранных строк, например ['survival', 'creative']
        onUpdate(index, { ...condition, server_groups: newValue });
    };

    const getEventSubtypes = (baseTrigger) => {
        if (!baseTrigger || !configData.targets) return [];
        return Object.keys(configData.targets).filter(key => key.startsWith(baseTrigger + ":"));
    };
    const getSpecificTargetsForEvent = (eventType) => {
        if (!eventType || !configData.targets[eventType]) return [];
        const targetGroups = configData.targets[eventType];
        let options = [];
        for (const groupName in targetGroups) {
            options = options.concat(targetGroups[groupName]);
        }
        return options.map(opt => ({
            label: opt.split(':').pop(),
            value: opt
        })).sort((a, b) => a.label.localeCompare(b.label));
    };

    const specificTargetOptions = getSpecificTargetsForEvent(condition.target);
    const selectedSpecificTarget = specificTargetOptions.find(opt => opt.value === condition.specific_target) || null;

    return (
        <Sheet variant="outlined" sx={{ p: 2, borderRadius: 'md', position: 'relative' }}>
            <IconButton size="sm" variant="plain" color="danger" onClick={() => onRemove(index)} sx={{ position: 'absolute', top: 8, right: 8 }}><DeleteForeverIcon /></IconButton>
            <Stack spacing={2}>
                <Typography level="title-md">
                    Condition #{index + 1}: <Typography color="primary">{condition.trigger}</Typography>
                    {summary && <Typography color="text.tertiary" sx={{ pl: 1 }}>{`— ${summary}`}</Typography>}
                </Typography>
                <FormControl>
                    <FormLabel>Short Description (Optional)</FormLabel>
                    <Input
                        name="alias"
                        placeholder="e.g., Kill a Zombie or Break a Diamond Block"
                        value={condition.alias || ''}
                        onChange={(e) => handleInputChange('alias', e.target.value)}
                    />
                </FormControl>
                {condition.trigger === 'PERIODIC_CHECK' && (
                    <FormControl required>
                        <FormLabel>Check Interval (in seconds)</FormLabel>
                        <Input type="number" value={condition.interval_seconds || 60} onChange={(e) => handleInputChange('interval_seconds', parseInt(e.target.value, 10) || 60)} sx={{ maxWidth: 200 }} />
                    </FormControl>
                )}

                {condition.trigger === 'PAPI_STAT_CHECK' && (
                    <Stack spacing={1.5}>
                        <FormControl><FormLabel>Placeholder</FormLabel><Input placeholder="%statistic_player_kills%" value={condition.target || ''} onChange={(e) => handleInputChange('target', e.target.value)} /></FormControl>
                        <Stack direction="row" spacing={2}>
                            <FormControl sx={{ flex: 1 }}><FormLabel>Operator</FormLabel>
                                <Select value={condition.operator || '>='} onChange={(e, val) => handleInputChange('operator', val)}><Option value=">=">&gt;= (greater/equal)</Option><Option value="<=">&lt;= (less/equal)</Option><Option value="==">== (equals)</Option></Select>
                            </FormControl>
                            <FormControl required sx={{ flex: 1 }}><FormLabel>Required Value</FormLabel><Input type="number" value={condition.count || 1} onChange={(e) => handleInputChange('count', parseInt(e.target.value, 10) || 1)} /></FormControl>
                        </Stack>
                    </Stack>
                )}



                {(condition.trigger === 'GAME_EVENT' || condition.trigger === 'WEBSITE_EVENT') && (
                    <Stack spacing={1.5}>
                        <FormControl><FormLabel>Event Type</FormLabel>
                            <Select placeholder="Select an event..." value={condition.target || ''} onChange={(e, val) => handleInputChange('target', val)}>
                                {getEventSubtypes(condition.trigger).map(subtype => (<Option key={subtype} value={subtype}>{subtype.split(':')[1]}</Option>))}
                            </Select>
                        </FormControl>
                        {specificTargetOptions.length > 0 && (
                            <FormControl required>
                                <FormLabel>Specific Target (block, mob, item)</FormLabel>
                                <Autocomplete
                                    placeholder="Start typing a name..."
                                    options={specificTargetOptions}
                                    getOptionLabel={(option) => option.label}
                                    value={selectedSpecificTarget}
                                    onChange={(event, newValue) => {
                                        handleInputChange('specific_target', newValue ? newValue.value : '');
                                    }}
                                />
                            </FormControl>
                        )}
                        <FormControl required><FormLabel>Required Amount</FormLabel><Input type="number" value={condition.count || 1} onChange={(e) => handleInputChange('count', parseInt(e.target.value, 10) || 1)} sx={{ maxWidth: 200 }} /></FormControl>
                    </Stack>
                )}

                <FormControl>
                    <FormLabel>Track on Server Groups (Optional)</FormLabel>
                    <Autocomplete
                        multiple
                        freeSolo // <-- ЭТО РАЗРЕШАЕТ РУЧНОЙ ВВОД
                        options={serverGroups || []} // Используем динамический список
                        value={condition.server_groups || []}
                        onChange={handleServerGroupsChange}
                        placeholder="All servers"
                    />
                </FormControl>

                {(condition.trigger === 'GAME_EVENT' || condition.trigger === 'PERIODIC_CHECK') && (
                    <>
                        {condition.trigger === 'PERIODIC_CHECK' && (
                            <FormControl><FormLabel>Required Completions</FormLabel><Input type="number" value={condition.count || 1} onChange={(e) => handleInputChange('count', parseInt(e.target.value, 10) || 1)} sx={{ maxWidth: 200 }} /></FormControl>
                        )}
                        <Divider /><Typography level="body-sm">Context Checks:</Typography>
                        <Stack spacing={1}>
                            {(condition.checks || []).map((check, checkIndex) => (
                                <CheckRow key={checkIndex} check={check} index={checkIndex} conditionIndex={index} onUpdate={onUpdateCheck} onRemove={onRemoveCheck} />
                            ))}
                        </Stack>
                        <Button size="sm" variant="outlined" color="neutral" startDecorator={<AddIcon />} sx={{ mt: 1, alignSelf: 'flex-start' }} onClick={() => onAddCheck(index)}>Add Check</Button>
                    </>
                )}
            </Stack>
        </Sheet>
    );
};

const CheckRow = ({ check, index, conditionIndex, onUpdate, onRemove }) => {
    const handleCheckChange = (field, value) => {
        onUpdate(conditionIndex, { ...check, [field]: value }, index);
    };
    return (
        <Stack direction="row" spacing={1} alignItems="center">
            <Input size="sm" placeholder="Source (e.g., player)" value={check.source || ''} onChange={(e) => handleCheckChange('source', e.target.value)} sx={{ flex: 1 }} />
            <Input size="sm" placeholder="Property (e.g., main_hand.type)" value={check.property || ''} onChange={(e) => handleCheckChange('property', e.target.value)} sx={{ flex: 1 }} />
            <Select size="sm" value={check.operator || '=='} onChange={(e, val) => handleCheckChange('operator', val)}>
                <Option value="==">== (equals)</Option>
                <Option value=">=">&gt;= (greater/equal)</Option>
                <Option value="<=">&lt;= (less/equal)</Option>
                <Option value="contains">contains</Option>
            </Select>
            <Input size="sm" placeholder="Value" value={check.value || ''} onChange={(e) => handleCheckChange('value', e.target.value)} sx={{ flex: 1 }} />
            <IconButton size="sm" variant="plain" color="danger" onClick={() => onRemove(conditionIndex, index)}>
                <DeleteForeverIcon />
            </IconButton>
        </Stack>
    );
};
const BlockPalette = ({ triggers, loading, onSelectTrigger }) => {
    const triggerIcons = {
        'GAME_EVENT': <VideogameAssetIcon color="success" />, 'PERIODIC_CHECK': <UpdateIcon color="neutral" />,
        'PAPI_STAT_CHECK': <QueryStatsIcon color="warning" />, 'WEBSITE_EVENT': <WebIcon color="primary" />,
        'POST_CREATED': <WebIcon sx={{ fontSize: 'md', color: 'primary.300' }} />, 'COMMENT_CREATED': <WebIcon sx={{ fontSize: 'md', color: 'primary.300' }} />,
        'FRIEND_ADDED': <WebIcon sx={{ fontSize: 'md', color: 'primary.300' }} />, 'REPUTATION_CHANGED': <WebIcon sx={{ fontSize: 'md', color: 'primary.300' }} />,
    };
    const mainCategories = ['GAME_EVENT', 'PERIODIC_CHECK', 'PAPI_STAT_CHECK'];
    const websiteTriggers = (triggers || []).filter(t => !mainCategories.includes(t) && t !== 'WEBSITE_EVENT' && t !== 'CUSTOM_API_TRIGGER');
    return (
        <Sheet variant="outlined" sx={{ p: 2, borderRadius: 'sm', height: '100%' }}>
            <Typography level="title-lg" sx={{ mb: 2 }}>Toolbox</Typography>
            {loading ? <CircularProgress size="sm" /> : (
                <Stack spacing={1}>
                    <Typography level="body-xs" sx={{ textTransform: 'uppercase', fontWeight: 'lg' }}>Core Triggers</Typography>
                    {mainCategories.map(triggerName => (<TriggerBlock key={triggerName} name={triggerName} icon={triggerIcons[triggerName]} onSelect={() => onSelectTrigger(triggerName)} />))}
                    {websiteTriggers.length > 0 && <Divider sx={{ my: 1 }}><Typography level="body-xs">Website Events</Typography></Divider>}
                    {websiteTriggers.map(triggerName => (
                        <TriggerBlock key={triggerName} name={triggerName} icon={triggerIcons[triggerName]} onSelect={() => onSelectTrigger('WEBSITE_EVENT', triggerName)} />
                    ))}
                </Stack>
            )}
        </Sheet>
    );
};
const TriggerBlock = ({ name, icon, onSelect }) => (
    <Sheet onClick={onSelect} variant="soft" sx={{ p: 1, borderRadius: 'sm', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 1, cursor: 'pointer', '&:hover': { bgcolor: 'background.level2' } }}>
        {icon}
        <Typography level="body-sm">{name}</Typography>
    </Sheet>
);
const SettingsAndPreview = ({ achievementData, onUpdate, allGroups, onGroupChange, authToken }) => {
    const handleChange = (e) => onUpdate(prev => ({ ...prev, [e.target.name]: e.target.value }));
    const previewData = { ...achievementData, name: achievementData.name || "Name", description: achievementData.description || "Description..." };
    const fileInputRef = useRef(null);

    const handleIconUpload = async (event) => {
        const file = event.target.files[0];
        if (!file) return;

        const formData = new FormData();
        formData.append('file', file);

        let toastId;
        try {
            toastId = toast.loading('Uploading icon...');
            const response = await axios.post('/api/media/achievement-icon', formData, {
                headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` },
            });
            onUpdate(prev => ({ ...prev, icon_url: response.data.url }));
            toast.success('Icon uploaded!', { id: toastId });
        } catch (error) {
            toast.error('Icon upload failed.', { id: toastId });
            console.error('Icon upload failed:', error);
        }
    };

    return (
        <Sheet variant="outlined" sx={{ p: 2, borderRadius: 'sm', height: '100%' }}>
            <Typography level="title-lg" sx={{ mb: 2 }}>Settings & Preview</Typography>
            <Stack spacing={2}>
                <FormControl required><FormLabel>Name</FormLabel><Input name="name" value={achievementData.name} onChange={handleChange} /></FormControl>
                <FormControl required><FormLabel>Description</FormLabel><Textarea name="description" value={achievementData.description} onChange={handleChange} minRows={3} /></FormControl>
                <FormControl>
                    <FormLabel>Icon</FormLabel>
                    <Stack direction="row" spacing={2} alignItems="center">
                        <Avatar variant="outlined" src={constructImageUrl(achievementData.icon_url)} sx={{ '--Avatar-size': '64px' }}>
                            <ImageIcon />
                        </Avatar>
                        <Button variant="outlined" color="neutral" onClick={() => fileInputRef.current.click()}> Upload </Button>
                        <input type="file" ref={fileInputRef} hidden accept="image/*" onChange={handleIconUpload} />
                    </Stack>
                </FormControl>
                <Stack direction="row" spacing={2}>
                    <FormControl sx={{ flex: 1 }}>
                        <FormLabel>Card Color</FormLabel>
                        <Input type="color" name="card_color" value={achievementData.card_color || '#32383E'} onChange={handleChange} sx={{ p: 0.5 }} />
                    </FormControl>
                    <FormControl sx={{ flex: 1 }}>
                        <FormLabel>Text Color</FormLabel>
                        <Input type="color" name="text_color" value={achievementData.text_color || '#F0F4F8'} onChange={handleChange} sx={{ p: 0.5 }} />
                    </FormControl>
                </Stack>

                <FormControl><FormLabel>Group</FormLabel>
                    <Select placeholder="— No Group —" value={achievementData.group_id} onChange={onGroupChange}>
                        <Option value={null}>— No Group —</Option>
                        {allGroups.map(group => (<Option key={group.id} value={group.id}>{group.name}</Option>))}
                    </Select>
                </FormControl>
                <FormControl><FormLabel>Reward Command</FormLabel><Input name="reward_command" value={achievementData.reward_command || ''} onChange={handleChange} placeholder="eco give {username} 100" /></FormControl>
                <Divider sx={{ my: 1 }} /><Typography level="title-md">Preview</Typography>
                <AchievementCard achievement={previewData} isPreview={true} />
            </Stack>
        </Sheet>
    );
};

function AdminAchievementBuilderPage() {
    const { id } = useParams();
    const isEditing = !!id;
    const { authToken } = useAuth();
    const navigate = useNavigate();
    const [configData, setConfigData] = useState({ triggers: [], targets: {} });
    const [allGroups, setAllGroups] = useState([]);
    const [serverGroups, setServerGroups] = useState([]); // <-- Новое состояние
    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    const [error, setError] = useState(null);
    const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false);
    const [achievementData, setAchievementData] = useState({
        name: '', description: '', reward_command: '', is_enabled: true, group_id: null,
        conditions: { logic: 'AND', conditions: [] }
    });

    // frontend/src/pages/AdminAchievementBuilderPage.jsx

       useEffect(() => {
        const fetchInitialData = async () => {
            if (!authToken) return;
            setLoading(true);
            try {
                // [!code focus start]
                // --- НАЧАЛО ИЗМЕНЕНИЙ ---

                // 1. Возвращаем запрос на получение данных для конструктора
                const configPromise = axios.get('/api/achievements/admin/config-data', { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } });
                const groupsPromise = axios.get('/api/admin/achievement-groups', { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } });
                const serverGroupsPromise = axios.get('/api/admin/achievement-groups/server-groups', { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } });

                // 2. Добавляем его в массив запросов
                const requests = [configPromise, groupsPromise, serverGroupsPromise];
                if (isEditing) {
                    requests.push(axios.get(`/api/achievements/admin/${id}`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } }));
                }

                // 3. Обрабатываем результат
                const [configRes, groupsRes, serverGroupsRes, achievementRes] = await Promise.all(requests);

                // 4. Сохраняем полученные данные в состояние
                setConfigData(configRes.data);
                setAllGroups(groupsRes.data);
                setServerGroups(serverGroupsRes.data.map(sg => sg.name));

                // --- КОНЕЦ ИЗМЕНЕНИЙ ---
                // [!code focus end]

                if (isEditing && achievementRes) {
                    const fetchedData = achievementRes.data;

                    if (typeof fetchedData.conditions !== 'object' || fetchedData.conditions === null) {
                        fetchedData.conditions = { logic: 'AND', conditions: [] };
                    }
                    if (!fetchedData.conditions.logic) {
                        fetchedData.conditions.logic = 'AND';
                    }
                    if (!Array.isArray(fetchedData.conditions.conditions)) {
                        fetchedData.conditions.conditions = [];
                    }
                    
                    const processedConditions = fetchedData.conditions.conditions.map(cond => {
                        const targetParts = cond.target.split(':');
                        if (targetParts.length > 2) {
                            const newTarget = `${targetParts[0]}:${targetParts[1]}`;
                            // Мы объединяем все, что идет после второго двоеточия, обратно в одну строку
                            const newSpecificTarget = cond.target.substring(newTarget.length + 1);
                            return { ...cond, target: newTarget, specific_target: newSpecificTarget };
                        }
                        return cond;
                    });
                    fetchedData.conditions.conditions = processedConditions;
                    setAchievementData(fetchedData);
                }
            } catch (err) {
                setError("Failed to load achievement builder data. One of the API requests failed.");
                console.error(err);
            } finally {
                setLoading(false);
            }
        };

        fetchInitialData();
    }, [id, isEditing, authToken]);
    
    const handleLogicChange = (event, newLogic) => {
        if (newLogic !== null) {
            setAchievementData(prev => ({
                ...prev,
                conditions: { ...prev.conditions, logic: newLogic }
            }));
        }
    };
    const handleSaveAchievement = async () => {
        setIsSaving(true);
        const preparedData = {
            ...achievementData,
            conditions: {
                ...achievementData.conditions,
                conditions: achievementData.conditions.conditions.map((cond, index) => ({ ...cond, index }))
            }
        };
        try {
            const apiCall = isEditing
                ? axios.patch(`/api/achievements/admin/${id}`, preparedData, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } })
                : axios.post('/api/achievements/admin', preparedData, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } });
            await apiCall;
            toast.success(`Achievement successfully ${isEditing ? 'updated' : 'created'}!`);
            navigate('/admin/achievements');
        } catch (err) {
            const errorMessage = Array.isArray(err.response?.data?.message) ? err.response?.data?.message.join(', ') : err.response?.data?.message;
            toast.error(errorMessage || 'Failed to save achievement.');
        } finally {
            setIsSaving(false);
        }
    };
    const handleAddCondition = (triggerName, target = '') => {
        let newCondition = { trigger: triggerName, target: target, count: 1, checks: [] };
        if (triggerName === 'PAPI_STAT_CHECK') newCondition.operator = '>=';
        setAchievementData(prev => ({ ...prev, conditions: { ...prev.conditions, conditions: [...prev.conditions.conditions, newCondition] } }));
    };
    const handleUpdateCondition = (index, updatedCondition) => {
        setAchievementData(prev => {
            const newConditions = [...prev.conditions.conditions];
            newConditions[index] = updatedCondition;
            return { ...prev, conditions: { ...prev.conditions, conditions: newConditions } };
        });
    };
    const handleRemoveCondition = (index) => {
        setAchievementData(prev => ({ ...prev, conditions: { ...prev.conditions, conditions: prev.conditions.conditions.filter((_, i) => i !== index) } }));
    };
    const handleAddCheck = (conditionIndex) => {
        setAchievementData(prev => {
            const newConditions = [...prev.conditions.conditions];
            newConditions[conditionIndex].checks = [...(newConditions[conditionIndex].checks || []), { source: '', property: '', operator: '==', value: '' }];
            return { ...prev, conditions: { ...prev.conditions, conditions: newConditions } };
        });
    };
    const handleRemoveCheck = (conditionIndex, checkIndex) => {
        setAchievementData(prev => {
            const newConditions = [...prev.conditions.conditions];
            newConditions[conditionIndex].checks = newConditions[conditionIndex].checks.filter((_, i) => i !== checkIndex);
            return { ...prev, conditions: { ...prev.conditions, conditions: newConditions } };
        });
    };
    const handleUpdateCheck = (conditionIndex, updatedCheck, checkIndex) => {
        setAchievementData(prev => {
            const newConditions = [...prev.conditions.conditions];
            newConditions[conditionIndex].checks[checkIndex] = updatedCheck;
            return { ...prev, conditions: { ...prev.conditions, conditions: newConditions } };
        });
    };
    const handleGroupChange = (event, newValue) => {
        setAchievementData(prev => ({ ...prev, group_id: newValue }));
    };

    if (loading) return <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', p: 4 }}><CircularProgress /></Box>;
    return (
        <Box>
            <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'center', mb: 2 }}>
                <Typography level="h2" component="h1">{isEditing ? 'Editing Achievement' : 'Achievement Builder'}</Typography>
                <Button startDecorator={<SaveIcon />} onClick={handleSaveAchievement} loading={isSaving}>
                    {isEditing ? 'Save Changes' : 'Create'}
                </Button>
            </Box>
            {error && <Alert color="danger" sx={{ mb: 2 }}>{error}</Alert>}
            <Grid container spacing={2} sx={{ flexGrow: 1 }}>
                <Grid xs={12} md={3}>
                    <BlockPalette triggers={configData.triggers} loading={loading} onSelectTrigger={handleAddCondition} />
                </Grid>
                <Grid xs={12} md={6}>
                    <Sheet variant="outlined" sx={{ p: 2, borderRadius: 'sm', minHeight: '60vh' }}>
                        <Typography level="title-lg" sx={{ mb: 2 }}>Achievement Logic</Typography>
                        <Stack spacing={2}>
                            {(achievementData.conditions.conditions.length > 1) && (
                                <FormControl>
                                    <FormLabel>Completion Logic</FormLabel>
                                    <ToggleButtonGroup
                                        value={achievementData.conditions.logic || 'AND'}
                                        onChange={handleLogicChange}
                                        color="primary" variant="outlined"
                                    >
                                        <Button value="AND">AND (All conditions)</Button>
                                        <Button value="OR">OR (Any condition)</Button>
                                    </ToggleButtonGroup>
                                </FormControl>
                            )}
                            {(achievementData.conditions.conditions || []).map((cond, index) => (
                                <ConditionBlock
                                    key={index}
                                    condition={cond}
                                    index={index}
                                    onUpdate={handleUpdateCondition}
                                    onRemove={handleRemoveCondition}
                                    onUpdateCheck={handleUpdateCheck}
                                    onAddCheck={handleAddCheck}
                                    onRemoveCheck={handleRemoveCheck}
                                    configData={configData}
                                    serverGroups={serverGroups} // <-- ДОБАВЬ ЭТУ СТРОЧКУ
                                />
                            ))}
                        </Stack>
                    </Sheet>
                </Grid>
                <Grid xs={12} md={3}>
                    <SettingsAndPreview achievementData={achievementData} onUpdate={setAchievementData} allGroups={allGroups} onGroupChange={handleGroupChange} />
                </Grid>
            </Grid>
        </Box>
    );
}

export default AdminAchievementBuilderPage;
--- END FILE: frontend/src/pages/AdminAchievementBuilderPage.jsx ---



--- START FILE: frontend/src/pages/AdminAchievementsListPage.jsx ---

// frontend/src/pages/AdminAchievementsListPage.jsx

import React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import axios from 'axios';
import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext';
import { Box, Typography, Button, CircularProgress, Alert, Grid, IconButton } from '@mui/joy';
import AchievementCard from '../components/AchievementCard';
import AddIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Add';
import EditIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Edit';
import DeleteForeverIcon from '@mui/icons-material/DeleteForever';
import toast from 'react-hot-toast';
import ConfirmationModal from '../components/ConfirmationModal';


function AdminAchievementsListPage() {
  const [achievements, setAchievements] = useState([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [error, setError] = useState(null);
  const { authToken } = useAuth();
  const navigate = useNavigate();

  const [hoveredId, setHoveredId] = useState(null);
  
  const [isConfirmModalOpen, setIsConfirmModalOpen] = useState(false);
  const [achievementToDelete, setAchievementToDelete] = useState(null);
  const [isActionLoading, setIsActionLoading] = useState(false);


  const fetchAchievements = useCallback(async () => {
    setLoading(true);
    setError(null);
    try {
      const response = await axios.get('/api/achievements/admin', {
        headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` },
      });
      setAchievements(response.data);
    } catch (err) {
      setError('Failed to load achievements list.');
      console.error(err);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }, [authToken]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (authToken) {
      fetchAchievements();
    }
  }, [authToken, fetchAchievements]);

  const handleOpenDeleteModal = (achievement) => {
    setAchievementToDelete(achievement);
    setIsConfirmModalOpen(true);
  };

  const handleConfirmDelete = async () => {
    if (!achievementToDelete) return;
    setIsActionLoading(true);
    try {
      await axios.delete(`/api/achievements/admin/${achievementToDelete.id}`, {
        headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` },
      });
      toast.success(`Achievement "${achievementToDelete.name}" deleted successfully.`);
      fetchAchievements();
    } catch (err) {
      toast.error(err.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to delete achievement.');
    } finally {
      setIsActionLoading(false);
      setIsConfirmModalOpen(false);
      setAchievementToDelete(null);
    }
  };


  return (
    <Box>
      <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'center', mb: 2 }}>
        <Typography level="h2" component="h1">
           Achievement Management
        </Typography>
        <Button
          startDecorator={<AddIcon />}
          onClick={() => navigate('/admin/achievements/new')}
        >
          Create Achievement
        </Button>
      </Box>

      {error && <Alert color="danger" sx={{ mb: 2 }}>{error}</Alert>}

      {loading ? (
        <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', p: 4 }}><CircularProgress /></Box>
      ) : (
        <Grid container spacing={2} sx={{ flexGrow: 1 }}>
          {achievements.map((ach) => (
            <Grid key={ach.id} xs={12} sm={6} md={4} lg={4} sx={{ display: 'flex' }}>
              <Box
                onMouseEnter={() => setHoveredId(ach.id)}
                onMouseLeave={() => setHoveredId(null)}
                sx={{ position: 'relative', width: '100%' }}
              >
                <AchievementCard achievement={ach} isPreview={true} />
                <Box sx={{
                  position: 'absolute',
                  top: 4,
                  right: 4,
                  display: 'flex',
                  gap: 0.5,
                  opacity: hoveredId === ach.id ? 1 : 0,
                  transition: 'opacity 0.2s ease-in-out',
                }}>
                  <IconButton
                    size="sm"
                    variant="solid"
                    color="primary"
                    onClick={() => navigate(`/admin/achievements/edit/${ach.id}`)}
                    sx={{ backdropFilter: 'blur(4px)', bgcolor: 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4)' }}
                  >
                    <EditIcon />
                  </IconButton>
                  
                  <IconButton
                    variant="solid"
                    color="danger"
                    size="sm"
                    onClick={() => handleOpenDeleteModal(ach)}
                    sx={{ backdropFilter: 'blur(4px)', bgcolor: 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4)' }}
                  >
                    <DeleteForeverIcon />
                  </IconButton>

                </Box>
              </Box>
            </Grid>
          ))}
        </Grid>
      )}
      <ConfirmationModal
        open={isConfirmModalOpen}
        onClose={() => setIsConfirmModalOpen(false)}
        onConfirm={handleConfirmDelete}
        title="Confirm Deletion"
        content={`Are you sure you want to permanently delete the achievement "${achievementToDelete?.name}"? This action cannot be undone.`}
        confirmText="Delete"
        confirmColor="danger"
        loading={isActionLoading}
      />

    </Box>
  );
}

export default AdminAchievementsListPage;
--- END FILE: frontend/src/pages/AdminAchievementsListPage.jsx ---



--- START FILE: frontend/src/pages/AdminBanReasonsPage.jsx ---

// frontend/src/pages/AdminBanReasonsPage.jsx

import React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
import axios from 'axios';
import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext';
import {
    Box, Typography, Button, CircularProgress, Alert, Sheet, Table,
    IconButton, Tooltip, Stack, Input, List, ListItem, Divider, Grid, // Добавляем List, ListItem, Divider, Grid
    useTheme // Импортируем useTheme
} from '@mui/joy';
import AddIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Add';
import DeleteForeverIcon from '@mui/icons-material/DeleteForever';
import toast from 'react-hot-toast';
import { useMediaQuery } from '@mui/material'; // Импортируем useMediaQuery

function AdminBanReasonsPage() {
    // ... вся твоя логика (хуки, функции) остается без изменений ...
    const { authToken } = useAuth();
    const [reasons, setReasons] = useState([]);
    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    const [error, setError] = useState(null);
    const [newReason, setNewReason] = useState('');
    const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);
    const theme = useTheme();
    const isMobile = useMediaQuery(theme.breakpoints.down('sm'));

    const fetchReasons = useCallback(async () => {
        setLoading(true);
        try {
            const response = await axios.get('/api/admin/ban-reasons', { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } });
            setReasons(response.data);
        } catch (err) {
            setError('Failed to load ban reasons.');
        } finally {
            setLoading(false);
        }
    }, [authToken]);

    useEffect(() => {
        fetchReasons();
    }, [fetchReasons]);

    const handleAddReason = async (e) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        if (!newReason.trim()) return;
        setIsSubmitting(true);
        try {
            await axios.post('/api/admin/ban-reasons', { reason: newReason }, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } });
            setNewReason('');
            toast.success('Ban reason added!');
            fetchReasons();
        } catch (err) {
            toast.error(err.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to add reason.');
        } finally {
            setIsSubmitting(false);
        }
    };

    const handleDeleteReason = async (reasonId) => {
        if (!window.confirm('Are you sure you want to delete this reason?')) return;
        try {
            await axios.delete(`/api/admin/ban-reasons/${reasonId}`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } });
            toast.success('Ban reason deleted!');
            fetchReasons();
        } catch (err) {
            toast.error(err.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to delete reason.');
        }
    };

    if (loading) return <CircularProgress />;
    if (error) return <Alert color="danger">{error}</Alert>;


    return (
        <Box>
            {/* [!code focus start] */}
            {/* --- НАЧАЛО ИЗМЕНЕНИЙ: Полностью новая структура "шапки" --- */}
            <Box sx={{ 
                display: 'flex', 
                flexDirection: { xs: 'column', sm: 'row' }, // На мобильных - колонка, на десктопе - ряд
                justifyContent: 'space-between', 
                alignItems: { xs: 'flex-start', sm: 'center' }, 
                mb: 2,
                gap: 2
            }}>
                <Typography level="h2" component="h1">
                    Manage Ban Reasons
                </Typography>
                
                {/* Форма теперь является частью этого flex-контейнера */}
                <Stack component="form" onSubmit={handleAddReason} direction="row" spacing={1} sx={{ width: { xs: '100%', sm: 'auto' } }}>
                    <Input
                        placeholder="Enter a new preset reason..."
                        value={newReason}
                        onChange={(e) => setNewReason(e.target.value)}
                        sx={{ flexGrow: 1 }}
                    />
                    <Button type="submit" loading={isSubmitting} startDecorator={<AddIcon />}>Add</Button>
                </Stack>
            </Box>
            {/* --- КОНЕЦ ИЗМЕНЕНИЙ --- */}
            {/* [!code focus end] */}

            <Sheet variant="outlined" sx={{ borderRadius: 'sm', overflow: 'auto' }}>
                <Table hoverRow>
                    <thead>
                        <tr>
                            <th>Reason</th>
                            <th style={{ width: '100px', textAlign: 'right' }}>Actions</th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                        {reasons.map((reason) => (
                            <tr key={reason.id}>
                                <td>
                                    <Typography noWrap>{reason.reason}</Typography>
                                </td>
                                <td>
                                    <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'flex-end' }}>
                                        <Tooltip title="Delete Reason">
                                            <IconButton size="sm" color="danger" variant="plain" onClick={() => handleDeleteReason(reason.id)}>
                                                <DeleteForeverIcon />
                                            </IconButton>
                                        </Tooltip>
                                    </Box>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                        ))}
                    </tbody>
                </Table>
            </Sheet>
        </Box>
    );
}

export default AdminBanReasonsPage;
--- END FILE: frontend/src/pages/AdminBanReasonsPage.jsx ---



--- START FILE: frontend/src/pages/AdminCreateItemPage.jsx ---

// frontend/src/pages/AdminCreateItemPage.js
import React, { useState, useRef } from 'react';
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import axios from 'axios';
import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext';
import {
    Box,
    Typography,
    FormControl,
    FormLabel,
    Input,
    Textarea,
    Button,
    Alert,
    Breadcrumbs,
    Link as JoyLink,
    Switch,
    Stack,
    Avatar,
    Sheet
} from '@mui/joy';
import HomeIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Home';
import ChevronRightIcon from '@mui/icons-material/ChevronRight';
import toast from 'react-hot-toast';
import EditIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Edit';
import ImageIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Image';
import { constructImageUrl } from '../utils/url';

function AdminCreateItemPage() {
    const navigate = useNavigate();
    const { authToken } = useAuth();
    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
    const [error, setError] = useState('');

    const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
        name: '',
        description: '',
        price: 0,
        image_url: '',
        ingame_command: '',
        category: 'items',
        is_active: true,
    });
    
    const [imageFile, setImageFile] = useState(null);
    const [imagePreview, setImagePreview] = useState(null);
    const fileInputRef = useRef(null);

    const handleChange = (e) => {
        const { name, value } = e.target;
        setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, [name]: value }));
    };

    const handleSwitchChange = (e) => {
        const { name, checked } = e.target;
        setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, [name]: checked }));
    };
    
    const handleFileChange = (event) => {
        const file = event.target.files[0];
        if (file) {
            setImageFile(file);
            setImagePreview(URL.createObjectURL(file));
        }
    };

    const handleSubmit = async (event) => {
        event.preventDefault();
        setLoading(true);
        setError('');

        try {
            let finalImageUrl = '';

            // 1. Если был выбран файл, сначала загружаем его
            if (imageFile) {
                const uploadFormData = new FormData();
                uploadFormData.append('file', imageFile);
                
                const uploadResponse = await axios.post('/api/media/shop-item', uploadFormData, {
                    headers: { 
                        Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}`,
                        'Content-Type': 'multipart/form-data',
                    },
                });
                finalImageUrl = uploadResponse.data.url;
            }

            // [!code focus start]
            // --- ГЛАВНОЕ ИСПРАВЛЕНИЕ ЗДЕСЬ ---
            // 2. Создаем "чистый" объект payload только с обязательными полями
            const payload = {
                name: formData.name,
                description: formData.description,
                price: Number(formData.price),
                ingame_command: formData.ingame_command,
                category: formData.category,
                is_active: formData.is_active,
            };

            // 3. Добавляем URL изображения, только если он существует
            if (finalImageUrl) {
                payload.image_url = finalImageUrl;
            }
            // [!code focus end]

            // 4. Отправляем на сервер "чистый" payload
            await axios.post('/api/shop', payload, {
                headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` },
            });
            toast.success('Item created successfully!');
            navigate('/admin/shop');
        } catch (err) {
            setError(err.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to create item.');
            console.error('Error creating item:', err);
        } finally {
            setLoading(false);
        }
    };

    return (
        <Box component="form" onSubmit={handleSubmit}>
            <Breadcrumbs separator={<ChevronRightIcon />} sx={{ mb: 2 }}>
                <JoyLink href="/admin/users"><HomeIcon /></JoyLink>
                <JoyLink href="/admin/shop">Shop Management</JoyLink>
                <Typography>Create New Item</Typography>
            </Breadcrumbs>

            <Typography level="h2" component="h1" sx={{ mb: 2 }}>Create New Shop Item</Typography>

            {error && <Alert color="danger" sx={{ mb: 2 }}>{Array.isArray(error) ? error.join(', ') : error}</Alert>}

            <Stack spacing={2}>
                <FormControl required>
                    <FormLabel>Item Name</FormLabel>
                    <Input name="name" value={formData.name} onChange={handleChange} placeholder="e.g., VIP Rank (30 days)" />
                </FormControl>
                
                <FormControl>
                    <FormLabel>Item Image</FormLabel>
                    <Sheet variant='outlined' sx={{p: 1, borderRadius: 'sm', display: 'flex', gap: 2, alignItems: 'center'}}>
                        <Avatar 
                           variant="outlined"
                           src={imagePreview || constructImageUrl(formData.image_url)} 
                           sx={{'--Avatar-size': '64px'}}
                        >
                           <ImageIcon />
                        </Avatar>
                        <Button
                           variant="outlined"
                           color="neutral"
                           startDecorator={<EditIcon />}
                           onClick={() => fileInputRef.current.click()}
                        >
                           Upload Image
                        </Button>
                        <input
                           type="file"
                           ref={fileInputRef}
                           hidden
                           accept="image/*"
                           onChange={handleFileChange}
                        />
                    </Sheet>
                </FormControl>

                <FormControl>
                    <FormLabel>Description</FormLabel>
                    <Textarea name="description" value={formData.description} onChange={handleChange} minRows={3} placeholder="A short description of the item for the shop page." />
                </FormControl>

                <Stack direction="row" spacing={2}>
                    <FormControl required sx={{ flex: 1 }}>
                        <FormLabel>Price (in coins)</FormLabel>
                        <Input name="price" type="number" value={formData.price} onChange={handleChange} />
                    </FormControl>
                    <FormControl required sx={{ flex: 1 }}>
                        <FormLabel>Category</FormLabel>
                        <Input name="category" value={formData.category} onChange={handleChange} placeholder="e.g., ranks, items, keys" />
                    </FormControl>
                </Stack>
                
                <FormControl required>
                    <FormLabel>In-game Command</FormLabel>
                    <Input name="ingame_command" value={formData.ingame_command} onChange={handleChange} placeholder="lp user {username} parent set vip" />
                </FormControl>

                <FormControl sx={{ flexDirection: 'row', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'space-between' }}>
                    <FormLabel>Item is Active</FormLabel>
                    <Switch name="is_active" checked={formData.is_active} onChange={handleSwitchChange} />
                </FormControl>

                <Button type="submit" loading={loading} sx={{ mt: 2 }}>
                    Create Item
                </Button>
            </Stack>
        </Box>
    );
}

export default AdminCreateItemPage;
--- END FILE: frontend/src/pages/AdminCreateItemPage.jsx ---



--- START FILE: frontend/src/pages/AdminCustomPages.jsx ---

// frontend/src/pages/AdminCustomPages.js
import React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
import { Link as RouterLink, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import axios from 'axios';
import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext';
import {
    Box, Typography, Button, CircularProgress, Alert, Sheet, Table,
    IconButton, Tooltip, Link as JoyLink, Chip
} from '@mui/joy';
import AddIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Add';
import EditIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Edit';
import DeleteForeverIcon from '@mui/icons-material/DeleteForever';
import ConfirmationModal from '../components/ConfirmationModal'; // [!code ++]
import toast from 'react-hot-toast'; // [!code ++]

function AdminCustomPages() {
    const { authToken } = useAuth();
    const navigate = useNavigate();
    const [pages, setPages] = useState([]);
    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    const [error, setError] = useState(null);

    // [!code start]
    // --- СОСТОЯНИЯ ДЛЯ МОДАЛЬНОГО ОКНА ---
    const [confirmModalOpen, setConfirmModalOpen] = useState(false);
    const [pageToDelete, setPageToDelete] = useState(null);
    const [isActionLoading, setIsActionLoading] = useState(false);
    // [!code end]


    const fetchPages = useCallback(async () => {
        setLoading(true);
        try {
            const response = await axios.get('/api/admin/pages', {
                headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` },
            });
            setPages(response.data);
        } catch (err) {
            setError('Failed to load pages.');
        } finally {
            setLoading(false);
        }
    }, [authToken]);

    useEffect(() => {
        fetchPages();
    }, [fetchPages]);

    // [!code start]
    // --- ОБНОВЛЁННАЯ ЛОГИКА УДАЛЕНИЯ ---
    const handleOpenDeleteModal = (page) => {
        setPageToDelete(page);
        setConfirmModalOpen(true);
    };

    const handleConfirmDelete = async () => {
        if (!pageToDelete) return;
        setIsActionLoading(true);
        try {
            await axios.delete(`/api/admin/pages/${pageToDelete.id}`, {
                headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` },
            });
            toast.success(`Page "${pageToDelete.title}" deleted successfully.`);
            fetchPages(); // Обновляем список
        } catch (err) {
            toast.error('Failed to delete page.');
        } finally {
            setIsActionLoading(false);
            setConfirmModalOpen(false);
            setPageToDelete(null);
        }
    };
    // [!code end]

    if (loading) return <CircularProgress />;
    if (error) return <Alert color="danger">{error}</Alert>;

    return (
        <Box>
            <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'center', mb: 2 }}>
                <Typography level="h2">Custom Pages</Typography>
                <Button
                    component={RouterLink}
                    to="/admin/pages/new"
                    startDecorator={<AddIcon />}
                >
                    Create Page
                </Button>
            </Box>

            <Sheet variant="outlined" sx={{ borderRadius: 'sm', overflow: 'auto' }}>
                <Table hoverRow>
                    <thead>
                        <tr>
                            <th>Title</th>
                            <th>URL Slug</th>
                            <th>Status</th>
                            <th>Actions</th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                        {pages.map((page) => (
                            <tr key={page.id}>
                                <td>{page.title}</td>
                                <td>
                                    <JoyLink component={RouterLink} to={`/p/${page.slug}`} target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
                                        /p/{page.slug}
                                    </JoyLink>
                                </td>
                                <td>
                                    {page.is_published ?
                                        (<Chip color="success" size="sm">Published</Chip>) :
                                        (<Chip color="neutral" size="sm">Draft</Chip>)
                                    }
                                </td>
                                <td>
                                    <Tooltip title="Edit">
                                        <IconButton size="sm" variant="outlined" color="neutral" onClick={() => navigate(`/admin/pages/${page.id}`)}>
                                            <EditIcon />
                                        </IconButton>
                                    </Tooltip>
                                    <Tooltip title="Delete">
                                        <IconButton size="sm" variant="soft" color="danger" onClick={() => handleOpenDeleteModal(page)}>
                                            <DeleteForeverIcon />
                                        </IconButton>
                                    </Tooltip>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                        ))}
                    </tbody>
                </Table>
            </Sheet>

            {/* [!code start] */}
            <ConfirmationModal
                open={confirmModalOpen}
                onClose={() => setConfirmModalOpen(false)}
                onConfirm={handleConfirmDelete}
                title="Confirm Page Deletion"
                content={`Are you sure you want to permanently delete the page "${pageToDelete?.title}"? This action cannot be undone.`}
                confirmText="Delete"
                confirmColor="danger"
                loading={isActionLoading}
            />
            {/* [!code end] */}
        </Box>
    );
}

export default AdminCustomPages;
--- END FILE: frontend/src/pages/AdminCustomPages.jsx ---



--- START FILE: frontend/src/pages/AdminEditItemPage.jsx ---

// frontend/src/pages/AdminEditItemPage.jsx

import React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback, useRef } from 'react';
import { useNavigate, useParams, Link as RouterLink } from 'react-router-dom';
import axios from 'axios';
import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext';
import {
    Box, Typography, FormControl, FormLabel, Input, Textarea, Button,
    Alert, Breadcrumbs, Link as JoyLink, Switch, Stack, Avatar, Sheet, CircularProgress
} from '@mui/joy';
import HomeIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Home';
import ChevronRightIcon from '@mui/icons-material/ChevronRight';
import toast from 'react-hot-toast';
import EditIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Edit';
import ImageIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Image';
import { constructImageUrl } from '../utils/url';

function AdminEditItemPage() {
    const { itemId } = useParams();
    const navigate = useNavigate();
    const { authToken } = useAuth();
    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    const [error, setError] = useState('');

    const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
        name: '', description: '', price: 0, image_url: '',
        ingame_command: '', category: 'items', is_active: true,
    });
    
    const [imageFile, setImageFile] = useState(null);
    const [imagePreview, setImagePreview] = useState(null);
    const fileInputRef = useRef(null);

    useEffect(() => {
        const fetchItemData = async () => {
            try {
                const response = await axios.get(`/api/shop/${itemId}`, {
                    headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` },
                });
                setFormData(response.data);
                setImagePreview(response.data.image_url);
            } catch (err) {
                setError('Failed to load item data.');
            } finally {
                setLoading(false);
            }
        };
        fetchItemData();
    }, [itemId, authToken]);


    const handleChange = (e) => {
        const { name, value } = e.target;
        setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, [name]: value }));
    };

    const handleSwitchChange = (e) => {
        const { name, checked } = e.target;
        setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, [name]: checked }));
    };
    
    const handleFileChange = (event) => {
        const file = event.target.files[0];
        if (file) {
            setImageFile(file);
            setImagePreview(URL.createObjectURL(file));
        }
    };

    const handleSubmit = async (event) => {
        event.preventDefault();
        setLoading(true);
        setError('');

        try {
            let finalImageUrl = formData.image_url;

            if (imageFile) {
                const uploadFormData = new FormData();
                uploadFormData.append('file', imageFile);
                
                const uploadResponse = await axios.post('/api/media/shop-item', uploadFormData, {
                    headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` },
                });
                finalImageUrl = uploadResponse.data.url;
            }

            const payload = { ...formData, image_url: finalImageUrl };

            await axios.patch(`/api/shop/${itemId}`, payload, {
                headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` },
            });
            toast.success('Item updated successfully!');
            navigate('/admin/shop');
        } catch (err) {
            setError(err.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to update item.');
        } finally {
            setLoading(false);
        }
    };
    
    if (loading) return <CircularProgress />;
    if (error) return <Alert color="danger">{error}</Alert>;

    return (
        <Box component="form" onSubmit={handleSubmit}>
            <Breadcrumbs separator={<ChevronRightIcon />} sx={{ mb: 2 }}>
                <JoyLink component={RouterLink} to="/admin/users"><HomeIcon /></JoyLink>
                <JoyLink component={RouterLink} to="/admin/shop">Shop Management</JoyLink>
                <Typography>Edit Item</Typography>
            </Breadcrumbs>

            <Typography level="h2" component="h1" sx={{ mb: 2 }}>Edit: {formData.name}</Typography>

            {error && <Alert color="danger" sx={{ mb: 2 }}>{Array.isArray(error) ? error.join(', ') : error}</Alert>}

            <Stack spacing={2}>
                <FormControl required>
                    <FormLabel>Item Name</FormLabel>
                    <Input name="name" value={formData.name} onChange={handleChange} />
                </FormControl>
                
                <FormControl>
                    <FormLabel>Item Image</FormLabel>
                    <Sheet variant='outlined' sx={{p: 1, borderRadius: 'sm', display: 'flex', gap: 2, alignItems: 'center'}}>
                        <Avatar 
                           variant="outlined"
                           src={constructImageUrl(imagePreview)} 
                           sx={{'--Avatar-size': '64px'}}
                        >
                           <ImageIcon />
                        </Avatar>
                        <Button
                           variant="outlined"
                           color="neutral"
                           startDecorator={<EditIcon />}
                           onClick={() => fileInputRef.current.click()}
                        >
                           Change Image
                        </Button>
                        <input
                           type="file"
                           ref={fileInputRef}
                           hidden
                           accept="image/*"
                           onChange={handleFileChange}
                        />
                    </Sheet>
                </FormControl>

                <FormControl>
                    <FormLabel>Description</FormLabel>
                    <Textarea name="description" value={formData.description} onChange={handleChange} minRows={3} />
                </FormControl>

                <Stack direction="row" spacing={2}>
                    <FormControl required sx={{ flex: 1 }}>
                        <FormLabel>Price (in coins)</FormLabel>
                        <Input name="price" type="number" value={formData.price} onChange={handleChange} />
                    </FormControl>
                    <FormControl required sx={{ flex: 1 }}>
                        <FormLabel>Category</FormLabel>
                        <Input name="category" value={formData.category} onChange={handleChange} />
                    </FormControl>
                </Stack>
                
                <FormControl required>
                    <FormLabel>In-game Command</FormLabel>
                    <Input name="ingame_command" value={formData.ingame_command} onChange={handleChange} />
                </FormControl>

                <FormControl sx={{ flexDirection: 'row', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'space-between' }}>
                    <FormLabel>Item is Active</FormLabel>
                    <Switch name="is_active" checked={formData.is_active} onChange={handleSwitchChange} />
                </FormControl>

                <Button type="submit" loading={loading} sx={{ mt: 2 }}>
                    Save Changes
                </Button>
            </Stack>
        </Box>
    );
}

export default AdminEditItemPage;
--- END FILE: frontend/src/pages/AdminEditItemPage.jsx ---



--- START FILE: frontend/src/pages/AdminEditPage.jsx ---

// frontend/src/pages/AdminEditPage.jsx
import React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
import { useParams, useNavigate, Link as RouterLink } from 'react-router-dom';
import axios from 'axios';
import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext';
import { TiptapEditor } from '../components/TiptapEditor';
import {
    Box, Typography, Button, CircularProgress, Alert, FormControl,
    FormLabel, Input, Switch, Stack, Breadcrumbs, Link as JoyLink,
    Select, Option // <-- Добавляем Select и Option
} from '@mui/joy';
import HomeIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Home';
import ChevronRightIcon from '@mui/icons-material/ChevronRight';
import toast from 'react-hot-toast';

function AdminEditPage() {
    const { pageId } = useParams();
    const navigate = useNavigate();
    const { authToken } = useAuth();
    const isCreating = !pageId;

    // --- Состояния для данных формы ---
    const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
        title: '',
        slug: '',
        content: '',
        is_published: false,
        category_id: null,
    });

    // --- Состояния для UI ---
    const [allCategories, setAllCategories] = useState([]);
    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(!isCreating);
    const [error, setError] = useState(null);

    // Функция для загрузки всех необходимых данных
    const fetchPageData = useCallback(async () => {
        if (isCreating) {
            // Если создаем новую страницу, нам нужны только категории
            try {
                const categoriesRes = await axios.get('/api/admin/page-categories', { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } });
                setAllCategories(categoriesRes.data);
            } catch (err) {
                setError('Failed to load page categories.');
            }
        } else {
            // Если редактируем, грузим и страницу, и категории параллельно
            setLoading(true);
            try {
                const pagePromise = axios.get(`/api/admin/pages/${pageId}`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } });
                const categoriesPromise = axios.get('/api/admin/page-categories', { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } });
                
                const [pageRes, categoriesRes] = await Promise.all([pagePromise, categoriesPromise]);
                
                setFormData(pageRes.data);
                setAllCategories(categoriesRes.data);
            } catch (err) {
                setError('Failed to load page data.');
            } finally {
                setLoading(false);
            }
        }
    }, [pageId, isCreating, authToken]);

    useEffect(() => {
        fetchPageData();
    }, [fetchPageData]);

    // Обработчики изменений полей формы
    const handleChange = (e) => {
        const { name, value } = e.target;
        setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, [name]: value }));
    };

    const handleContentChange = (newContent) => {
        setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, content: newContent }));
    };

    const handleCategoryChange = (_, newValue) => {
        setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, category_id: newValue }));
    };
    
    // Функция отправки формы
    const handleSubmit = async (event) => {
        event.preventDefault();
        setLoading(true);
        setError(null);

        const apiCall = isCreating
            ? axios.post('/api/admin/pages', formData, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } })
            : axios.patch(`/api/admin/pages/${pageId}`, formData, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } });

        try {
            await apiCall;
            toast.success(`Page ${isCreating ? 'created' : 'updated'} successfully!`);
            navigate('/admin/pages');
        } catch (err) {
            const errorMessage = err.response?.data?.message || 'An error occurred.';
            setError(Array.isArray(errorMessage) ? errorMessage.join(', ') : errorMessage);
        } finally {
            setLoading(false);
        }
    };

    if (loading && !isCreating) return <CircularProgress />;

    return (
        <Box component="form" onSubmit={handleSubmit}>
            <Breadcrumbs separator={<ChevronRightIcon />} sx={{ mb: 2 }}>
                <JoyLink component={RouterLink} to="/admin/users"><HomeIcon /></JoyLink>
                <JoyLink component={RouterLink} to="/admin/pages">Custom Pages</JoyLink>
                <Typography>{isCreating ? 'Create' : 'Edit'}</Typography>
            </Breadcrumbs>

            <Typography level="h2" sx={{ mb: 2 }}>{isCreating ? 'Create New Page' : `Edit: ${formData.title}`}</Typography>

            {error && <Alert color="danger" sx={{ mb: 2 }}>{error}</Alert>}

            <Stack spacing={2}>
                <FormControl required>
                    <FormLabel>Page Title</FormLabel>
                    <Input name="title" value={formData.title} onChange={handleChange} />
                </FormControl>

                {!isCreating && (
                    <FormControl required>
                        <FormLabel>URL Slug (e.g., /p/your-slug)</FormLabel>
                        <Input name="slug" value={formData.slug} onChange={handleChange} />
                    </FormControl>
                )}

                <FormControl>
                    <FormLabel>Category</FormLabel>
                    <Select
                        placeholder="— No Category —"
                        value={formData.category_id}
                        onChange={handleCategoryChange}
                    >
                        <Option value={null}>— No Category —</Option>
                        {allCategories.map(cat => (
                            <Option key={cat.id} value={cat.id}>{cat.name}</Option>
                        ))}
                    </Select>
                </FormControl>
                
                <FormControl required>
                    <FormLabel>Content</FormLabel>
                    <Box sx={{ width: '100%', maxWidth: '100%' }}>
                        <TiptapEditor content={formData.content} onChange={handleContentChange} />
                    </Box>
                </FormControl>

                {!isCreating && (
                    <FormControl sx={{ flexDirection: 'row', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'space-between' }}>
                        <FormLabel>Publish Page</FormLabel>
                        <Switch checked={formData.is_published} onChange={(e) => setFormData(prev => ({...prev, is_published: e.target.checked}))} />
                    </FormControl>
                )}

                <Button type="submit" loading={loading} sx={{ mt: 2, alignSelf: 'flex-start' }}>
                    {isCreating ? 'Create Page' : 'Save Changes'}
                </Button>
            </Stack>
        </Box>
    );
}

export default AdminEditPage;
--- END FILE: frontend/src/pages/AdminEditPage.jsx ---



--- START FILE: frontend/src/pages/AdminPageCategories.jsx ---

// frontend/src/pages/AdminPageCategories.jsx

import React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
import axios from 'axios';
import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext';
import {
    Box, Typography, Button, CircularProgress, Alert, Sheet, Table,
    IconButton, Tooltip, Stack, Input, Modal, ModalDialog, ModalClose,
    FormControl, FormLabel, FormHelperText, Divider
} from '@mui/joy';
import AddIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Add';
import EditIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Edit';
import DeleteForeverIcon from '@mui/icons-material/DeleteForever';
import toast from 'react-hot-toast';
import ConfirmationModal from '../components/ConfirmationModal';

function AdminPageCategories() {
    const { authToken } = useAuth();
    const [categories, setCategories] = useState([]);
    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    const [error, setError] = useState(null);

    // Состояния для модального окна создания/редактирования
    const [isModalOpen, setIsModalOpen] = useState(false);
    const [editingCategory, setEditingCategory] = useState(null);
    const [formData, setFormData] = useState({ name: '', display_order: 0 });
    const [modalError, setModalError] = useState('');

    // Состояния для модального окна подтверждения удаления
    const [isConfirmModalOpen, setIsConfirmModalOpen] = useState(false);
    const [categoryToDelete, setCategoryToDelete] = useState(null);
    const [isActionLoading, setIsActionLoading] = useState(false);

    // Функция для загрузки категорий с сервера
    const fetchCategories = useCallback(async () => {
        setLoading(true);
        try {
            const response = await axios.get('/api/admin/page-categories', {
                headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` },
            });
            setCategories(response.data);
        } catch (err) {
            setError('Failed to load page categories.');
        } finally {
            setLoading(false);
        }
    }, [authToken]);

    useEffect(() => {
        fetchCategories();
    }, [fetchCategories]);

    // Обработчик открытия модального окна
    const handleOpenModal = (category = null) => {
        setModalError('');
        if (category) {
            setEditingCategory(category);
            setFormData({ name: category.name, display_order: category.display_order });
        } else {
            setEditingCategory(null);
            setFormData({ name: '', display_order: 0 });
        }
        setIsModalOpen(true);
    };

    const handleCloseModal = () => setIsModalOpen(false);

    const handleFormChange = (e) => {
        const { name, value } = e.target;
        const finalValue = name === 'display_order' ? parseInt(value, 10) || 0 : value;
        setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, [name]: finalValue }));
    };

    // Обработчик отправки формы (создание или обновление)
    const handleSubmit = async (e) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        setIsActionLoading(true);
        setModalError('');
        
        const apiCall = editingCategory
            ? axios.patch(`/api/admin/page-categories/${editingCategory.id}`, formData, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } })
            : axios.post('/api/admin/page-categories', formData, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } });

        try {
            await apiCall;
            toast.success(`Category successfully ${editingCategory ? 'updated' : 'created'}!`);
            fetchCategories();
            handleCloseModal();
        } catch (err) {
            setModalError(err.response?.data?.message || 'An error occurred.');
        } finally {
            setIsActionLoading(false);
        }
    };

    // Логика удаления
    const handleOpenDeleteModal = (category) => {
        setCategoryToDelete(category);
        setIsConfirmModalOpen(true);
    };

    const handleConfirmDelete = async () => {
        if (!categoryToDelete) return;
        setIsActionLoading(true);
        try {
            await axios.delete(`/api/admin/page-categories/${categoryToDelete.id}`, {
                headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` },
            });
            toast.success(`Category "${categoryToDelete.name}" deleted.`);
            fetchCategories();
        } catch (err) {
            toast.error(err.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to delete category.');
        } finally {
            setIsActionLoading(false);
            setIsConfirmModalOpen(false);
        }
    };


    if (loading) return <CircularProgress />;
    if (error) return <Alert color="danger">{error}</Alert>;

    return (
        <Box>
            <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'center', mb: 2 }}>
                <Typography level="h2" component="h1">
                    Manage Page Categories
                </Typography>
                <Button startDecorator={<AddIcon />} onClick={() => handleOpenModal()}>
                    Create Category
                </Button>
            </Box>

            <Sheet variant="outlined" sx={{ borderRadius: 'sm', overflow: 'auto' }}>
                <Table hoverRow>
                    <thead>
                        <tr>
                            <th>Name</th>
                            <th>Display Order</th>
                            <th style={{ width: '120px', textAlign: 'right' }}>Actions</th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                        {categories.map((category) => (
                            <tr key={category.id}>
                                <td>{category.name}</td>
                                <td>{category.display_order}</td>
                                <td>
                                    <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'flex-end' }}>
                                        <Tooltip title="Edit Category">
                                            <IconButton size="sm" color="neutral" variant="plain" onClick={() => handleOpenModal(category)}>
                                                <EditIcon />
                                            </IconButton>
                                        </Tooltip>
                                        <Tooltip title="Delete Category">
                                            <IconButton size="sm" color="danger" variant="plain" onClick={() => handleOpenDeleteModal(category)}>
                                                <DeleteForeverIcon />
                                            </IconButton>
                                        </Tooltip>
                                    </Box>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                        ))}
                    </tbody>
                </Table>
            </Sheet>

            {/* Модальное окно для создания/редактирования */}
            <Modal open={isModalOpen} onClose={handleCloseModal}>
                <ModalDialog component="form" onSubmit={handleSubmit}>
                    <ModalClose />
                    <Typography level="h4">{editingCategory ? 'Edit Category' : 'Create New Category'}</Typography>
                    <Divider sx={{ my: 2 }} />
                    <Stack spacing={2}>
                        {modalError && <Alert color="danger">{modalError}</Alert>}
                        <FormControl required>
                            <FormLabel>Category Name</FormLabel>
                            <Input name="name" value={formData.name} onChange={handleFormChange} autoFocus />
                        </FormControl>
                        <FormControl>
                            <FormLabel>Display Order</FormLabel>
                            <Input name="display_order" type="number" value={formData.display_order} onChange={handleFormChange} />
                            <FormHelperText>Lower numbers appear first.</FormHelperText>
                        </FormControl>
                        <Button type="submit" loading={isActionLoading} sx={{ mt: 1 }}>
                            {editingCategory ? 'Save Changes' : 'Create'}
                        </Button>
                    </Stack>
                </ModalDialog>
            </Modal>

            {/* Модальное окно для подтверждения удаления */}
            <ConfirmationModal
                open={isConfirmModalOpen}
                onClose={() => setIsConfirmModalOpen(false)}
                onConfirm={handleConfirmDelete}
                title="Confirm Category Deletion"
                content={`Are you sure you want to delete "${categoryToDelete?.name}"? Pages within this category will become uncategorized.`}
                confirmText="Delete"
                confirmColor="danger"
                loading={isActionLoading}
            />
        </Box>
    );
}

export default AdminPageCategories;
--- END FILE: frontend/src/pages/AdminPageCategories.jsx ---



--- START FILE: frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.jsx ---

// frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.js

import React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
import axios from 'axios';
import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext';
import {
    Box, Typography, Sheet, Table, Input, CircularProgress, Alert, Chip, Button,
    Modal, ModalDialog, ModalClose, Select, Option, FormControl, FormLabel,
    Stack, Tooltip,
    useTheme,
    Divider,
    IconButton,
    Switch // [!code ++]
} from '@mui/joy';
import { useMediaQuery } from '@mui/material';
import SearchIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Search';
import EditIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Edit';
import BlockIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Block';
import CheckCircleOutlineIcon from '@mui/icons-material/CheckCircleOutline';
import JoyPagination from '../components/JoyPagination';
import ConfirmationModal from '../components/ConfirmationModal';
import toast from 'react-hot-toast';
import VerifiedIcons from '../components/VerifiedIcons'; // [!code ++]

// Вспомогательная функция для определения цвета текста на цветном фоне
function isColorLight(hexColor) {
    if (!hexColor) return false;
    const hex = hexColor.replace('#', '');
    const r = parseInt(hex.substring(0, 2), 16);
    const g = parseInt(hex.substring(2, 4), 16);
    const b = parseInt(hex.substring(4, 6), 16);
    const brightness = ((r * 299) + (g * 587) + (b * 114)) / 1000;
    return brightness > 155;
}


function AdminPage() {
    const { authToken } = useAuth();
    const [users, setUsers] = useState([]);
    const [ranks, setRanks] = useState([]);
    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    const [error, setError] = useState(null);
    const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');

    const [page, setPage] = useState(1);
    const [limit, setLimit] = useState(15);
    const [totalPages, setTotalPages] = useState(0);
    const [isEditModalOpen, setIsEditModalOpen] = useState(false);
    const [selectedUser, setSelectedUser] = useState(null);
    const [banReasons, setBanReasons] = useState([]);
    const [banFormData, setBanFormData] = useState({ reason: '', customReason: '', duration_hours: '' });

    // [!code focus start]
    // --- НОВЫЕ СОСТОЯНИЯ ДЛЯ ПЕРЕКЛЮЧАТЕЛЕЙ В МОДАЛЬНОМ ОКНЕ ---
    const [selectedRankId, setSelectedRankId] = useState('');
    const [isAdminVerified, setIsAdminVerified] = useState(false);
    const [isYoutuberVerified, setIsYoutuberVerified] = useState(false);
    // [!code focus end]

    const theme = useTheme();
    const isMobile = useMediaQuery(theme.breakpoints.down('md'));

    const [isConfirmModalOpen, setIsConfirmModalOpen] = useState(false);
    const [userToAction, setUserToAction] = useState(null);
    const [actionType, setActionType] = useState('');
    const [isActionLoading, setIsActionLoading] = useState(false);
    const fetchUsers = useCallback(async (query) => {
        setLoading(true);
        try {
            const config = {
                headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` },
                params: { search: query, page, limit },
            };
            const response = await axios.get(`/api/users`, config);
            setUsers(response.data.data);
            setTotalPages(Math.ceil(response.data.total / limit));

        } catch (err) {
            setError('Failed to load user data.');
            console.error(err);
        } finally {
            setLoading(false);
        }
    }, [authToken, page, limit]);

    const fetchRanks = useCallback(async () => {
        try {
            const config = { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } };
            const response = await axios.get('/api/ranks', config);
            setRanks(response.data);
        } catch (err) {
            console.error("Failed to load ranks list", err);
        }
    }, [authToken]);

    const fetchBanReasons = useCallback(async () => {
        try {
