            const config = { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } };
            const response = await axios.get('/api/admin/ban-reasons', config);
            setBanReasons(response.data);
        } catch (err) {
            console.error("Failed to load ban reasons", err);
        }
    }, [authToken]);

    useEffect(() => {
        fetchUsers(searchQuery);
        fetchRanks();
        fetchBanReasons(); // <-- Вызываем новый метод
    }, [fetchUsers, fetchRanks, fetchBanReasons, searchQuery]);

    const handleSearch = (event) => {
        if (event.key === 'Enter') {
            setPage(1);
        }
    };

    const handleOpenEditModal = (user) => {
        setSelectedUser(user);
        // [!code focus start]
        // --- ЗАПОЛНЯЕМ СОСТОЯНИЯ ДАННЫМИ ВЫБРАННОГО ПОЛЬЗОВАТЕЛЯ ---
        setSelectedRankId(user.rank?.id || '');
        setIsAdminVerified(user.is_verified_admin || false);
        setIsYoutuberVerified(user.is_verified_youtuber || false);
        // [!code focus end]
        setIsEditModalOpen(true);
    };

    const handleSaveChanges = async () => {
        if (!selectedUser) return;
        try {
            const config = { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } };
            // [!code focus start]
            // --- СОЗДАЕМ PAYLOAD СО ВСЕМИ ДАННЫМИ ИЗ МОДАЛЬНОГО ОКНА ---
            const payload = {
                rank_id: selectedRankId,
                is_verified_youtuber: isYoutuberVerified,
            };

            await axios.patch(
                `/api/admin/users/${selectedUser.id}/update`,
                payload, // Отправляем новый payload
                config
            );
            // [!code focus end]
            toast.success(`User ${selectedUser.username} updated successfully!`);
            setIsEditModalOpen(false);
            fetchUsers(searchQuery);
        } catch (err) {
            const errorMessage = err.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to update user.';
            toast.error(Array.isArray(errorMessage) ? errorMessage.join(', ') : errorMessage);
            console.error(err);
        }
    };

    const handleOpenConfirmModal = (user, type) => {
        setUserToAction(user);
        setActionType(type);
        // Сбрасываем форму бана при открытии
        if (type === 'ban') {
            setBanFormData({ reason: '', customReason: '', duration_hours: '' });
        }
        setIsConfirmModalOpen(true);
    };

  const handleConfirmAction = async () => {
        if (!userToAction || !actionType) return;
        setIsActionLoading(true);
        try {
            const config = { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } };
            let payload = {};
            
            if (actionType === 'ban') {
                const finalReason = banFormData.reason === 'custom' ? banFormData.customReason : banFormData.reason;
                if (!finalReason) {
                    toast.error("Reason for ban is required.");
                    setIsActionLoading(false);
                    return;
                }
                payload = {
                    reason: finalReason,
                    duration_hours: banFormData.duration_hours ? Number(banFormData.duration_hours) : undefined,
                };
            }
            
            await axios.post(`/api/admin/users/${userToAction.id}/${actionType}`, payload, config);
            toast.success(`User ${userToAction.username} has been ${actionType}ned.`);
            fetchUsers(searchQuery);
        } catch (err) {
            toast.error(`Failed to ${actionType} user.`);
            console.error(err);
        } finally {
            setIsActionLoading(false);
            setIsConfirmModalOpen(false);
            setUserToAction(null);
        }
    };

    if (error) {
        return <Alert color="danger">{error}</Alert>;
    }

    const renderUserCard = (user) => (
        <Sheet key={user.id} variant="outlined" sx={{ p: 2, borderRadius: 'sm' }}>
            <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'flex-start', gap: 2 }}>
                <Box>
                    <Typography level="title-md" component="span" sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center' }}>
                        {user.username}
                        <VerifiedIcons user={user} size="1.1em" sx={{ ml: 0.5 }} />
                    </Typography>                    <Typography level="body-sm" textColor="text.tertiary">{user.email}</Typography>
                    <Stack direction="row" spacing={1} sx={{ mt: 1 }}>
                        {user.rank ? (
                            <Chip size="sm" variant="soft" sx={{ backgroundColor: user.rank.display_color, color: isColorLight(user.rank.display_color) ? '#000' : '#FFF' }}>
                                {user.rank.name}
                            </Chip>
                        ) : <Chip size="sm">No Rank</Chip>}
                        {user.is_banned ? <Chip size="sm" color="danger">Banned</Chip> : <Chip size="sm" color="success">Active</Chip>}
                    </Stack>
                </Box>
                <Stack direction="row" spacing={0.5} sx={{ alignItems: 'flex-start' }}>
                    <Tooltip title="Edit" variant="outlined" size="sm">
                        <IconButton size="sm" variant="plain" color="neutral" onClick={() => handleOpenEditModal(user)}>
                            <EditIcon />
                        </IconButton>
                    </Tooltip>
                    {user.is_banned ?
                        (
                            <Tooltip title="Unban User" variant="outlined" size="sm">
                                <IconButton size="sm" variant="plain" color="success" onClick={() => handleOpenConfirmModal(user, 'unban')}>
                                    <CheckCircleOutlineIcon />
                                </IconButton>
                            </Tooltip>
                        ) : (
                            <Tooltip title="Ban User" variant="outlined" size="sm">
                                <IconButton size="sm" variant="plain" color="danger" onClick={() => handleOpenConfirmModal(user, 'ban')}>
                                    <BlockIcon />
                                </IconButton>
                            </Tooltip>
                        )}
                </Stack>
            </Box>
            <Divider sx={{ my: 1.5 }} />
            <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'center' }}>
                <Typography level="body-xs">ID: {user.id}</Typography>
                <Typography level="body-xs">Reputation: <strong>{user.reputation_count}</strong></Typography>
            </Box>
        </Sheet>
    );
    return (
        <Box>
            <Typography level="h2" component="h1" sx={{ mb: 3 }}>User Management</Typography>
            <Input
                sx={{ mb: 2, maxWidth: { xs: '100%', md: '400px' } }}
                placeholder="Search by username..."
                startDecorator={<SearchIcon />}
                value={searchQuery}
                onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
                onKeyDown={handleSearch}
            />
            {!loading && totalPages > 1 && (
                <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', mb: 2 }}>
                    <JoyPagination count={totalPages} page={page} onChange={(event, value) => setPage(value)} />
                </Box>
            )}
            {loading ? (
                <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', p: 4 }}><CircularProgress /></Box>
            ) : (
                isMobile ? (
                    <Stack spacing={1.5}>{users.map(user => renderUserCard(user))}</Stack>
                ) : (
                    <Sheet variant="outlined" sx={{ borderRadius: 'sm', overflow: 'auto' }}>
                        <Table hoverRow sx={{ '& thead th': { verticalAlign: 'middle' }, '& tbody td': { verticalAlign: 'middle' } }}>
                            <thead>
                                <tr>
                                    <th>ID</th>
                                    <th style={{ minWidth: '150px' }}>Username</th>
                                    <th style={{ minWidth: '200px' }}>Email</th>
                                    <th>Rank</th>
                                    <th>Reputation</th>
                                    <th>Status</th>
                                    <th style={{ minWidth: '120px' }}>Actions</th>
                                </tr>
                            </thead>
                            <tbody>
                                {users.map((user) => (
                                    <tr key={user.id}>
                                        <td>{user.id}</td>
                                        <td>
                                            <Tooltip title={user.username} variant="outlined" size="sm">
                                                <Typography component="span" sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', maxWidth: '150px' }}>
                                                    <VerifiedIcons user={user} sx={{ mr: 0.5, flexShrink: 0 }} />
                                                    <Typography component="span" noWrap>{user.username}</Typography>
                                                </Typography>
                                            </Tooltip>
                                        </td>
                                        <td>
                                            <Tooltip title={user.email} variant="outlined" size="sm">
                                                <Typography sx={{ maxWidth: '200px', whiteSpace: 'nowrap', overflow: 'hidden', textOverflow: 'ellipsis' }}>
                                                    {user.email}
                                                </Typography>
                                            </Tooltip>
                                        </td>
                                        <td>
                                            {user.rank ? (
                                                <Chip size="sm" variant="soft" sx={{ backgroundColor: user.rank.display_color, color: isColorLight(user.rank.display_color) ? '#000' : '#FFF' }}>
                                                    {user.rank.name}
                                                </Chip>
                                            ) : <Chip size="sm">No Rank</Chip>}
                                        </td>
                                        <td>{user.reputation_count}</td>
                                        <td>{user.is_banned ? <Chip size="sm" color="danger">Banned</Chip> : <Chip size="sm" color="success">Active</Chip>}</td>
                                        <td>
                                            <Stack direction="row" spacing={1}>
                                                <Tooltip title="Edit" variant="outlined" size="sm">
                                                    <IconButton size="sm" variant="outlined" color="neutral" onClick={() => handleOpenEditModal(user)}>
                                                        <EditIcon />
                                                    </IconButton>
                                                </Tooltip>
                                                {user.is_banned ? (
                                                    <Tooltip title="Unban" variant="outlined" size="sm">
                                                        <IconButton size="sm" variant="soft" color="success" onClick={() => handleOpenConfirmModal(user, 'unban')}>
                                                            <CheckCircleOutlineIcon />
                                                        </IconButton>
                                                    </Tooltip>
                                                ) : (
                                                    <Tooltip title="Ban" variant="outlined" size="sm">
                                                        <IconButton size="sm" variant="soft" color="danger" onClick={() => handleOpenConfirmModal(user, 'ban')}>
                                                            <BlockIcon />
                                                        </IconButton>
                                                    </Tooltip>
                                                )}
                                            </Stack>
                                        </td>
                                    </tr>
                                ))}
                            </tbody>
                        </Table>
                    </Sheet>
                )
            )}
            {totalPages > 1 && (
                <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', mt: 3 }}>
                    <JoyPagination count={totalPages} page={page} onChange={(event, value) => setPage(value)} />
                </Box>
            )}

            {/* [!code focus start] */}
            <Modal open={isEditModalOpen} onClose={() => setIsEditModalOpen(false)}>
                <ModalDialog>
                    <ModalClose />
                    <Typography level="h4">Edit User: {selectedUser?.username}</Typography>

                    <Stack spacing={2} sx={{ mt: 2 }}>
                        <FormControl>
                            <FormLabel>Rank</FormLabel>
                            <Select value={selectedRankId} onChange={(e, newValue) => setSelectedRankId(newValue)}>
                                {ranks.map(rank => (<Option key={rank.id} value={rank.id}>{rank.name}</Option>))}
                            </Select>
                        </FormControl>

                        <Divider sx={{ my: 1 }} />
                        <Typography level="title-md">Verification Status</Typography>
                        <FormControl orientation="horizontal" sx={{ justifyContent: 'space-between' }}>
                            <FormLabel>YouTuber/Partner</FormLabel>
                            <Switch
                                checked={isYoutuberVerified}
                                onChange={(event) => setIsYoutuberVerified(event.target.checked)}
                            />
                        </FormControl>
                    </Stack>

                    <Button sx={{ mt: 3 }} onClick={handleSaveChanges}>Save Changes</Button>
                </ModalDialog>
            </Modal>
            {/* [!code focus end] */}

  <ConfirmationModal
                open={isConfirmModalOpen}
                onClose={() => setIsConfirmModalOpen(false)}
                onConfirm={handleConfirmAction}
                title={`Confirm ${actionType}`}
                // --- Используем кастомный контент для бана ---
                content={
                    actionType === 'ban' ? (
                        <Stack spacing={2} sx={{ pt: 1 }}>
                            <FormControl>
                                <FormLabel>Reason</FormLabel>
                                <Select
                                    placeholder="Select a reason..."
                                    value={banFormData.reason}
                                    onChange={(e, newValue) => setBanFormData(p => ({ ...p, reason: newValue }))}
                                >
                                    {banReasons.map(r => <Option key={r.id} value={r.reason}>{r.reason}</Option>)}
                                    <Option value="custom">-- Custom Reason --</Option>
                                </Select>
                            </FormControl>
                            {banFormData.reason === 'custom' && (
                                <Textarea
                                    placeholder="Enter custom ban reason..."
                                    minRows={3}
                                    value={banFormData.customReason}
                                    onChange={(e) => setBanFormData(p => ({ ...p, customReason: e.target.value }))}
                                />
                            )}
                            <FormControl>
                                <FormLabel>Duration (in hours)</FormLabel>
                                <Input
                                    type="number"
                                    placeholder="Leave empty for permanent ban"
                                    value={banFormData.duration_hours}
                                    onChange={(e) => setBanFormData(p => ({ ...p, duration_hours: e.target.value }))}
                                />
                            </FormControl>
                        </Stack>
                    ) : `Are you sure you want to ${actionType} the user "${userToAction?.username}"?`
                }
                confirmText={actionType === 'ban' ? 'Ban' : 'Unban'}
                confirmColor={actionType === 'ban' ? 'danger' : 'success'}
                loading={isActionLoading}
            />
        </Box>
    );
}

export default AdminPage;
--- END FILE: frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.jsx ---



--- START FILE: frontend/src/pages/AdminPostsPage.jsx ---

// frontend/src/pages/AdminPostsPage.js

import React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
import { useNavigate, Link as RouterLink } from 'react-router-dom';
import axios from 'axios';
import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext';
import {
    Box, Typography, Sheet, Table, Input, CircularProgress, Alert, Button, Tooltip, Link, Stack,
    useTheme,
    IconButton,
} from '@mui/joy';
import { useMediaQuery } from '@mui/material';
import SearchIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Search';
import EditIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Edit';
import DeleteForeverIcon from '@mui/icons-material/DeleteForever';
import JoyPagination from '../components/JoyPagination';
import toast from 'react-hot-toast';
import ConfirmationModal from '../components/ConfirmationModal'; // [!code ++]

function AdminPostsPage() {
    const { authToken } = useAuth();
    const navigate = useNavigate();
    const [posts, setPosts] = useState([]);
    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    const [error, setError] = useState(null);
    const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
    const theme = useTheme();
    const isMobile = useMediaQuery(theme.breakpoints.down('md'));

    const [page, setPage] = useState(1);
    const [limit, setLimit] = useState(15);
    const [totalPages, setTotalPages] = useState(0);

    // [!code start]
    // --- СОСТОЯНИЯ ДЛЯ МОДАЛЬНОГО ОКНА ---
    const [confirmModalOpen, setConfirmModalOpen] = useState(false);
    const [postToDelete, setPostToDelete] = useState(null);
    const [isActionLoading, setIsActionLoading] = useState(false);
    // [!code end]

    const fetchPosts = useCallback(async (query) => {
        setLoading(true);
        try {
            const config = {
                headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` },
                params: {
                    search: query,
                    sortBy: 'created_at',
                    order: 'DESC',
                    page,
                    limit
                },
            };
            const response = await axios.get('/api/posts', config);
            setPosts(response.data.data);
            setTotalPages(Math.ceil(response.data.total / limit));
        } catch (err) {
            setError('Failed to load post data.');
            console.error(err);
        } finally {
            setLoading(false);
        }
    }, [authToken, page, limit]);

    useEffect(() => {
        fetchPosts(searchQuery);
    }, [fetchPosts, searchQuery]);

    const handleSearch = (event) => {
        if (event.key === 'Enter') {
            setPage(1);
            fetchPosts(searchQuery);
        }
    };

    // [!code start]
    // --- НОВЫЕ ФУНКЦИИ ДЛЯ МОДАЛЬНОГО ОКНА ---
    const handleOpenDeleteModal = (post) => {
        setPostToDelete(post);
        setConfirmModalOpen(true);
    };

    const handleConfirmDelete = async () => {
        if (!postToDelete) return;
        setIsActionLoading(true);
        try {
            await axios.delete(`/api/posts/${postToDelete.id}`, {
                headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` },
            });
            toast.success('Post successfully deleted.');
            fetchPosts(searchQuery); // Перезагружаем данные
        } catch (err) {
            toast.error('Failed to delete the post.');
            console.error(err);
        } finally {
            setIsActionLoading(false);
            setConfirmModalOpen(false);
            setPostToDelete(null);
        }
    };
    // [!code end]

    const handleEditPost = (postId) => {
        navigate(`/posts/${postId}/edit`);
    };

    if (error) {
        return <Alert color="danger">{error}</Alert>;
    }

    const renderPostCard = (post) => (
        <Sheet key={post.id} variant="outlined" sx={{ p: 2, borderRadius: 'sm' }}>
            <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'flex-start', gap: 2 }}>
                <Box sx={{ flexGrow: 1, minWidth: 0 }}>
                    <Link component={RouterLink} to={`/posts/${post.id}`} level="title-md" overlay sx={{ wordBreak: 'break-word' }}>
                        {post.title}
                    </Link>
                    <Typography level="body-sm" textColor="text.tertiary" sx={{ mt: 0.5 }}>
                        by {post.author?.username || 'N/A'} on {new Date(post.created_at).toLocaleDateString()}
                    </Typography>
                </Box>
                <Stack direction="row" spacing={0.5} sx={{ flexShrink: 0 }}>
                    <Tooltip title="Edit Post" variant="outlined" size="sm">
                        <IconButton size="sm" variant="plain" color="neutral" onClick={() => handleEditPost(post.id)}>
                            <EditIcon />
                        </IconButton>
                    </Tooltip>
                    <Tooltip title="Delete Post" variant="outlined" size="sm">
                        <IconButton size="sm" variant="plain" color="danger" onClick={() => handleOpenDeleteModal(post)}>
                            <DeleteForeverIcon />
                        </IconButton>
                    </Tooltip>
                </Stack>
            </Box>
        </Sheet>
    );

    return (
        <Box>
            <Typography level="h2" component="h1" sx={{ mb: 3 }}>Post Management</Typography>
            <Input
                sx={{ mb: 2, maxWidth: { xs: '100%', md: '400px' } }}
                placeholder="Search by title and press Enter..."
                startDecorator={<SearchIcon />}
                value={searchQuery}
                onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
                onKeyDown={handleSearch}
            />
            {!loading && totalPages > 1 && (
                <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', mb: 2 }}>
                    <JoyPagination count={totalPages} page={page} onChange={(event, value) => setPage(value)} />
                </Box>
            )}
            {loading ? (
                <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', p: 4 }}><CircularProgress /></Box>
            ) : (
                <>
                    {isMobile ? (
                        <Stack spacing={1.5}>{posts.map(post => renderPostCard(post))}</Stack>
                    ) : (
                        <Sheet variant="outlined" sx={{ borderRadius: 'sm', overflow: 'auto' }}>
                            <Table hoverRow sx={{ tableLayout: 'fixed' }}>
                                <thead>
                                    <tr>
                                        <th style={{ width: '60px' }}>ID</th>
                                        <th style={{ width: '40%' }}>Title</th>
                                        <th style={{ width: '20%' }}>Author</th>
                                        <th style={{ width: '15%' }}>Created At</th>
                                        <th style={{ width: '15%' }}>Actions</th>
                                    </tr>
                                </thead>
                                <tbody>
                                    {posts.map((post) => (
                                        <tr key={post.id}>
                                            <td>{post.id}</td>
                                            <td>
                                                <Link component={RouterLink} to={`/posts/${post.id}`} sx={{ wordBreak: 'break-all' }}>
                                                    {post.title}
                                                </Link>
                                            </td>
                                            <td>{post.author?.username || 'N/A'}</td>
                                            <td>{new Date(post.created_at).toLocaleDateString()}</td>
                                            <td>
                                                <Stack direction="row" spacing={1}>
                                                    <Tooltip title="Edit Post" variant="outlined" size="sm">
                                                        <IconButton size="sm" variant="outlined" color="neutral" onClick={() => handleEditPost(post.id)}>
                                                            <EditIcon />
                                                        </IconButton>
                                                    </Tooltip>
                                                    <Tooltip title="Delete Post" variant="outlined" size="sm">
                                                        <IconButton size="sm" variant="soft" color="danger" onClick={() => handleOpenDeleteModal(post)}>
                                                            <DeleteForeverIcon />
                                                        </IconButton>
                                                    </Tooltip>
                                                </Stack>
                                            </td>
                                        </tr>
                                    ))}
                                </tbody>
                            </Table>
                        </Sheet>
                    )}
                    {totalPages > 1 && (
                        <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', mt: 3 }}>
                            <JoyPagination count={totalPages} page={page} onChange={(event, value) => setPage(value)} />
                        </Box>
                    )}
                </>
            )}
            {/* [!code start] */}
            <ConfirmationModal
                open={confirmModalOpen}
                onClose={() => setConfirmModalOpen(false)}
                onConfirm={handleConfirmDelete}
                title="Confirm Deletion"
                content={`Are you sure you want to permanently delete the post "${postToDelete?.title}"? This action cannot be undone.`}
                confirmText="Delete"
                confirmColor="danger"
                loading={isActionLoading}
            />
            {/* [!code end] */}
        </Box>
    );
}

export default AdminPostsPage;
--- END FILE: frontend/src/pages/AdminPostsPage.jsx ---



--- START FILE: frontend/src/pages/AdminRanksPage.jsx ---

// frontend/src/pages/AdminRanksPage.jsx

import React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
import axios from 'axios';
import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext';
import {
    Box, Typography, Sheet, Table, Input, CircularProgress, Alert, Chip, Button,
    Modal, ModalDialog, ModalClose, FormControl, FormLabel, FormHelperText,
    Stack, Tooltip, IconButton, Select, Option, Divider, Grid,
    useTheme // Добавляем useTheme
} from '@mui/joy';
import { useMediaQuery } from '@mui/material'; // Добавляем useMediaQuery
import EditIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Edit';
import DeleteForeverIcon from '@mui/icons-material/DeleteForever';
import AddIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Add';
import toast from 'react-hot-toast';
import ConfirmationModal from '../components/ConfirmationModal';

// Вспомогательная функция для определения цвета текста на чипах
function isColorLight(hexColor) {
    if (!hexColor) return false;
    const hex = hexColor.replace('#', '');
    const r = parseInt(hex.substring(0, 2), 16);
    const g = parseInt(hex.substring(2, 4), 16);
    const b = parseInt(hex.substring(4, 6), 16);
    const brightness = ((r * 299) + (g * 587) + (b * 114)) / 1000;
    return brightness > 155;
}

// [!code focus start]
// --- НОВЫЙ КОМПОНЕНТ ДЛЯ КАРТОЧКИ РАНГА ---
const RankCard = ({ rank, onEdit, onDelete }) => {
    return (
        <Sheet variant="outlined" sx={{ p: 2, borderRadius: 'sm' }}>
            <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'flex-start', gap: 2 }}>
                {/* Основная информация слева */}
                <Box>
                    <Chip size="md" variant="soft" sx={{ backgroundColor: rank.display_color, color: isColorLight(rank.display_color) ? '#000' : '#FFF', mb: 1 }}>
                        {rank.name}
                    </Chip>
                    <Typography level="body-xs" textColor="text.tertiary">{rank.system_name}</Typography>
                </Box>
                {/* Кнопки действий справа */}
                <Stack direction="row" spacing={0.5}>
                    <Tooltip title="Edit Rank" variant="outlined" size="sm">
                        <IconButton size="sm" variant="plain" color="neutral" onClick={() => onEdit(rank)}>
                            <EditIcon />
                        </IconButton>
                    </Tooltip>
                    <Tooltip title="Delete Rank" variant="outlined" size="sm">
                        <Box>
                            <IconButton size="sm" variant="plain" color="danger" onClick={() => onDelete(rank)} disabled={!rank.is_removable}>
                                <DeleteForeverIcon />
                            </IconButton>
                        </Box>
                    </Tooltip>
                </Stack>
            </Box>
            <Divider sx={{ my: 1.5 }} />
            <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'center' }}>
                <Typography level="body-xs">ID: {rank.id}</Typography>
                <Typography level="body-sm">Power: <strong>{rank.power_level}</strong></Typography>
            </Box>
        </Sheet>
    );
};
// --- КОНЕЦ КОМПОНЕНТА КАРТОЧКИ ---
// [!code focus end]


function AdminRanksPage() {
    const { authToken } = useAuth();
    const [ranks, setRanks] = useState([]);
    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    const [error, setError] = useState(null);

    const [isMigrationModalOpen, setIsMigrationModalOpen] = useState(false);
    const [rankToDelete, setRankToDelete] = useState(null);
    const [migrationRankId, setMigrationRankId] = useState('');

    const [isEditModalOpen, setIsEditModalOpen] = useState(false);
    const [editingRank, setEditingRank] = useState(null);
    const [formData, setFormData] = useState({ name: '', system_name: '', power_level: 10, display_color: '#808080', command_template: '', command_template_remove: '' });
    const [modalError, setModalError] = useState('');

    const [isConfirmModalOpen, setIsConfirmModalOpen] = useState(false);
    const [isActionLoading, setIsActionLoading] = useState(false);
    
    // [!code focus start]
    // --- ОПРЕДЕЛЯЕМ РАЗМЕР ЭКРАНА ---
    const theme = useTheme();
    const isMobile = useMediaQuery(theme.breakpoints.down('md')); // md - точка переключения между таблицей и карточками
    // [!code focus end]

    const fetchRanks = useCallback(async () => {
        setLoading(true);
        try {
            const response = await axios.get('/api/ranks', { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } });
            setRanks(response.data);
        } catch (err) {
            setError('Failed to load ranks data.');
        } finally {
            setLoading(false);
        }
    }, [authToken]);

    useEffect(() => {
        fetchRanks();
    }, [fetchRanks]);

    const handleOpenEditModal = (rank = null) => {
        setModalError('');
        if (rank) {
            setEditingRank(rank);
            setFormData({
                name: rank.name,
                system_name: rank.system_name,
                power_level: rank.power_level,
                display_color: rank.display_color,
                command_template: rank.command_template || '',
                command_template_remove: rank.command_template_remove || ''
            });
        } else {
            setEditingRank(null);
            setFormData({ name: '', system_name: '', power_level: 10, display_color: '#808080', command_template: '', command_template_remove: '' });
        }
        setIsEditModalOpen(true);
    };

    const handleCloseEditModal = () => setIsEditModalOpen(false);

    const handleFormChange = (e) => {
        const { name, value } = e.target;
        if (name === 'power_level') {
            const numericValue = value === '' ? '' : parseInt(value, 10);
            setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, [name]: numericValue }));
        } else {
            setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, [name]: value }));
        }
    };

    const handleSaveRank = async (event) => {
        event.preventDefault();
        setModalError('');
        const isCustomRank = !editingRank || editingRank.is_removable;
        if (isCustomRank && formData.power_level >= 800) {
            setModalError('Power level must be less than 800 for custom ranks.');
            return;
        }
        const apiCall = editingRank
            ? axios.patch(`/api/ranks/${editingRank.id}`, formData, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } })
            : axios.post('/api/ranks', formData, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } });
        try {
            await apiCall;
            fetchRanks();
            handleCloseEditModal();
        } catch (err) {
            setModalError(err.response?.data?.message || 'An error occurred.');
        }
    };

    const handleOpenDeleteConfirm = (rank) => {
        setRankToDelete(rank);
        setIsConfirmModalOpen(true);
    };

    const handleConfirmDelete = async () => {
        if (!rankToDelete) return;
        setIsActionLoading(true);
        try {
            await axios.delete(`/api/ranks/${rankToDelete.id}`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } });
            toast.success(`Rank "${rankToDelete.name}" was deleted.`);
            fetchRanks();
        } catch (err) {
            if (err.response && err.response.status === 409) {
                setModalError(err.response.data.message);
                setIsMigrationModalOpen(true);
            } else {
                toast.error(err.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to delete rank.');
            }
        } finally {
            setIsActionLoading(false);
            setIsConfirmModalOpen(false);
        }
    };

    const handleConfirmDeleteWithMigration = async () => {
        if (!rankToDelete || !migrationRankId) {
            setModalError('You must select a rank to migrate users to.');
            return;
        }
        try {
            await axios.delete(`/api/ranks/${rankToDelete.id}`, {
                headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` },
                data: { migrationRankId: Number(migrationRankId) }
            });
            toast.success('Rank deleted and users migrated successfully.');
            setIsMigrationModalOpen(false);
            setRankToDelete(null);
            setMigrationRankId('');
            setModalError('');
            fetchRanks();
        } catch (err) {
            setModalError(err.response?.data?.message || 'An error occurred during migration.');
        }
    };

    if (loading) return <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', p: 4 }}><CircularProgress /></Box>;
    if (error) return <Alert color="danger">{error}</Alert>;

    return (
        <Box>
            <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'center', mb: 3 }}>
                <Typography level="h2" component="h1">Rank Management</Typography>
                <Button startDecorator={<AddIcon />} onClick={() => handleOpenEditModal()}>Create Rank</Button>
            </Box>
            
            {/* [!code focus start] */}
            {/* --- НАЧАЛО УСЛОВНОГО РЕНДЕРИНГА --- */}
            {isMobile ? (
                // ВЕРСИЯ ДЛЯ МОБИЛЬНЫХ
                <Stack spacing={1.5}>
                    {ranks.map((rank) => (
                        <RankCard
                            key={rank.id}
                            rank={rank}
                            onEdit={handleOpenEditModal}
                            onDelete={handleOpenDeleteConfirm}
                        />
                    ))}
                </Stack>
            ) : (
                // ВЕРСИЯ ДЛЯ ДЕСКТОПА
                <Sheet variant="outlined" sx={{ borderRadius: 'sm', overflow: 'auto' }}>
                    <Table hoverRow>
                        <thead>
                            <tr>
                                <th style={{ width: '80px' }}>ID</th>
                                <th>Color</th>
                                <th>Display Name</th>
                                <th>System Name</th>
                                <th>Power Level</th>
                                <th style={{ width: '120px' }}>Actions</th>
                            </tr>
                        </thead>
                        <tbody>
                            {ranks.map((rank) => (
                                <tr key={rank.id}>
                                    <td>{rank.id}</td>
                                    <td><Chip size="lg" variant="soft" sx={{ bgcolor: rank.display_color, border: '1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.2)' }} /></td>
                                    <td>{rank.name}</td>
                                    <td>{rank.system_name}</td>
                                    <td>{rank.power_level}</td>
                                    <td>
                                        <Stack direction="row" spacing={1}>
                                            <Tooltip title="Edit Rank" variant="outlined" size="sm">
                                                <IconButton size="sm" color="neutral" onClick={() => handleOpenEditModal(rank)}>
                                                    <EditIcon />
                                                </IconButton>
                                            </Tooltip>
                                            <Tooltip title="Delete Rank" variant="outlined" size="sm">
                                                <Box>
                                                    <IconButton size="sm" color="danger" onClick={() => handleOpenDeleteConfirm(rank)} disabled={!rank.is_removable}>
                                                        <DeleteForeverIcon />
                                                    </IconButton>
                                                </Box>
                                            </Tooltip>
                                        </Stack>
                                    </td>
                                </tr>
                            ))}
                        </tbody>
                    </Table>
                </Sheet>
            )}
            {/* --- КОНЕЦ УСЛОВНОГО РЕНДЕРИНГА --- */}
            {/* [!code focus end] */}

            {/* Модальные окна остаются без изменений */}
            <Modal open={isEditModalOpen} onClose={handleCloseEditModal}>
                 <ModalDialog>
                    <ModalClose />
                    <Typography level="h4">{editingRank ? 'Edit Rank' : 'Create New Rank'}</Typography>
                    <form onSubmit={handleSaveRank}>
                        <Stack spacing={2} sx={{ mt: 2 }}>
                            <FormControl>
                                <FormLabel>Display Name</FormLabel>
                                <Input name="name" value={formData.name} onChange={handleFormChange} autoFocus required />
                            </FormControl>
                            <FormControl required>
                                <FormLabel>System Name</FormLabel>
                                <Input name="system_name" value={formData.system_name} onChange={handleFormChange} required />
                                <FormHelperText>Name for in-game linking (e.g., 'vip'). Lowercase, no spaces.</FormHelperText>
                            </FormControl>
                            <FormControl disabled={editingRank && !editingRank.is_removable}>
                                <FormLabel>Power Level</FormLabel>
                                <Input name="power_level" type="number" value={formData.power_level} onChange={handleFormChange} required />
                                <FormHelperText>Must be between 1 and 799. Higher is more powerful.</FormHelperText>
                            </FormControl>
                            <FormControl>
                                <FormLabel>Command Template (for issuing)</FormLabel>
                                <Input name="command_template" value={formData.command_template} onChange={handleFormChange} placeholder="e.g., lp user {username} parent set vip" />
                                <FormHelperText>Use {'{username}'} as a placeholder. Can be empty.</FormHelperText>
                            </FormControl>
                            <FormControl>
                                <FormLabel>Command Template (for removal)</FormLabel>
                                <Input name="command_template_remove" value={formData.command_template_remove} onChange={handleFormChange} placeholder="e.g., lp user {username} parent remove vip" />
                                <FormHelperText>This command is executed when rank is removed.</FormHelperText>
                            </FormControl>
                            <FormControl>
                                <FormLabel>Display Color</FormLabel>
                                <Input name="display_color" type="color" value={formData.display_color} onChange={handleFormChange} sx={{ p: 0, border: 0, '& input': { p: 0 } }} required />
                            </FormControl>
                            {modalError && <Alert color="danger">{modalError}</Alert>}
                            <Button type="submit" sx={{ mt: 1 }}>Save Changes</Button>
                        </Stack>
                    </form>
                </ModalDialog>
            </Modal>

            <Modal open={isMigrationModalOpen} onClose={() => setIsMigrationModalOpen(false)}>
                <ModalDialog>
                    <ModalClose />
                    <Typography level="h4">Delete Rank: {rankToDelete?.name}</Typography>
                    <Stack spacing={2} sx={{ mt: 2 }}>
                        <Alert color="warning">{modalError || `The rank "${rankToDelete?.name}" is currently in use. To delete it, please select a new rank to which all current members will be migrated.`}</Alert>
                        <FormControl>
                            <FormLabel>Migrate Users To</FormLabel>
                            <Select placeholder="Select a new rank..." value={migrationRankId} onChange={(e, newValue) => setMigrationRankId(newValue)}>
                                {ranks.filter(r => r.id !== rankToDelete?.id).map(rank => (
                                    <Option key={rank.id} value={rank.id}>{rank.name} (Power: {rank.power_level})</Option>
                                ))}
                            </Select>
                        </FormControl>
                        <Button color="danger" onClick={handleConfirmDeleteWithMigration} disabled={!migrationRankId}>
                            Confirm Deletion and Migrate Users
                        </Button>
                    </Stack>
                </ModalDialog>
            </Modal>

            <ConfirmationModal
                open={isConfirmModalOpen}
                onClose={() => setIsConfirmModalOpen(false)}
                onConfirm={handleConfirmDelete}
                title="Confirm Deletion"
                content={`Are you sure you want to delete the rank "${rankToDelete?.name}"? This action cannot be undone.`}
                confirmText="Delete"
                confirmColor="danger"
                loading={isActionLoading}
            />
        </Box>
    );
}

export default AdminRanksPage;
--- END FILE: frontend/src/pages/AdminRanksPage.jsx ---



--- START FILE: frontend/src/pages/AdminShopPage.jsx ---

// frontend/src/pages/AdminShopPage.js
import React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
import axios from 'axios';
import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext';
// [!code focus start]
import { Box, Typography, Button, CircularProgress, Alert, Sheet, Table, Chip, IconButton, Tooltip, Avatar } from '@mui/joy';
// [!code end]
import { Link as RouterLink, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import AddIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Add';
import EditIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Edit';
import DeleteForeverIcon from '@mui/icons-material/DeleteForever';
import toast from 'react-hot-toast';
import ConfirmationModal from '../components/ConfirmationModal';
// [!code focus start]
import { constructImageUrl } from '../utils/url'; // Импортируем наш хелпер
// [!code end]


function AdminShopPage() {
    const { authToken } = useAuth();
    const [items, setItems] = useState([]);
    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    const [error, setError] = useState(null);
    const [confirmModalOpen, setConfirmModalOpen] = useState(false);
    const [itemToDelete, setItemToDelete] = useState(null);
    const [isActionLoading, setIsActionLoading] = useState(false);
    const navigate = useNavigate(); // <-- ВОТ ЭТА СТРОКА

    const fetchAllItems = useCallback(async () => {
        setLoading(true);
        try {
            const response = await axios.get('/api/shop', {
                headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` },
            });
            setItems(response.data);
        } catch (err) {
            setError('Failed to load shop items.');
        } finally {
            setLoading(false);
        }
    }, [authToken]);

    useEffect(() => {
        fetchAllItems();
    }, [fetchAllItems]);

    const handleOpenDeleteModal = (item) => {
        setItemToDelete(item);
        setConfirmModalOpen(true);
    };

    const handleConfirmDelete = async () => {
        if (!itemToDelete) return;
        setIsActionLoading(true);
        try {
            await axios.delete(`/api/shop/${itemToDelete.item_id}`, {
                headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` },
            });
            toast.success(`Item "${itemToDelete.name}" deleted successfully.`);
            fetchAllItems();
        } catch (err) {
            toast.error('Failed to delete item.');
        } finally {
            setIsActionLoading(false);
            setConfirmModalOpen(false);
            setItemToDelete(null);
        }
    };

    if (loading) return <CircularProgress />;
    if (error) return <Alert color="danger">{error}</Alert>;

    return (
        <Box>
            <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'center', mb: 2 }}>
                <Typography level="h2">Shop Management</Typography>
                <Button
                    component={RouterLink}
                    to="/admin/shop/new"
                    startDecorator={<AddIcon />}
                >
                    Create Item
                </Button>
            </Box>

            <Sheet variant="outlined" sx={{ borderRadius: 'sm', overflow: 'auto' }}>
                <Table hoverRow>
                    <thead>
                        <tr>
                            {/* [!code focus start] */}
                            <th>Image</th>
                            {/* [!code end] */}
                            <th>ID</th>
                            <th>Name</th>
                            <th>Price</th>
                            <th>Status</th>
                            <th>Actions</th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                        {items.map((item) => (
                            <tr key={item.item_id}>
                                {/* [!code focus start] */}
                                <td>
                                    <Avatar src={constructImageUrl(item.image_url)} />
                                </td>
                                {/* [!code end] */}
                                <td>{item.item_id}</td>
                                <td>{item.name}</td>
                                <td>{item.price} coins</td>
                                <td>
                                    {item.is_active ?
                                        <Chip color="success" size="sm">Active</Chip> :
                                        <Chip color="danger" size="sm">Inactive</Chip>
                                    }
                                </td>
                                <td>
                                    {/* [!code focus start] */}
                                    <Tooltip title="Edit">
                                        <IconButton
                                            size="sm"
                                            variant="outlined"
                                            color="neutral"
                                            sx={{ mr: 1 }}
                                            onClick={() => navigate(`/admin/shop/edit/${item.item_id}`)}
                                        >
                                            <EditIcon />
                                        </IconButton>
                                    </Tooltip>
                                    {/* [!code focus end] */}
                                    <Tooltip title="Delete">
                                        <IconButton size="sm" variant="soft" color="danger" onClick={() => handleOpenDeleteModal(item)}>
                                            <DeleteForeverIcon />
                                        </IconButton>
                                    </Tooltip>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                        ))}
                    </tbody>
                </Table>
            </Sheet>

            <ConfirmationModal
                open={confirmModalOpen}
                onClose={() => setConfirmModalOpen(false)}
                onConfirm={handleConfirmDelete}
                title="Confirm Item Deletion"
                content={`Are you sure you want to permanently delete the item "${itemToDelete?.name}"?`}
                confirmText="Delete"
                confirmColor="danger"
                loading={isActionLoading}
            />
        </Box>
    );
}

export default AdminShopPage;
--- END FILE: frontend/src/pages/AdminShopPage.jsx ---



--- START FILE: frontend/src/pages/ClanDetailPage.jsx ---

// frontend/src/pages/ClanDetailPage.jsx

import React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
import { useParams, Link as RouterLink } from 'react-router-dom';
import axios from 'axios';
import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext';
import {
    Box, Typography, CircularProgress, Alert, Sheet, AspectRatio,
    Avatar, Chip, Button, Tabs, TabList, Tab, TabPanel, List, ListItem, ListItemDecorator, ListItemContent, IconButton, Tooltip, ModalDialog, ModalClose, FormControl, FormLabel, Select, Option, Stack, Modal, Divider,
    Dropdown, Menu, MenuButton, MenuItem, Input
} from '@mui/joy';
import JoyRating from '../components/JoyRating';
import { constructImageUrl } from '../utils/url';
import EditIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Edit';
import LoginIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Login';
import ExitToAppIcon from '@mui/icons-material/ExitToApp';
import AssignmentIndIcon from '@mui/icons-material/AssignmentInd';
import toast from 'react-hot-toast';
import ClanApplicationModal from '../components/ClanApplicationModal';
import PersonRemoveIcon from '@mui/icons-material/PersonRemove';
import ConfirmationModal from '../components/ConfirmationModal';
import ClanChat from '../components/ClanChat';
import ManageAccountsIcon from '@mui/icons-material/ManageAccounts';
import GppBadIcon from '@mui/icons-material/GppBad';
import { Textarea } from '@mui/joy';
import MoreVertIcon from '@mui/icons-material/MoreVert';
import VolumeOffIcon from '@mui/icons-material/VolumeOff';
import VolumeUpIcon from '@mui/icons-material/VolumeUp';

const ClanReviewsList = ({ reviews }) => {
    if (!reviews || reviews.length === 0) {
        return <Typography sx={{ mt: 2 }}>This clan has no reviews yet.</Typography>;
    }

    return (
        <List sx={{ '--ListItem-paddingY': '1.5rem' }}>
            {reviews.map((review, index) => (
                <React.Fragment key={review.id}>
                    <ListItem sx={{ alignItems: 'flex-start' }}>
                        <ListItemDecorator sx={{ mr: 1 }}>
                            <Avatar src={constructImageUrl(review.author.pfp_url)} />
                        </ListItemDecorator>
                        <ListItemContent>
                            <Stack direction="row" justifyContent="space-between" alignItems="flex-start">
                                <Box>
                                    <Typography level="title-sm" sx={{ color: review.author.rank?.display_color }}>
                                        {review.author.username}
                                    </Typography>
                                    <Typography level="body-xs">
                                        {new Date(review.created_at).toLocaleDateString()}
                                    </Typography>
                                </Box>
                                <JoyRating value={review.rating} readOnly />
                            </Stack>
                            <Typography level="body-md" sx={{ mt: 1, whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }}>
                                {review.text}
                            </Typography>
                        </ListItemContent>
                    </ListItem>
                    {index < reviews.length - 1 && <Divider component="li" />}
                </React.Fragment>
            ))}
        </List>
    );
};

const LeaveReviewForm = ({ clanId, onReviewSubmitted }) => {
    const { authToken } = useAuth();
    const [rating, setRating] = useState(5);
    const [text, setText] = useState('');
    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
    const [error, setError] = useState('');

    const handleSubmit = async (e) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        setLoading(true);
        setError('');
        try {
            await axios.post(
                `/api/clans/${clanId}/reviews`,
                { rating, text },
                { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } }
            );
            toast.success('Your review has been posted!');
            onReviewSubmitted();
            setText('');
            setRating(5);
        } catch (err) {
            setError(err.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to post review.');
        } finally {
            setLoading(false);
        }
    };

    return (
        <Sheet variant="outlined" sx={{ p: 2, borderRadius: 'md', mb: 3 }} component="form" onSubmit={handleSubmit}>
            <Typography level="title-lg" sx={{ mb: 2 }}>Leave Your Review</Typography>
            {error && <Alert color="danger" sx={{ mb: 2 }}>{error}</Alert>}
            <Stack spacing={2}>
                <FormControl>
                    <FormLabel>Your Rating</FormLabel>
                    <JoyRating value={rating} onChange={(newValue) => setRating(newValue)} />
                </FormControl>
                <FormControl required>
                    <FormLabel>Your Review</FormLabel>
                    <Textarea
                        value={text}
                        onChange={(e) => setText(e.target.value)}
                        minRows={4}
                        placeholder="Share your experience with this clan..."
                    />
                </FormControl>
                <Button type="submit" loading={loading} sx={{ alignSelf: 'flex-start' }}>Submit Review</Button>
            </Stack>
        </Sheet>
    );
};


function ClanDetailPage() {
    const { tag } = useParams();
    const { authToken, user: currentUser, isLoggedIn } = useAuth();
    const [clan, setClan] = useState(null);
    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    const [error, setError] = useState(null);
    const [isActionLoading, setIsActionLoading] = useState(false);
    const [isApplyModalOpen, setIsApplyModalOpen] = useState(false);
    const [isConfirmModalOpen, setIsConfirmModalOpen] = useState(false);
    const [memberToAction, setMemberToAction] = useState(null);
    const [isRoleModalOpen, setIsRoleModalOpen] = useState(false);
    const [selectedRoleId, setSelectedRoleId] = useState('');
    const [isWarnModalOpen, setIsWarnModalOpen] = useState(false);
    const [warnReason, setWarnReason] = useState('');
    const [reviews, setReviews] = useState([]);
    const [canLeaveReview, setCanLeaveReview] = useState(false);
    const [isMuteModalOpen, setIsMuteModalOpen] = useState(false);
    const [muteFormData, setMuteFormData] = useState({ reason: '', duration_minutes: '' });

    const fetchClan = useCallback(async () => {
        // [!code focus start]
        // --- НАЧАЛО ИЗМЕНЕНИЙ ---
        try {
            const config = authToken ? { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } } : {};
            const response = await axios.get(`/api/clans/${tag}`, config);
            setClan(response.data);

            // Теперь мы используем флаг, который приходит с бэкенда
            if (response.data.viewerHasMembershipHistory) {
                setCanLeaveReview(true);
            }

        } catch (err) {
            setError('Failed to load clan data. This clan may not exist.');
        } finally {
            setLoading(false);
        }
    }, [tag, authToken]);

    const fetchReviews = useCallback(async (clanId) => {
        try {
            const response = await axios.get(`/api/clans/${clanId}/reviews`);
            setReviews(response.data);
        } catch (err) {
            toast.error("Could not load reviews.");
        }
    }, []);

    useEffect(() => {
        setLoading(true);
        fetchClan();
    }, [fetchClan]);

    useEffect(() => {
        if (clan?.id) {
            fetchReviews(clan.id);
        }
    }, [clan, fetchReviews]);

    const handleOpenKickModal = (member) => { setMemberToAction(member); setIsConfirmModalOpen(true); };
    const handleOpenWarnModal = (member) => { setMemberToAction(member); setWarnReason(''); setIsWarnModalOpen(true); };
    const handleOpenRoleModal = (member) => { setMemberToAction(member); setSelectedRoleId(member.role_id); setIsRoleModalOpen(true); };
    const handleConfirmRoleChange = async () => { if (!memberToAction || !selectedRoleId) return; setIsActionLoading(true); try { await axios.patch(`/api/clans/${clan.id}/members/${memberToAction.id}`, { roleId: selectedRoleId }, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } }); toast.success(`${memberToAction.user.username}'s role has been updated.`); fetchClan(); } catch (err) { toast.error(err.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to change role.'); } finally { setIsActionLoading(false); setIsRoleModalOpen(false); } };
    const handleConfirmKick = async () => { if (!memberToAction) return; setIsActionLoading(true); try { await axios.delete(`/api/clans/${clan.id}/members/${memberToAction.id}`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } }); toast.success(`${memberToAction.user.username} has been kicked.`); fetchClan(); } catch (err) { toast.error(err.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to kick member.'); } finally { setIsActionLoading(false); setIsConfirmModalOpen(false); } };
    const handleApplicationSubmit = async (answers) => { try { await axios.post(`/api/clans/${clan.id}/apply`, { answers }, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } }); toast.success('Your application has been sent!'); setIsApplyModalOpen(false); } catch (err) { toast.error(err.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to send application.'); } };
    const handleJoin = async () => { setIsActionLoading(true); try { await axios.post(`/api/clans/${clan.id}/join`, {}, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } }); toast.success(`You have joined ${clan.name}!`); fetchClan(); } catch (err) { toast.error(err.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to join clan.'); } finally { setIsActionLoading(false); } };
    const handleConfirmWarn = async () => { if (!memberToAction || !warnReason) return; setIsActionLoading(true); try { await axios.post(`/api/clans/${clan.id}/members/${memberToAction.id}/warn`, { reason: warnReason }, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } }); toast.success(`Warning issued to ${memberToAction.user.username}.`); } catch (err) { toast.error(err.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to issue warning.'); } finally { setIsActionLoading(false); setIsWarnModalOpen(false); } };
    const handleLeave = async () => { if (!window.confirm('Are you sure you want to leave this clan?')) return; setIsActionLoading(true); try { await axios.post(`/api/clans/${clan.id}/leave`, {}, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } }); toast.success(`You have left ${clan.name}.`); fetchClan(); } catch (err) { toast.error(err.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to leave clan.'); } finally { setIsActionLoading(false); } };

    const handleOpenMuteModal = (member) => {
        setMemberToAction(member);
        setMuteFormData({ reason: '', duration_minutes: '' }); // Сбрасываем форму
        setIsMuteModalOpen(true);
    };

    const handleConfirmMute = async () => {
        if (!memberToAction || !muteFormData.reason) {
            toast.error("Reason is required to issue a mute.");
            return;
        }
        setIsActionLoading(true);
        try {
            await axios.post(
                `/api/clans/${clan.id}/members/${memberToAction.id}/mute`,
                {
                    reason: muteFormData.reason,
                    duration_minutes: muteFormData.duration_minutes ? Number(muteFormData.duration_minutes) : undefined
                },
                { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } }
            );
            toast.success(`${memberToAction.user.username} has been muted.`);
            fetchClan();
        } catch (err) {
            toast.error(err.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to mute member.');
        } finally {
            setIsActionLoading(false);
            setIsMuteModalOpen(false);
        }
    };

    const handleUnmute = async (member) => {
        setIsActionLoading(true);
        try {
            await axios.post(`/api/clans/${clan.id}/members/${member.id}/unmute`, {}, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } });
            toast.success(`${member.user.username} has been unmuted.`);
            fetchClan();
        } catch (err) {
            toast.error(err.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to unmute member.');
        } finally {
            setIsActionLoading(false);
        }
    };

    if (loading) return <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', p: 4 }}><CircularProgress /></Box>;
    if (error) return <Alert color="danger">{error}</Alert>;
    if (!clan) return null;

    const isMember = isLoggedIn && clan.members.some(m => m.user_id === currentUser?.id);
    const currentUserMembership = clan.members.find(m => m.user_id === currentUser?.id);
    const canManageClan = currentUserMembership?.role?.permissions?.clanPermissions && (currentUserMembership.role.permissions.clanPermissions.canEditDetails || currentUserMembership.role.permissions.clanPermissions.canEditRoles || currentUserMembership.role.permissions.clanPermissions.canAcceptMembers);
    const assignableRoles = currentUserMembership ? clan.roles.filter(role => role.power_level <= currentUserMembership.role.power_level) : [];

    const renderActionButtons = () => {
        const isOwner = currentUser?.id === clan?.owner_id;

        if (!isLoggedIn) {
            return <Button component={RouterLink} to="/login" startDecorator={<LoginIcon />}>Log in to join</Button>;
        }

        if (canManageClan) {
            return (
                <Stack direction="row" spacing={1}>
                    <Button component={RouterLink} to={`/clans/${clan.tag}/manage`} startDecorator={<EditIcon />}>Manage Clan</Button>
                    {!isOwner && (
                        <Dropdown>
                            <MenuButton
                                slots={{ root: IconButton }}
                                slotProps={{ root: { variant: 'outlined', color: 'neutral' } }}
                            >
                                <MoreVertIcon />
                            </MenuButton>
                            <Menu>
                                <MenuItem color="danger" onClick={handleLeave}>
                                    <ExitToAppIcon /> Leave Clan
                                </MenuItem>
                            </Menu>
                        </Dropdown>
                    )}
                </Stack>
            );
        }

        if (isMember) {
            return <Button color="danger" variant="outlined" loading={isActionLoading} onClick={handleLeave} startDecorator={<ExitToAppIcon />}>Leave Clan</Button>;
        }

        switch (clan.join_type) {
            case 'open':
                return <Button loading={isActionLoading} onClick={handleJoin}>Join Now</Button>;
            case 'application':
                return <Button variant="outlined" startDecorator={<AssignmentIndIcon />} onClick={() => setIsApplyModalOpen(true)}>Apply to Join</Button>;
            case 'closed':
                return <Button disabled>Closed</Button>;
            default:
                return null;
        }
    };

    return (
        <Box>
            <Sheet variant="outlined" sx={{ borderRadius: 'md', py: { xs: 2, sm: 3, md: 4 } }}> {/* <-- ИЗМЕНЕНИЕ: Добавлены вертикальные отступы */}
                <Box sx={{ position: 'relative', px: { xs: 2, sm: 3, md: 4 } }}> {/* <-- ИЗМЕНЕНИЕ: Добавлена обертка с горизонтальными отступами */}
                    <AspectRatio ratio="16/5" sx={{ width: '100%', borderRadius: 'sm', bgcolor: 'background.level1' }}>
                        <Box component="img" src={constructImageUrl(clan.card_image_url) || '/placeholders/banner_placeholder.png'} alt={`${clan.name} banner`} sx={{ objectFit: 'cover' }} />
                    </AspectRatio>

                    {/* --- НОВЫЙ БЛОК: Градиент для плавного исчезновения --- */}
                    <Box
                        sx={{
                            position: 'absolute', bottom: 0, left: 0, right: 0, height: '50%',
                            background: 'linear-gradient(to top, var(--joy-palette-background-level1), transparent)',
                            borderRadius: 'sm',
                        }}
                    />
                </Box>

                <Box sx={{
                    display: 'flex',
                    flexDirection: { xs: 'column', sm: 'row' },
                    alignItems: { xs: 'center', sm: 'flex-end' },
                    gap: { md: 3, xs: 1 },
                    mt: { xs: -4, sm: -6 }, // <-- ИЗМЕНЕНИЕ: Скорректирован отступ аватара
                    position: 'relative',
                    px: { xs: 2, sm: 5, md: 8 } // <-- ИЗМЕНЕНИЕ: Добавлены отступы для контента
                }}>
                    <Avatar
                        src={constructImageUrl(clan.card_icon_url)}
                        sx={{
                            '--Avatar-size': { xs: '80px', md: '128px' },
                            border: '4px solid',
                            borderColor: 'background.body',
                            boxShadow: 'sm',
                            mx: { xs: 'auto', sm: 0 },
                        }}
                    />
                    <Box sx={{ textAlign: { xs: 'center', sm: 'left' }, flexGrow: 1 }}>
                        <Typography level="h2" component="h1">{clan.name}</Typography>
                        <Typography level="title-md" textColor="text.tertiary">@{clan.tag}</Typography>
                    </Box>
                    {renderActionButtons()}
                </Box>

                <Divider sx={{ my: 3 }} />

                <Typography level="body-lg" sx={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap', px: { xs: 2, sm: 3, md: 4 } }}>
                    {clan.description || 'No description provided.'}
                </Typography>
            </Sheet>

            <Tabs aria-label="Clan Details" defaultValue={0} sx={{ mt: 3 }}>
                <TabList>
                    <Tab>Members ({clan.members?.length || 0})</Tab>
                    <Tab>Chat</Tab>
                    <Tab>Reviews ({reviews.length})</Tab>
                </TabList>
                <TabPanel value={0}>
                    <List sx={{ '--ListItem-paddingY': '0.5rem' }}>
                        {clan.members.map(member => {
                            const actorPower = currentUserMembership?.role?.power_level || 0;
                            const targetPower = member.role?.power_level || 0;
                            const canKick = actorPower > targetPower && targetPower <= (currentUserMembership?.role.permissions.memberPermissions.maxKickPower || 0) && member.user_id !== clan.owner_id;
                            const canChangeRole = actorPower > targetPower && member.user_id !== clan.owner_id;
                            const canWarn = actorPower > targetPower && targetPower <= (currentUserMembership?.role.permissions.memberPermissions.maxWarnPower || 0) && member.user_id !== clan.owner_id;
                            const canMute = actorPower > targetPower && targetPower <= (currentUserMembership?.role.permissions.memberPermissions.maxMutePower || 0) && member.user_id !== clan.owner_id;

                            return (
                                <ListItem key={member.id} endAction={
                                    <Stack direction="row" spacing={0.5}>
                                        {canChangeRole && (
                                            <Tooltip title="Change Role" variant="outlined" size="sm">
                                                <IconButton size="sm" color="neutral" variant="plain" onClick={() => handleOpenRoleModal(member)}>
                                                    <ManageAccountsIcon />
                                                </IconButton>
                                            </Tooltip>
                                        )}
                                        {canMute && (
                                            member.is_muted ? (
                                                <Tooltip title="Unmute Member">
                                                    <IconButton size="sm" color="success" variant="plain" onClick={() => handleUnmute(member)}>
                                                        <VolumeUpIcon />
                                                    </IconButton>
                                                </Tooltip>
                                            ) : (
                                                <Tooltip title="Mute Member">
                                                    <IconButton size="sm" color="warning" variant="plain" onClick={() => handleOpenMuteModal(member)}>
                                                        <VolumeOffIcon />
                                                    </IconButton>
                                                </Tooltip>
                                            )
                                        )}
                                        {canWarn && (
                                            <Tooltip title="Issue a Warning" variant="outlined" size="sm">
                                                <IconButton size="sm" color="warning" variant="plain" onClick={() => handleOpenWarnModal(member)}>
                                                    <GppBadIcon />
                                                </IconButton>
                                            </Tooltip>
                                        )}
                                        {canKick && (
                                            <Tooltip title="Kick Member" variant="outlined" size="sm">
                                                <IconButton size="sm" color="danger" variant="plain" onClick={() => handleOpenKickModal(member)}>
                                                    <PersonRemoveIcon />
                                                </IconButton>
                                            </Tooltip>
                                        )}
                                    </Stack>
                                }>
                                    <ListItemDecorator>
                                        <Avatar src={constructImageUrl(member.user.pfp_url)} sx={{ mr: 1.5 }} />
                                    </ListItemDecorator>
                                    <ListItemContent>
                                        <Typography level="title-sm" sx={{ color: member.user.rank?.display_color }}>
                                            {member.user.username}
                                        </Typography>
                                        <Typography level="body-xs" sx={{ color: member.role.color }}>
                                            {member.role.name}
                                        </Typography>
                                    </ListItemContent>
                                </ListItem>
                            );
                        })}
                    </List>
                </TabPanel>
                <TabPanel value={1}>
                    {isMember ? (<ClanChat clan={clan} />) : (<Typography sx={{ p: 2, textAlign: 'center' }}> You must be a member of the clan to view the chat. </Typography>)}
                </TabPanel>
                <TabPanel value={2}>
                    {canLeaveReview && <LeaveReviewForm clanId={clan.id} onReviewSubmitted={() => fetchReviews(clan.id)} />}
                    <ClanReviewsList reviews={reviews} />
                </TabPanel>
            </Tabs>

            <ClanApplicationModal open={isApplyModalOpen} onClose={() => setIsApplyModalOpen(false)} clan={clan} onSubmit={handleApplicationSubmit} />
            <ConfirmationModal open={isConfirmModalOpen} onClose={() => setIsConfirmModalOpen(false)} onConfirm={handleConfirmKick} title="Confirm Kick" content={`Are you sure you want to kick ${memberToAction?.user.username} from the clan?`} confirmText="Kick" confirmColor="danger" loading={isActionLoading} />
            <Modal open={isRoleModalOpen} onClose={() => setIsRoleModalOpen(false)}>
                <ModalDialog> <ModalClose /> <Typography level="h4">Change Role for {memberToAction?.user.username}</Typography> <Divider sx={{ my: 2 }} /> <Stack spacing={2}> <FormControl> <FormLabel>New Role</FormLabel> <Select value={selectedRoleId} onChange={(_, newValue) => setSelectedRoleId(newValue)}> {assignableRoles.map(role => (<Option key={role.id} value={role.id}> {role.name} (Power: {role.power_level}) </Option>))} </Select> </FormControl> <Button onClick={handleConfirmRoleChange} loading={isActionLoading}>Save Changes</Button> </Stack> </ModalDialog>
            </Modal>
            <Modal open={isWarnModalOpen} onClose={() => setIsWarnModalOpen(false)}>
                <ModalDialog> <ModalClose /> <Typography level="h4">Issue Warning to {memberToAction?.user.username}</Typography> <Divider sx={{ my: 2 }} /> <Stack spacing={2}> <FormControl required> <FormLabel>Reason for the warning</FormLabel> <Textarea minRows={3} value={warnReason} onChange={(e) => setWarnReason(e.target.value)} placeholder="Describe the rule violation..." /> </FormControl> <Button onClick={handleConfirmWarn} loading={isActionLoading} color="warning"> Submit Warning </Button> </Stack> </ModalDialog>
            </Modal>
            <Modal open={isMuteModalOpen} onClose={() => setIsMuteModalOpen(false)}>
                <ModalDialog>
                    <ModalClose />
                    <Typography level="h4">Mute {memberToAction?.user.username}</Typography>
                    <Divider sx={{ my: 2 }} />
                    <Stack spacing={2} component="form" onSubmit={(e) => { e.preventDefault(); handleConfirmMute(); }}>
                        <FormControl required>
                            <FormLabel>Reason for Mute</FormLabel>
                            <Textarea
                                value={muteFormData.reason}
                                onChange={(e) => setMuteFormData(p => ({ ...p, reason: e.target.value }))}
                                minRows={3}
                                autoFocus
                                placeholder="e.g., Spamming, inappropriate language..."
                            />
                        </FormControl>
                        <FormControl>
                            <FormLabel>Duration (in minutes)</FormLabel>
                            <Input
                                type="number"
                                value={muteFormData.duration_minutes}
                                onChange={(e) => setMuteFormData(p => ({ ...p, duration_minutes: e.target.value }))}
                                placeholder="Leave empty for permanent"
                            />
                        </FormControl>
                        <Button type="submit" loading={isActionLoading} color="warning">
                            Issue Mute
                        </Button>
                    </Stack>
                </ModalDialog>
            </Modal>
        </Box>
    );
}

export default ClanDetailPage;
--- END FILE: frontend/src/pages/ClanDetailPage.jsx ---



--- START FILE: frontend/src/pages/ClansListPage.jsx ---

import React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
import axios from 'axios';
import { Box, Typography, CircularProgress, Alert, Grid, Input, Button } from '@mui/joy';
import ClanCard from '../components/ClanCard';
import JoyPagination from '../components/JoyPagination';
import SearchIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Search';
import AddIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Add'; // <-- Добавьте иконку
import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext'; // <-- Импортируем useAuth
import { Link as RouterLink } from 'react-router-dom'; // <-- Добавьте импорт

function ClansListPage() {
  const [clans, setClans] = useState([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [error, setError] = useState(null);
  const { isLoggedIn, user } = useAuth();

  // Состояния для пагинации и поиска
  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);
  const [totalPages, setTotalPages] = useState(0);
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
