// --- 2. Компонент для отображения списка предупреждений (без изменений) ---
const ClanWarningsList = ({ warnings, clanId, onWarningDeleted }) => {
    // ... код компонента, как и в прошлый раз ...
    const { authToken } = useAuth();
    const [confirmModalOpen, setConfirmModalOpen] = useState(false);
    const [warningToDelete, setWarningToDelete] = useState(null);
    const [isActionLoading, setIsActionLoading] = useState(false);

    const handleOpenDeleteModal = (warning) => {
        setWarningToDelete(warning);
        setConfirmModalOpen(true);
    };

    const handleConfirmDelete = async () => {
        if (!warningToDelete) return;
        setIsActionLoading(true);
        try {
            await axios.delete(`/api/clans/${clanId}/members/warnings/${warningToDelete.id}`, {
                headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` },
            });
            toast.success('Warning has been revoked.');
            onWarningDeleted();
        } catch (err) {
            toast.error(err.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to revoke warning.');
        } finally {
            setIsActionLoading(false);
            setConfirmModalOpen(false);
        }
    };


    if (!warnings || warnings.length === 0) {
        return (
            <Sheet variant="outlined" sx={{ p: 2, borderRadius: 'md', textAlign: 'center' }}>
                <Typography>No warnings have been issued in this clan.</Typography>
            </Sheet>
        );
    }

    return (
        <>
            <Sheet variant="outlined" sx={{ p: { xs: 1, md: 2 }, borderRadius: 'md' }}>
                <List sx={{ '--ListItem-paddingY': '1rem' }}>
                    {warnings.map((warning, index) => (
                        <React.Fragment key={warning.id}>
                            <ListItem endAction={
                                <Tooltip title="Revoke Warning">
                                    <IconButton size="sm" color="danger" variant="plain" onClick={() => handleOpenDeleteModal(warning)}>
                                        <DeleteForeverIcon />
                                    </IconButton>
                                </Tooltip>
                            }>
                                <ListItemDecorator>
                                    <Avatar src={constructImageUrl(warning.target.pfp_url)} />
                                </ListItemDecorator>
                                <ListItemContent>
                                    <Typography level="title-sm">
                                        <JoyLink component={RouterLink} to={`/users/${warning.actor.profile_slug || warning.actor.id}`}>
                                            {warning.actor.username}
                                        </JoyLink>
                                        {' '}issued a warning to{' '}
                                        <JoyLink component={RouterLink} to={`/users/${warning.target.profile_slug || warning.target.id}`}>
                                            {warning.target.username}
                                        </JoyLink>
                                    </Typography>
                                    <Typography level="body-xs">
                                        {new Date(warning.created_at).toLocaleString()}
                                    </Typography>
                                    <Sheet variant="soft" sx={{ p: 1.5, mt: 1, borderRadius: 'sm' }}>
                                        <Typography level="body-md">"{warning.reason}"</Typography>
                                    </Sheet>
                                </ListItemContent>
                            </ListItem>
                            {index < warnings.length - 1 && <Divider component="li" />}
                        </React.Fragment>
                    ))}
                </List>
            </Sheet>
            <ConfirmationModal open={confirmModalOpen} onClose={() => setConfirmModalOpen(false)} onConfirm={handleConfirmDelete} title="Confirm Warning Revoke" content={`Are you sure you want to revoke this warning for "${warningToDelete?.target.username}"? This action cannot be undone.`} confirmText="Revoke" confirmColor="danger" loading={isActionLoading} />
        </>
    );
};

// --- 3. Создаем новый компонент для управления приглашениями ---
const ClanInvitationsManager = ({ invitations, clanId, onInviteCancelled }) => {
    const { authToken } = useAuth();
    const [confirmModalOpen, setConfirmModalOpen] = useState(false);
    const [inviteToCancel, setInviteToCancel] = useState(null);
    const [isActionLoading, setIsActionLoading] = useState(false);

    const handleOpenCancelModal = (invite) => {
        setInviteToCancel(invite);
        setConfirmModalOpen(true);
    };

    const handleConfirmCancel = async () => {
        if (!inviteToCancel) return;
        setIsActionLoading(true);
        try {
            await axios.delete(`/api/clans/${clanId}/invitations/${inviteToCancel.id}`, {
                headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` },
            });
            toast.success(`Invitation for ${inviteToCancel.invitee.username} cancelled.`);
            onInviteCancelled();
        } catch (err) {
            toast.error(err.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to cancel invitation.');
        } finally {
            setIsActionLoading(false);
            setConfirmModalOpen(false);
        }
    };

    if (!invitations || invitations.length === 0) {
        return (
            <Sheet variant="outlined" sx={{ p: 2, borderRadius: 'md', textAlign: 'center' }}>
                <Typography>No pending invitations.</Typography>
            </Sheet>
        );
    }

    return (
        <>
            <Sheet variant="outlined" sx={{ p: { xs: 1, md: 2 }, borderRadius: 'md' }}>
                <List sx={{ '--ListItem-paddingY': '1rem' }}>
                    {invitations.map((invite, index) => (
                        <React.Fragment key={invite.id}>
                            <ListItem endAction={
                                <Button size="sm" color="danger" variant="outlined" onClick={() => handleOpenCancelModal(invite)}>
                                    Cancel
                                </Button>
                            }>
                                <ListItemDecorator>
                                    <Avatar src={constructImageUrl(invite.invitee.pfp_url)} />
                                </ListItemDecorator>
                                <ListItemContent>
                                    <Typography level="title-sm">
                                        Invitation sent to{' '}
                                        <JoyLink component={RouterLink} to={`/users/${invite.invitee.profile_slug || invite.invitee.id}`}>
                                            {invite.invitee.username}
                                        </JoyLink>
                                    </Typography>
                                    <Typography level="body-xs">
                                        Sent by {invite.inviter.username} ・ Expires {formatDistanceToNow(new Date(invite.expires_at), { addSuffix: true })}
                                    </Typography>
                                </ListItemContent>
                            </ListItem>
                            {index < invitations.length - 1 && <Divider component="li" />}
                        </React.Fragment>
                    ))}
                </List>
            </Sheet>
            <ConfirmationModal
                open={confirmModalOpen}
                onClose={() => setConfirmModalOpen(false)}
                onConfirm={handleConfirmCancel}
                title="Confirm Cancellation"
                content={`Are you sure you want to cancel the invitation for "${inviteToCancel?.invitee.username}"?`}
                confirmText="Cancel Invite"
                confirmColor="danger"
                loading={isActionLoading}
            />
        </>
    );
};


function ManageClanPage() {
    const { tag } = useParams();
    const { authToken, user: currentUser } = useAuth();
    const [clan, setClan] = useState(null);
    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    const [error, setError] = useState(null);
    const [details, setDetails] = useState({
        description: '', join_type: 'closed', card_image_url: '',
        card_icon_url: '', card_color: '#32383E', text_color: '#F0F4F8',
    });
    const [template, setTemplate] = useState([]);
    const [applications, setApplications] = useState([]);
    const [warnings, setWarnings] = useState([]);
    // --- 4. Добавляем новое состояние для приглашений ---
    const [invitations, setInvitations] = useState([]);
    const [isTransferModalOpen, setIsTransferModalOpen] = useState(false);

    const [isSavingDetails, setIsSavingDetails] = useState(false);
    const [isSavingTemplate, setIsSavingTemplate] = useState(false);
    const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState(0);

    const [cropperOpen, setCropperOpen] = useState(false);
    const [imageToCrop, setImageToCrop] = useState(null);
    const [cropAspect, setCropAspect] = useState(1);
    const [cropType, setCropType] = useState('icon'); // 'icon' или 'banner'

    const iconInputRef = useRef(null);
    const bannerInputRef = useRef(null);

    // --- 2. Добавляем определение мобильного устройства ---
    const theme = useTheme();
    // isMobile будет true, если ширина экрана меньше 900px (breakpoint 'md')
    const isMobile = useMediaQuery(theme.breakpoints.down('md'));


    const fetchClanData = useCallback(async () => {
        setLoading(true);
        setError(null);
        try {
            const response = await axios.get(`/api/clans/${tag}/management-data`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } });
            const fetchedClan = response.data.clan;
            setClan(fetchedClan);
            setDetails({
                description: fetchedClan.description || '', join_type: fetchedClan.join_type,
                card_image_url: fetchedClan.card_image_url || '', card_icon_url: fetchedClan.card_icon_url || '',
                card_color: fetchedClan.card_color, text_color: fetchedClan.text_color,
            });
            setApplications(response.data.applications);
            setTemplate(fetchedClan.application_template || []);

            // Сразу подгружаем данные для активной вкладки
            const currentTab = activeTab; // Сохраняем текущую вкладку
            if (currentTab === 3) await fetchWarnings(fetchedClan.id);
            if (currentTab === 4) await fetchInvitations(fetchedClan.id);

        } catch (err) {
            setError(err.response?.data?.message || "Failed to load clan management data.");
        } finally {
            setLoading(false);
        }
    }, [tag, authToken, activeTab]);

    const fetchWarnings = useCallback(async (clanId) => {
        try {
            const response = await axios.get(`/api/clans/${clanId}/members/warnings`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } });
            setWarnings(response.data);
        } catch (err) { toast.error("Could not load clan warnings."); }
    }, [authToken]);

    // --- 5. Создаем функцию для загрузки приглашений ---
    const fetchInvitations = useCallback(async (clanId) => {
        try {
            const response = await axios.get(`/api/clans/${clanId}/invitations/sent`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } });
            setInvitations(response.data);
        } catch (err) { toast.error("Could not load sent invitations."); }
    }, [authToken]);

    useEffect(() => {
        if (currentUser && !clan) {
            setLoading(true);
            fetchClanData();
        }
    }, [fetchClanData, currentUser, clan]);

    useEffect(() => {
        if (clan?.id) {
            if (activeTab === 3) fetchWarnings(clan.id);
            if (activeTab === 4) fetchInvitations(clan.id); // <-- Загружаем инвайты при переключении
        }
    }, [activeTab, clan, fetchWarnings, fetchInvitations]);

    // ... (остальные обработчики без изменений) ...
    const handleDetailsChange = (e) => {
        const { name, value } = e.target;
        setDetails(prev => ({ ...prev, [name]: value }));
    };
    const handleJoinTypeChange = (_, newValue) => {
        setDetails(prev => ({ ...prev, join_type: newValue }));
    };
    const handleFileChange = (event, type) => {
        const file = event.target.files[0];
        if (!file) return;

        setCropAspect(type === 'icon' ? 1 : 16 / 5); // 1:1 для иконки, 16:5 для баннера
        setCropType(type);

        const reader = new FileReader();
        reader.addEventListener('load', () => {
            setImageToCrop(reader.result?.toString() || '');
            setCropperOpen(true);
        });
        reader.readAsDataURL(file);
        event.target.value = null; // Сбрасываем инпут, чтобы можно было выбрать тот же файл снова
    };

    const handleCropComplete = async (croppedImageBlob) => {
        if (!croppedImageBlob) {
            setCropperOpen(false);
            return;
        }

        const endpoint = cropType === 'icon' ? '/api/media/clan-icon' : '/api/media/clan-banner';
        const formData = new FormData();
        formData.append('file', croppedImageBlob, `${cropType}.png`);

        const toastId = toast.loading(`Uploading ${cropType}...`);

        try {
            const response = await axios.post(endpoint, formData, {
                headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` },
            });

            const fieldToUpdate = cropType === 'icon' ? 'card_icon_url' : 'card_image_url';
            setDetails(prev => ({ ...prev, [fieldToUpdate]: response.data.url }));

            toast.success(`${cropType.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + cropType.slice(1)} updated!`, { id: toastId });
        } catch (err) {
            toast.error(`Failed to upload ${cropType}.`, { id: toastId });
        } finally {
            setCropperOpen(false);
            setImageToCrop(null);
        }
    };
    const handleDetailsSave = async (e) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        setIsSavingDetails(true);
        try {
            await axios.patch(`/api/clans/${tag}/details`, details, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } });
            toast.success('Clan details updated!');
        } catch (err) {
            toast.error(err.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to update details.');
        } finally {
            setIsSavingDetails(false);
        }
    };
    const addField = () => setTemplate([...template, { label: '', type: 'text' }]);
    const removeField = (index) => setTemplate(template.filter((_, i) => i !== index));
    const updateFieldLabel = (index, newLabel) => {
        const newTemplate = [...template];
        newTemplate[index].label = newLabel;
        setTemplate(newTemplate);
    };
    const handleSaveTemplate = async () => {
        setIsSavingTemplate(true);
        try {
            await axios.patch(`/api/clans/${clan.id}/settings`, { application_template: template }, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } });
            toast.success('Application form template saved!');
        } catch (err) {
            toast.error(err.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to save template.');
        } finally {
            setIsSavingTemplate(false);
        }
    };

    if (loading) return <CircularProgress />;
    if (error) return <Alert color="danger">{error}</Alert>;
    if (!clan) return null;

    const tabData = [
        { label: 'Settings', icon: <SettingsIcon />, content: applications.length },
        { label: 'Roles', icon: <SecurityIcon /> },
        { label: 'Applications', icon: <AssignmentIndIcon />, count: applications.length },
        { label: 'Warnings', icon: <WarningAmberIcon />, count: warnings.length },
        { label: 'Invitations', icon: <MailOutlineIcon />, count: invitations.length },
    ];

    return (
        <Box>
            <Breadcrumbs separator={<ChevronRightIcon />} sx={{ mb: 2 }}>
                <JoyLink component={RouterLink} to="/"><HomeIcon /></JoyLink>
                <JoyLink component={RouterLink} to="/clans">Clans</JoyLink>
                <JoyLink component={RouterLink} to={`/clans/${clan.tag}`}>{clan.name}</JoyLink>
                <Typography>Manage</Typography>
            </Breadcrumbs>
            <Typography level="h2" component="h1" sx={{ mb: 2 }}>
                Manage Clan: {clan.name}
            </Typography>

            {/* --- 6. Добавляем новую вкладку --- */}
            <Tabs value={activeTab} onChange={(event, newValue) => setActiveTab(newValue)}>
                <TabList>
                    {tabData.map((tab, index) =>
                        isMobile ? (
                            // ВЕРСИЯ ДЛЯ МОБИЛЬНЫХ (только иконка с подсказкой)
                            <Tooltip title={`${tab.label}${tab.count !== undefined ? ` (${tab.count})` : ''}`} key={index}>
                                <Tab sx={{ flex: 1 }}>{tab.icon}</Tab>
                            </Tooltip>
                        ) : (
                            // ВЕРСИЯ ДЛЯ ПК (иконка и текст)
                            <Tab key={index} sx={{ flex: 1 }}>
                                <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 1 }}>
                                    {tab.icon}
                                    {tab.label}
                                    {tab.count !== undefined && `(${tab.count})`}
                                </Box>
                            </Tab>
                        )
                    )}
                </TabList>
                {/* ... (TabPanel для Settings, Roles, Applications, Warnings без изменений) ... */}
                <TabPanel value={0}>
                    <Grid container spacing={3} sx={{ mt: 1 }}>
                        <Grid xs={12} md={7}>
                            <Sheet variant="outlined" sx={{ p: { xs: 2, md: 3 }, borderRadius: 'md' }} component="form" onSubmit={handleDetailsSave}>
                                <Typography level="h4" component="h2" sx={{ mb: 2 }}> General Settings </Typography>
                                <Stack spacing={2}>
                                    <FormControl>
                                        <FormLabel>Description</FormLabel>
                                        <Textarea name="description" minRows={3} value={details.description} onChange={handleDetailsChange} />
                                    </FormControl>
                                    <FormControl>
                                        <FormLabel>Join Method</FormLabel>
                                        <Select value={details.join_type} onChange={handleJoinTypeChange}>
                                            <Option value="closed">Closed (Invite Only)</Option>
                                            <Option value="application">By Application</Option>
                                            <Option value="open">Open to Everyone</Option>
                                        </Select>
                                    </FormControl>
                                    <FormControl>
                                        <FormLabel>Card Banner</FormLabel>
                                        <AspectRatio ratio="16/5" sx={{ width: '100%', borderRadius: 'md', bgcolor: 'background.level1' }}>
                                            <img
                                                src={constructImageUrl(details.card_image_url) || '/placeholders/banner_placeholder.png'}
                                                alt="Clan Banner Preview"
                                                style={{ objectFit: 'cover' }}
                                            />
                                        </AspectRatio>
                                        <Button
                                            startDecorator={<EditIcon />}
                                            variant="outlined"
                                            color="neutral"
                                            onClick={() => bannerInputRef.current.click()}
                                            sx={{ mt: 1, alignSelf: 'flex-start' }}
                                        >
                                            Change Banner
                                        </Button>
                                        <input type="file" ref={bannerInputRef} hidden accept="image/*" onChange={(e) => handleFileChange(e, 'banner')} />
                                    </FormControl>

                                    <FormControl>
                                        <FormLabel>Card Icon</FormLabel>
                                        <Stack direction="row" spacing={2} alignItems="center">
                                            <Avatar
                                                src={constructImageUrl(details.card_icon_url)}
                                                sx={{ '--Avatar-size': '80px' }}
                                            />
                                            <Button
                                                startDecorator={<EditIcon />}
                                                variant="outlined"
                                                color="neutral"
                                                onClick={() => iconInputRef.current.click()}
                                            >
                                                Change Icon
                                            </Button>
                                            <input type="file" ref={iconInputRef} hidden accept="image/*" onChange={(e) => handleFileChange(e, 'icon')} />
                                        </Stack>
                                    </FormControl>
                                    {/*
                                        <Stack direction="row" spacing={2}>
                                            <FormControl sx={{ flex: 1 }}>
                                                <FormLabel>Card Color</FormLabel>
                                                <Input type="color" name="card_color" value={details.card_color} onChange={handleDetailsChange} />
                                            </FormControl>
                                            <FormControl sx={{ flex: 1 }}>
                                                <FormLabel>Text Color</FormLabel>
                                                <Input type="color" name="text_color" value={details.text_color} onChange={handleDetailsChange} />
                                            </FormControl>
                                        </Stack>
                                    */}

                                    <Button type="submit" loading={isSavingDetails} sx={{ alignSelf: 'flex-start' }}>Save Settings</Button>
                                </Stack>
                            </Sheet>
                        </Grid>
                        <Grid xs={12} md={5}>
                            <Sheet variant="outlined" sx={{ p: { xs: 2, md: 3 }, borderRadius: 'md', height: '100%' }}>
                                <Typography level="h4" component="h2" sx={{ mb: 1 }}>Application Form Builder</Typography>
                                <Typography sx={{ mb: 2 }}>Create the form that players will fill out to apply.</Typography>
                                <Stack spacing={1.5} sx={{ mb: 2 }}>
                                    {template.map((field, index) => (
                                        <Stack key={index} direction="row" spacing={1} alignItems="center">
                                            <FormControl sx={{ flexGrow: 1 }}>
                                                <FormLabel>Field #{index + 1} Label</FormLabel>
                                                <Input value={field.label} onChange={(e) => updateFieldLabel(index, e.target.value)} placeholder="e.g., Your age" />
                                            </FormControl>
                                            <IconButton color="danger" variant="plain" onClick={() => removeField(index)} sx={{ mt: '24px' }}><DeleteForeverIcon /></IconButton>
                                        </Stack>
                                    ))}
                                </Stack>
                                <Stack direction="row" spacing={2}>
                                    <Button startDecorator={<AddIcon />} onClick={addField} variant="outlined" color="neutral">Add Field</Button>
                                    <Button onClick={handleSaveTemplate} loading={isSavingTemplate}>Save Template</Button>
                                </Stack>
                            </Sheet>
                        </Grid>
                    </Grid>
                    {currentUser?.id === clan.owner_id && (
                        <Sheet variant="outlined" color="danger" sx={{ p: { xs: 2, md: 3 }, borderRadius: 'md', mt: 3 }}>
                            <Typography level="h4" component="h2" textColor="danger.500">
                                Danger Zone
                            </Typography>
                            <Divider sx={{ my: 1.5 }} />
                            <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'center' }}>
                                <Box>
                                    <Typography fontWeight="lg">Transfer Ownership</Typography>
                                    <Typography level="body-sm">Transfer this clan to another member. This action is irreversible.</Typography>
                                </Box>
                                <Button
                                    color="danger"
                                    variant="outlined"
                                    onClick={() => setIsTransferModalOpen(true)}
                                >
                                    Transfer...
                                </Button>
                            </Box>
                        </Sheet>
                    )}
                </TabPanel>
                <TabPanel value={1}>
                    <Box sx={{ mt: 2 }}> <ClanRoleManager clan={clan} onRolesUpdate={fetchClanData} /> </Box>
                </TabPanel>
                <TabPanel value={2}>
                    <Box sx={{ mt: 2 }}> <ClanApplicationsList applications={applications} onUpdate={fetchClanData} /> </Box>
                </TabPanel>
                <TabPanel value={3}>
                    <Box sx={{ mt: 2 }}> <ClanWarningsList warnings={warnings} clanId={clan.id} onWarningDeleted={fetchClanData} /> </Box>
                </TabPanel>

                {/* --- 7. Добавляем новую панель для приглашений --- */}
                <TabPanel value={4}>
                    <Box sx={{ mt: 2 }}>
                        <ClanInvitationsManager
                            invitations={invitations}
                            clanId={clan.id}
                            onInviteCancelled={fetchClanData}
                        />
                    </Box>
                </TabPanel>
            </Tabs>
            {clan && (
                <TransferOwnershipModal
                    open={isTransferModalOpen}
                    onClose={() => setIsTransferModalOpen(false)}
                    clan={clan}
                    onSuccess={() => {
                        setIsTransferModalOpen(false);
                        // Перенаправляем на страницу клана, так как пользователь больше не менеджер
                        navigate(`/clans/${clan.tag}`);
                    }}
                />
            )}
            <ImageCropperModal
                open={cropperOpen}
                onClose={() => setCropperOpen(false)}
                imageSrc={imageToCrop}
                onCropComplete={handleCropComplete}
                aspect={cropAspect}
            />
        </Box >
    );
}

export default ManageClanPage;
--- END FILE: frontend/src/pages/ManageClanPage.jsx ---



--- START FILE: frontend/src/pages/MessagesPage.jsx ---

// frontend/src/pages/MessagesPage.js

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Link as RouterLink } from 'react-router-dom';
import axios from 'axios';
import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext';
import {
    Typography,
    CircularProgress,
    Alert,
    Box,
    List,
    ListItem,
    ListItemDecorator,
    ListItemContent,
    ListItemButton,
    Avatar,
    Stack,
} from '@mui/joy';
import { constructImageUrl } from '../utils/url';
import CircleIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Circle';

function MessagesPage() {
    const { authToken, socket } = useAuth();
    const [friends, setFriends] = useState([]);
    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    const [error, setError] = useState(null);

    useEffect(() => {
        if (!authToken) return;

        const fetchFriends = async () => {
            try {
                const config = { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } };
                const response = await axios.get(`/api/friendships`, config);
                setFriends(response.data);
            } catch (err) {
                setError('Failed to load contacts.');
            } finally {
                setLoading(false);
            }
        };
        fetchFriends();
    }, [authToken]);

    useEffect(() => {
        if (!socket) return;

        const handleStatusUpdate = (data) => {
            setFriends(prevFriends =>
                prevFriends.map(friend =>
                    friend.user.id === data.userId
                        ? { ...friend, user: { ...friend.user, is_minecraft_online: data.is_minecraft_online } }
                        : friend
                )
            );
        };

        socket.on('userStatusUpdate', handleStatusUpdate);

        return () => {
            socket.off('userStatusUpdate', handleStatusUpdate);
        };
    }, [socket]);

    if (loading) return <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', mt: 4 }}><CircularProgress /></Box>;
    if (error) return <Alert color="danger">{error}</Alert>;

    return (
        <Box>
            <Typography level='h2' component="h1" sx={{ mb: 3 }}>Messages</Typography>
            <Typography level="body-lg" sx={{ mb: 2 }}>Select a friend to start a conversation.</Typography>
            <List variant="outlined" sx={{ borderRadius: 'sm', p: 0 }}>
                {friends.length > 0 ? (
                    friends.map(item => (
                        <ListItem key={item.friendshipId}>
                            <ListItemButton component={RouterLink} to={`/messages/${item.user.id}`} sx={{ p: 1.5 }}>
                                {/* --- ИЗМЕНЕНИЕ ЗДЕСЬ --- */}
                                {/* Добавляем правый отступ (margin-right) к декоратору с аватаркой */}
                                <ListItemDecorator sx={{ mr: 0.5 }}>
                                    <Avatar src={constructImageUrl(item.user.pfp_url)} />
                                </ListItemDecorator>
                                {/* --- КОНЕЦ ИЗМЕНЕНИЯ --- */}
                                <ListItemContent>
                                    <Stack>
                                        <Typography sx={{ color: item.user.rank?.display_color }}>
                                            {item.user.username}
                                        </Typography>
                                        {item.user.minecraft_username && (
                                            <Typography
                                                level="body-xs"
                                                startDecorator={<CircleIcon sx={{ fontSize: '8px' }} />}
                                                sx={{ color: item.user.is_minecraft_online ? 'success.400' : 'text.tertiary' }}
                                            >
                                                {item.user.is_minecraft_online ? 'Online' : 'Offline'}
                                            </Typography>
                                        )}
                                    </Stack>
                                </ListItemContent>
                            </ListItemButton>
                        </ListItem>
                    ))
                ) : (
                    <Typography sx={{ p: 2 }}>You need to add friends to start a conversation.</Typography>
                )}
            </List>
        </Box>
    );
}

export default MessagesPage;
--- END FILE: frontend/src/pages/MessagesPage.jsx ---



--- START FILE: frontend/src/pages/MyProfilePage.jsx ---

// frontend/src/pages/MyProfilePage.js

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext';
import {
    Box, Typography, Sheet, Avatar, CircularProgress, Alert, Divider, Button, Chip, Stack,
    useTheme,
    Grid, AspectRatio
} from '@mui/joy';
import { useMediaQuery } from '@mui/material';
import EditIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Edit';
import AddIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Add';
import { Link as RouterLink } from 'react-router-dom';
import ThumbUpOffAltIcon from '@mui/icons-material/ThumbUpOffAlt';
import { constructImageUrl } from '../utils/url';
import CircleIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Circle';
import UserPostsList from '../components/UserPostsList';
import VerifiedIcons from '../components/VerifiedIcons';
// [!code focus start]
// 1. ИМПОРТИРУЕМ НАШ КОМПОНЕНТ
import MinecraftAvatar from '../components/MinecraftAvatar';
// [!code focus end]

// Вспомогательная функция для определения цвета текста
function isColorLight(hexColor) {
    if (!hexColor) return false;
    const hex = hexColor.replace('#', '');
    const r = parseInt(hex.substring(0, 2), 16);
    const g = parseInt(hex.substring(2, 4), 16);
    const b = parseInt(hex.substring(4, 6), 16);
    const brightness = ((r * 299) + (g * 587) + (b * 114)) / 1000;
    return brightness > 155;
}

function MyProfilePage() {
    const { user: profile, loading: authLoading, error: authError, socket, updateAuthToken } = useAuth();
    const [error, setError] = useState(authError);
    const loading = authLoading;
    const theme = useTheme();
    const isMobile = useMediaQuery(theme.breakpoints.down('sm'));

    useEffect(() => {
        if (!socket) return;
        const handleStatusUpdate = (data) => {
            if (profile && data.userId === profile.id) {
                const newToken = localStorage.getItem('authToken');
                if (newToken) {
                     updateAuthToken(newToken);
                }
            }
        };
        socket.on('userStatusUpdate', handleStatusUpdate);
        return () => {
            socket.off('userStatusUpdate', handleStatusUpdate);
        };
    }, [socket, profile, updateAuthToken]);

    if (loading) return <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', mt: 4 }}><CircularProgress size="lg" /></Box>;
    if (error) return <Alert color="danger" sx={{ mt: 2 }}>{error}</Alert>;
    if (!profile) return <Typography>Could not load profile.</Typography>;

    return (
        <Box>
            <Sheet variant="outlined" sx={{ borderRadius: 'md', py: { xs: 2, sm: 3, md: 4 } }}>
                <Box sx={{ position: 'relative', px: { xs: 2, sm: 3, md: 4 } }}>
                     <AspectRatio ratio="16/5" sx={{ width: '100%', borderRadius: 'sm', bgcolor: 'background.level1' }}>
                        {profile.banner_url ? (
                            <img
                                src={constructImageUrl(profile.banner_url)}
                                 alt={`${profile.username}'s banner`}
                                style={{ objectFit: 'cover' }}
                            />
                     ) : (
                            <Box sx={{ background: 'linear-gradient(180deg, var(--joy-palette-neutral-700), var(--joy-palette-neutral-800))' }} />
                        )}
                    </AspectRatio>
                    <Box
                         sx={{
                            position: 'absolute', bottom: 0, left: 0, right: 0, height: '20%',
                            background: 'linear-gradient(to top, var(--joy-palette-background-level1), transparent)',
                         }}
                    />
                </Box>

                <Box sx={{
                    display: 'flex',
                    flexDirection: { xs: 'column', sm: 'row' },
                    alignItems: { xs: 'center', sm: 'flex-end' },
                    gap: { md: 3, xs: 1 },
                    mt: { xs: -4, sm: -6 },
                    position: 'relative',
                     px: { xs: 2, sm: 5, md: 8 }
                }}>
                    <Avatar
                        src={constructImageUrl(profile.pfp_url)}
                         sx={{
                            '--Avatar-size': { xs: '80px', sm: '128px' },
                            border: '2px solid',
                            borderColor: 'background.body',
                            boxShadow: 'sm',
                            mx: { xs: 'auto', sm: 0 },
                        }}
                     />
                    <Box sx={{ textAlign: { xs: 'center', sm: 'left' }, flexGrow: 1 }}>
                        {/* [!code focus start] */}
                        {/* --- 2. ДОБАВЛЯЕМ MinecraftAvatar РЯДОМ С ИМЕНЕМ --- */}
                        <Typography level="h2" component="h1" sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 1, justifyContent: { xs: 'center', sm: 'flex-start' } }}>
                            {profile.minecraft_uuid && <MinecraftAvatar user={profile} size={32} />}
                            {profile.username}
                            <VerifiedIcons user={profile} />
                        </Typography>
                        {/* [!code focus end] */}
                         <Stack direction="row" spacing={1} sx={{ mt: 0.5, justifyContent: { xs: 'center', sm: 'flex-start' }, flexWrap: 'wrap', gap: 1 }}>
                            {profile.rank && <Chip sx={{ backgroundColor: profile.rank.display_color, color: isColorLight(profile.rank.display_color) ? '#000' : '#FFF' }}>{profile.rank.name}</Chip>}
                            <Chip color="neutral" variant="outlined" startDecorator={<ThumbUpOffAltIcon />}>Reputation: {profile.reputation_count}</Chip>
                         </Stack>
                    </Box>
                    <Stack alignItems={ { xs: 'center', md: 'flex-end' } } gap={1}>
                        {profile.minecraft_username && <Chip variant="soft" color={profile.is_minecraft_online ? 'success' : 'neutral'} startDecorator={<CircleIcon sx={{ fontSize: '10px' }} />}>{profile.minecraft_username} ({profile.is_minecraft_online ? 'Online' : 'Offline'})</Chip>}
                        <Stack
                            direction="row"
                            spacing={1}
                             sx={{
                                width: { xs: '100%', sm: 'auto' },
                                flexShrink: 0
                             }}
                        >
                            <Button component={RouterLink} to="/posts/new" variant="solid" color="primary" startDecorator={<AddIcon />} sx={{ flexGrow: 1 }}>
                                New Post
                             </Button>
                            <Button component={RouterLink} to="/profile/settings" variant="outlined" color="neutral" startDecorator={<EditIcon />} sx={{ flexGrow: 1 }}>
                                Edit Profile
                             </Button>
                        </Stack>
                    </Stack>

                </Box>

                <Divider sx={{ my: 3 }} />

                 <Typography level="body-lg" sx={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap', px: { xs: 2, sm: 3, md: 4 } }}>
                    {profile.description || 'No description provided.'}
                </Typography>
            </Sheet>
            <Box sx={{ mt: 4 }}>
                <Typography level="h2" component="h2" sx={{ mb: 2 }}>
                    My Posts
                </Typography>
                <UserPostsList userId={profile.id} />
            </Box>
        </Box>
    );
}

export default MyProfilePage;
--- END FILE: frontend/src/pages/MyProfilePage.jsx ---



--- START FILE: frontend/src/pages/NewsPage.jsx ---

// frontend/src/pages/NewsPage.js

import React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
import { Link as RouterLink, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import axios from 'axios';
import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext';
import {
    Typography, List, ListItem, CircularProgress, Alert, Box, Sheet, Divider, Button,
    useTheme, IconButton, Tooltip, Stack, Link as JoyLink
} from '@mui/joy';
import { useMediaQuery } from '@mui/material';
import PersonIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Person';
import CalendarTodayIcon from '@mui/icons-material/CalendarToday';
import AddIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Add';
import EditIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Edit';
import DeleteForeverIcon from '@mui/icons-material/DeleteForever';
import toast from 'react-hot-toast';
import ConfirmationModal from '../components/ConfirmationModal';
import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
import { listContainer, fadeInUp } from '../utils/animations';


// Компонент для превью, как в PostsPage
const NewsPreview = ({ htmlContent }) => {
    const imagePlaceholder = ' - 🖼️ - ';
    const contentWithPlaceholders = htmlContent.replace(/<img[^>]*>/g, imagePlaceholder);
    const textContent = (() => {
        const doc = new DOMParser().parseFromString(contentWithPlaceholders, 'text/html');
        return doc.body.textContent || "";
    })();
    return (
        <Typography
            level="body-md"
            sx={{ mb: 2, display: '-webkit-box', WebkitLineClamp: 3, WebkitBoxOrient: 'vertical', overflow: 'hidden', textOverflow: 'ellipsis', wordBreak: 'break-word' }}
        >
            {textContent.trim()}
        </Typography>
    );
};

function NewsPage() {
    const [news, setNews] = useState([]);
    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    const [error, setError] = useState(null);
    const { user: currentUser, authToken } = useAuth();
    const navigate = useNavigate();
    
    const canCreateNews = currentUser?.rank?.power_level >= 800;
    
    // Состояния для модального окна
    const [modalOpen, setModalOpen] = useState(false);
    const [itemToDelete, setItemToDelete] = useState(null);
    const [isActionLoading, setIsActionLoading] = useState(false);

    const fetchNews = useCallback(async () => {
        try {
            const response = await axios.get('/api/news');
            setNews(response.data);
        } catch (err) {
            setError('Failed to load news. The server might be down.');
        } finally {
            setLoading(false);
        }
    }, []);

    useEffect(() => {
        fetchNews();
    }, [fetchNews]);

    const openDeleteModal = (article) => {
        setItemToDelete(article);
        setModalOpen(true);
    };

    const confirmDelete = async () => {
        if (!itemToDelete) return;
        setIsActionLoading(true);
        try {
            await axios.delete(`/api/news/${itemToDelete.id}`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } });
            toast.success('News article deleted.');
            fetchNews();
        } catch (err) {
            toast.error('Failed to delete article.');
        } finally {
            setIsActionLoading(false);
            setModalOpen(false);
        }
    };
    
    if (loading) return <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', mt: 4 }}><CircularProgress size="lg" /></Box>;
    if (error) return <Alert color="danger" sx={{ mt: 2 }}>{error}</Alert>;

    return (
        <Box>
             <Box sx={{ 
                display: 'flex', 
                flexDirection: { xs: 'column', sm: 'row' },
                justifyContent: 'space-between', 
                alignItems: { xs: 'flex-start', sm: 'center' }, 
                mb: 2,
                gap: 2
            }}>
                <Typography level='h2' component="h1">
                    Server News
                </Typography>
                
                {canCreateNews && (
                     <Button 
                        component={RouterLink} 
                        to="/admin/news/create" 
                        startDecorator={<AddIcon />}
                        sx={{ width: { xs: '100%', sm: 'auto' } }}
                    >
                         Create News
                    </Button>
                )}
            </Box>

            <motion.div
                variants={listContainer}
                initial="initial"
                animate="animate"
            >
                <List variant="outlined" sx={{ borderRadius: 'sm', bgcolor: 'background.body', p: 0 }}>
                     {news.length > 0 ? (
                        news.map((article, index) => (
                            <motion.div key={article.id} variants={fadeInUp}>
                                <React.Fragment>
                                     <ListItem>
                                        <Sheet sx={{ p: {xs: 1.5, sm: 2}, flexGrow: 1, bgcolor: 'transparent' }}>
                                            <Stack direction="row" justifyContent="space-between" alignItems="flex-start" sx={{ mb: 1 }}>
                                                <Typography level="title-lg" component="h2">
                                                    <JoyLink component={RouterLink} to={`/news/${article.id}`} overlay sx={{ textDecoration: 'none' }}>
                                                        {article.name}
                                                    </JoyLink>
                                                </Typography>
                                                {canCreateNews && (
                                                    <Stack direction="row" spacing={0.5} sx={{ ml: 2 }}>
                                                        <Tooltip title="Edit News">
                                                            <IconButton size="sm" color="neutral" variant="plain" onClick={() => navigate(`/admin/news/${article.id}/edit`)}>
                                                                <EditIcon />
                                                            </IconButton>
                                                        </Tooltip>
                                                        <Tooltip title="Delete News">
                                                            <IconButton size="sm" color="danger" variant="plain" onClick={() => openDeleteModal(article)}>
                                                                <DeleteForeverIcon />
                                                            </IconButton>
                                                        </Tooltip>
                                                    </Stack>
                                                )}
                                            </Stack>
                                            
                                            <NewsPreview htmlContent={article.desc} />
                                            
                                             <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', gap: 2, flexWrap: 'wrap', alignItems: 'center', color: 'text.tertiary' }}>
                                                <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 0.5 }}>
                                                     <PersonIcon fontSize="sm" />
                                                    <Typography level="body-sm">
                                                         {article.author ? article.author.username : 'System'}
                                                    </Typography>
                                                 </Box>
                                                <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 0.5 }}>
                                                     <CalendarTodayIcon fontSize="sm" />
                                                    <Typography level="body-sm">
                                                             {new Date(article.created_at).toLocaleDateString()}
                                                             </Typography>
                                                </Box>
                                            </Box>
                                     </Sheet>
                                    </ListItem>
                                    {index < news.length - 1 && <Divider component="li" />}
                                 </React.Fragment>
                            </motion.div>
                        ))
                    ) : (
                        <ListItem>
                             <Typography sx={{ p: 2 }}>No news articles found.</Typography>
                        </ListItem>
                    )}
                </List>
            </motion.div>
            <ConfirmationModal
                open={modalOpen}
                onClose={() => setModalOpen(false)}
                onConfirm={confirmDelete}
                title="Confirm Deletion"
                content={`Are you sure you want to delete the article "${itemToDelete?.name}"?`}
                confirmText="Delete"
                confirmColor="danger"
                loading={isActionLoading}
            />
        </Box>
    );
}

export default NewsPage;
--- END FILE: frontend/src/pages/NewsPage.jsx ---



--- START FILE: frontend/src/pages/PlayersPage.jsx ---

// frontend/src/pages/PlayersPage.js

import React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
import { Link as RouterLink } from 'react-router-dom';
import axios from 'axios';
import {
    Typography, CircularProgress, Alert, Box, Grid, Card, CardContent, Avatar, Chip, AspectRatio,
    FormControl, FormLabel, Select, Option, Stack,
} from '@mui/joy';
import { constructImageUrl } from '../utils/url';
import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext';
import CircleIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Circle';
import JoyPagination from '../components/JoyPagination';
// [!code focus start]
// --- 1. ИМПОРТИРУЕМ framer-motion И НАШИ АНИМАЦИИ ---
import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
import { listContainer, fadeInUp } from '../utils/animations';
// [!code focus end]

// --- ДОБАВЛЕНО: Вспомогательная функция для цвета ---
function isColorLight(hexColor) {
    if (!hexColor) return false;
    const hex = hexColor.replace('#', ''); // 
    const r = parseInt(hex.substring(0, 2), 16);
    const g = parseInt(hex.substring(2, 4), 16);
    const b = parseInt(hex.substring(4, 6), 16);
    const brightness = ((r * 299) + (g * 587) + (b * 114)) / 1000;
    return brightness > 155;
}


function PlayersPage() {
    const [users, setUsers] = useState([]);
    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    const [error, setError] = useState(null);
    const [sortBy, setSortBy] = useState('first_login');
    const [order, setOrder] = useState('DESC');
    const { socket } = useAuth();

    const [page, setPage] = useState(1);
    const [limit, setLimit] = useState(12); // 
    const [totalPages, setTotalPages] = useState(0);

    const fetchUsers = useCallback(async () => {
        try {
            setError(null);
            setLoading(true); // Устанавливаем загрузку в начале
            // --- ИЗМЕНЕНО: Добавляем page и limit в параметры запроса ---
            const response = await axios.get(`/api/users`, { params: { sortBy, order, page, limit } }); // 

            // --- ИЗМЕНЕНО: Обрабатываем новый формат ответа ---
            setUsers(response.data.data);
            // Рассчитываем общее количество страниц
            setTotalPages(Math.ceil(response.data.total / limit));

        } catch (err) { // 
            setError('Failed to load players list.');
        } finally {
            setLoading(false);
        }
        // --- ИЗМЕНЕНО: Добавляем page и limit в зависимости ---
    }, [sortBy, order, page, limit]);

    useEffect(() => { setLoading(true); fetchUsers(); }, [fetchUsers]);

    useEffect(() => {
        if (!socket) return; // 
        const handleStatusUpdate = (data) => {
            setUsers(prevUsers =>
                prevUsers.map(user =>
                    user.id === data.userId
                        ? { ...user, is_minecraft_online: data.is_minecraft_online } // 
                        : user
                )
            );
        };
        socket.on('userStatusUpdate', handleStatusUpdate);
        return () => { socket.off('userStatusUpdate', handleStatusUpdate); }; // 
    }, [socket]);

    if (loading) return <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', mt: 4 }}><CircularProgress size="lg" /></Box>;
    if (error) return <Alert color="danger" sx={{ mt: 2 }}>{error}</Alert>;

    return (
        <Box>
            <Typography level='h2' component="h1" sx={{ mb: 3 }}>Community Players</Typography>
            <Stack
                direction={{ xs: 'column', sm: 'row' }} // 
                spacing={2}
                sx={{ mb: 3, alignItems: { xs: 'stretch', sm: 'flex-end' } }}
            >
                <FormControl size="sm">
                    <FormLabel>Sort by</FormLabel>
                    <Select value={sortBy} onChange={(e, newValue) => setSortBy(newValue)}>
                        <Option value="first_login">Join Date</Option>
                        <Option value="reputation_count">Reputation</Option>
                        <Option value="username">Username</Option>
                    </Select>
                </FormControl>
                <FormControl size="sm">
                    <FormLabel>Order</FormLabel>
                    <Select value={order} onChange={(e, newValue) => setOrder(newValue)}>
                        <Option value="DESC">Descending</Option>
                        <Option value="ASC">Ascending</Option>
                    </Select>
                </FormControl>
            </Stack>
            {!loading && totalPages > 1 && (
                <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', mb: 2 }}>
                    <JoyPagination
                        count={totalPages}
                        page={page}
                        onChange={(event, value) => setPage(value)} // 
                    />
                </Box>
            )}
            {/* [!code focus start] */}
            {/* 2. Оборачиваем Grid-контейнер в motion.div */}
            <motion.div
                variants={listContainer}
                initial="initial"
                animate="animate"
            >
                <Grid container spacing={2} sx={{ flexGrow: 1 }}>
                    {users.map((user) => ( // 
                        // 3. Каждый элемент сетки оборачиваем в свой motion.div
                        <Grid item xs={6} sm={6} md={4} key={user.id}>
                            <motion.div variants={fadeInUp} style={{ height: '100%' }}>
                                <Card
                                    component={RouterLink} // 
                                    to={`/users/${user.profile_slug || user.id}`}
                                    sx={{ textDecoration: 'none', height: '100%', width: '100%', transition: 'transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s', '&:hover': { transform: 'translateY(-4px)', boxShadow: 'md' } }} // 
                                >
                                    <AspectRatio ratio="2" sx={{ mb: 1, bgcolor: 'background.level1', borderRadius: 'sm' }}>
                                        {user.banner_url ? ( // 
                                            <img src={constructImageUrl(user.banner_url)} alt={`${user.username}'s banner`} loading="lazy" />
                                        ) : ( // 
                                            <Box />
                                        )}
                                    </AspectRatio>

                                    <CardContent sx={{
                                        display: 'flex',
                                        flexDirection: 'column', // 
                                        alignItems: 'center',
                                        textAlign: 'center', // 
                                        mt: { xs: -5.5, sm: -6.5, md: -6.5 },
                                    }}>
                                        <Avatar // 
                                            src={constructImageUrl(user.pfp_url)}
                                            sx={{
                                                '--Avatar-size': { xs: '60px', sm: '70px' }, // 
                                                border: '2px solid',
                                                borderColor: 'background.body', // 
                                            }}
                                        />
                                        <Typography level="h4" sx={{ mt: 1, letterSpacing: 0.1 }}>{user.username}</Typography>
                                        <Stack
                                            direction="row" // 
                                            spacing={1}
                                            sx={{ mt: 0.5, flexWrap: 'wrap', gap: 0.5, justifyContent: 'center' }} // 
                                        >
                                            {/* --- ИЗМЕНЕНИЕ ЗДЕСЬ --- */}
                                            {user.rank ? (
                                                <Chip // 
                                                    size="sm"
                                                    sx={{ // 
                                                        backgroundColor: user.rank.display_color,
                                                        color: isColorLight(user.rank.display_color) ? '#000' : '#FFF', // 
                                                    }}
                                                >
                                                    {user.rank.name}
                                                </Chip> // 
                                            ) : null}

                                            {user.minecraft_username && (
                                                <Chip // 
                                                    size="sm"
                                                    variant="soft" // 
                                                    color={user.is_minecraft_online ? 'success' : 'neutral'}
                                                    startDecorator={<CircleIcon sx={{ fontSize: '10px' }} />} // 
                                                >
                                                    {user.is_minecraft_online ? 'Online' : 'Offline'}
                                                </Chip>
                                            )}
                                        </Stack>
                                    </CardContent>
                                </Card>
                            </motion.div>
                        </Grid>
                    ))}
                </Grid>
            </motion.div>
            {/* [!code focus end] */}
            {totalPages > 1 && ( // 
                <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', mt: 4 }}>
                    {/* --- ИЗМЕНЕНО: Заменяем старый компонент на наш --- */}
                    <JoyPagination
                        count={totalPages} // 
                        page={page}
                        onChange={(event, value) => setPage(value)}
                    />
                </Box> // 
            )}
        </Box>
    );
}

export default PlayersPage;
--- END FILE: frontend/src/pages/PlayersPage.jsx ---



--- START FILE: frontend/src/pages/PostsPage.jsx ---

// frontend/src/pages/PostsPage.js

import React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
import { Link as RouterLink, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import axios from 'axios';
import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext';
import {
    Typography, List, ListItem, Sheet, Avatar, Link as JoyLink, Button, IconButton, Dropdown, Menu, MenuButton, MenuItem, Stack, CircularProgress, Alert, Box,
    useTheme
} from '@mui/joy';
import { useMediaQuery } from '@mui/material';
import AddIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Add';
import MoreVertIcon from '@mui/icons-material/MoreVert';
import EditIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Edit';
import DeleteForeverIcon from '@mui/icons-material/DeleteForever';
import BlockIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Block';
import JoyPagination from '../components/JoyPagination';
import VoteButtons from '../components/VoteButtons';
import { constructImageUrl } from '../utils/url';
import toast from 'react-hot-toast';
import ConfirmationModal from '../components/ConfirmationModal';
import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
import { listContainer, fadeInUp } from '../utils/animations';


const PostPreview = ({ htmlContent }) => {
  const imagePlaceholder = ' - 🖼️ - ';
  const contentWithPlaceholders = htmlContent.replace(/<img[^>]*>/g, imagePlaceholder);
  const textContent = (() => {
    const doc = new DOMParser().parseFromString(contentWithPlaceholders, 'text/html');
    return doc.body.textContent || "";
  })();
  return (
    <Typography 
        level="body-md" 
        sx={{ mb: 2, display: '-webkit-box', WebkitLineClamp: 3, WebkitBoxOrient: 'vertical', overflow: 'hidden', textOverflow: 'ellipsis', wordBreak: 'break-word' }}
    >
      {textContent.trim()}
    </Typography>
  );
};


function PostsPage() {
    const [posts, setPosts] = useState([]);
    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    const [error, setError] = useState(null);
    const { isLoggedIn, authToken, user: currentUser } = useAuth();
    const navigate = useNavigate();
    const theme = useTheme();
    const isMobile = useMediaQuery(theme.breakpoints.down('sm'));

    const [page, setPage] = useState(1);
    const [limit, setLimit] = useState(10);
    const [totalPages, setTotalPages] = useState(0);
    
    const [modalOpen, setModalOpen] = useState(false);
    const [modalContent, setModalContent] = useState({ title: '', content: '', onConfirm: null });
    const [isActionLoading, setIsActionLoading] = useState(false);
    
    // [!code focus start]
    // --- ИСПРАВЛЕНИЕ ЗДЕСЬ: Добавляем определение isAdmin ---
    const isAdmin = currentUser && currentUser.rank?.power_level >= 800;
    // [!code focus end]

    const fetchPosts = useCallback(async () => {
        try {
            setLoading(true);
            setError(null);
            const config = {
                 headers: authToken ? { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } : {},
                params: { page, limit }
            };
            const response = await axios.get('/api/posts', config);
            setPosts(response.data.data);
             setTotalPages(Math.ceil(response.data.total / limit));
        } catch (err) {
            setError('Failed to load posts. Please try again later.');
        } finally {
            setLoading(false);
        }
    }, [authToken, page, limit]);

    useEffect(() => {
        fetchPosts();
    }, [fetchPosts]);

    const handleVote = useCallback(async (postId, value) => {
        if (!isLoggedIn) { toast.error('Please log in to vote.'); return; }
        try {
            await axios.post(`/api/votes/posts/${postId}`, { value }, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } });
            fetchPosts();
        } catch (error) {
            toast.error(error.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to vote.');
            fetchPosts();
        }
    }, [isLoggedIn, authToken, fetchPosts]);

    const openDeleteModal = (post) => {
         setModalContent({
            title: 'Confirm Post Deletion',
            content: `Are you sure you want to permanently delete the post "${post.title}"?`,
            confirmText: 'Delete',
            confirmColor: 'danger',
            onConfirm: () => confirmDeletePost(post.id)
        });
        setModalOpen(true);
    };

    const openBanModal = (author) => {
        if (!author) return;
        setModalContent({
            title: 'Confirm Ban',
            content: `Are you sure you want to ban the user "${author.username}"? This will prevent them from logging in.`,
            confirmText: 'Ban User',
            confirmColor: 'danger',
            onConfirm: () => confirmBanUser(author.id, author.username)
        });
        setModalOpen(true);
    };

    const confirmDeletePost = async (postId) => {
        setIsActionLoading(true);
        try {
            await axios.delete(`/api/posts/${postId}`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } });
            toast.success('Post deleted successfully.');
            fetchPosts();
        } catch (err) {
            toast.error(err.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to delete post.');
        } finally {
            setIsActionLoading(false);
            setModalOpen(false);
        }
    };
    
    const confirmBanUser = async (userId, username) => {
        setIsActionLoading(true);
        try {
            await axios.post(`/api/admin/users/${userId}/ban`, {}, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } });
            toast.success(`User ${username} has been banned.`);
        } catch (err) {
            toast.error(err.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to ban user.');
        } finally {
            setIsActionLoading(false);
            setModalOpen(false);
        }
    };


    if (loading) return <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', mt: 4 }}><CircularProgress size="lg" /></Box>;
    if (error) return <Alert color="danger" sx={{ mt: 2 }}>{error}</Alert>;

    return (
        <Box>
            <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', flexDirection: { xs: 'column', sm: 'row' }, justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: { xs: 'flex-start', sm: 'center' }, mb: 2, gap: 2 }}>
                <Typography level='h2' component="h1">Community Posts</Typography>
                {isLoggedIn && (
                     <Button component={RouterLink} to="/posts/new" startDecorator={<AddIcon />} sx={{ width: { xs: '100%', sm: 'auto' } }}>
                        Create Post
                    </Button>
                 )}
            </Box>

            {!loading && totalPages > 1 && (
                <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', mb: 2 }}>
                    <JoyPagination count={totalPages} page={page} onChange={(event, value) => setPage(value)} />
                </Box>
            )}
            
            <motion.div
                variants={listContainer}
                initial="initial"
                animate="animate"
            >
                <List sx={{ borderRadius: 'sm', p: 0, bgcolor: 'background.body', border: '1px solid', borderColor: 'divider' }}>
                    {posts.map((post) => {
                         const canManagePost = isLoggedIn && (currentUser?.id === post.author?.id || isAdmin);
                        return (
                            <motion.div key={post.id} variants={fadeInUp}>
                                <ListItem sx={{ '&:not(:last-of-type)': { borderBottom: '1px solid', borderColor: 'divider' }, p: 0 }}>
                                    <Sheet sx={{ p: { xs: 1.5, sm: 2 }, flexGrow: 1, bgcolor: 'transparent' }}>
                                        <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'space-between', mb: 1 }}>
                                            <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 1.5, minWidth: 0 }}>
                                                {post.author ? (<JoyLink component={RouterLink} to={`/users/${post.author.profile_slug || post.author.id}`}><Avatar src={constructImageUrl(post.author.pfp_url)}>{post.author.username.charAt(0)}</Avatar></JoyLink>) : (<Avatar>?</Avatar>)}
                                                <Typography level="title-lg" sx={{ textOverflow: 'ellipsis', overflow: 'hidden', whiteSpace: 'nowrap' }}>
                                                    {post.author ? (
                                                        <JoyLink component={RouterLink} to={`/users/${post.author.profile_slug || post.author.id}`} sx={{ color: post.author.rank?.display_color }} onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}>
                                                            {post.author.username}
                                                        </JoyLink>
                                                    ) : ('Anonymous')}
                                                </Typography>
                                            </Box>
                                            {canManagePost && (
                                                <Box sx={{ ml: 'auto' }}>
                                                    <Dropdown>
                                                        <MenuButton slots={{ root: IconButton }} slotProps={{ root: { variant: 'plain', color: 'neutral', size: 'sm' } }}><MoreVertIcon /></MenuButton>
                                                        <Menu size="sm">
                                                            <MenuItem onClick={() => navigate(`/posts/${post.id}/edit`)}><EditIcon /> Edit</MenuItem>
                                                            <MenuItem color="danger" onClick={() => openDeleteModal(post)}><DeleteForeverIcon /> Delete</MenuItem>
                                                            {isAdmin && currentUser?.id !== post.author?.id && (<MenuItem color="danger" onClick={() => openBanModal(post.author)}><BlockIcon /> Ban Author</MenuItem>)}
                                                        </Menu>
                                                    </Dropdown>
                                                </Box>
                                            )}
                                        </Box>
                                        <JoyLink component={RouterLink} to={`/posts/${post.id}`} level="h4" fontWeight="lg" sx={{ '&:hover': { textDecoration: 'underline' }, mb: 1, color: 'text.primary', wordBreak: 'break-word' }}>
                                            {post.title}
                                        </JoyLink>
                                        <PostPreview htmlContent={post.content} />
                                        <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'center', color: 'text.tertiary' }}>
                                            <VoteButtons initialScore={post.score} currentUserVote={post.currentUserVote} onVote={(value) => handleVote(post.id, value)} disabled={!isLoggedIn} />
                                            <Typography level="body-xs">{new Date(post.created_at).toLocaleDateString()}</Typography>
                                        </Box>
                                    </Sheet>
                                </ListItem>
                            </motion.div>
                        );
                    })}
                </List>
            </motion.div>

            {totalPages > 1 && (
                <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', mt: 3 }}>
                    <JoyPagination count={totalPages} page={page} onChange={(event, value) => setPage(value)} />
                </Box>
            )}

            <ConfirmationModal
                open={modalOpen}
                onClose={() => setModalOpen(false)}
                onConfirm={modalContent.onConfirm}
                title={modalContent.title}
                content={modalContent.content}
                confirmText={modalContent.confirmText}
                confirmColor={modalContent.confirmColor}
                loading={isActionLoading}
            />
        </Box>
    );
}

export default PostsPage;
--- END FILE: frontend/src/pages/PostsPage.jsx ---



--- START FILE: frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPolicyPage.jsx ---

// frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPolicyPage.js

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import axios from 'axios';
import { Box, Typography, CircularProgress, Alert, Divider } from '@mui/joy';

function PrivacyPolicyPage() {
    const [page, setPage] = useState(null);
    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    const [error, setError] = useState(null);

    useEffect(() => {
        setLoading(true);
        axios.get(`/api/p/privacy-policy`)
            .then(response => {
                setPage(response.data);
            })
            .catch(() => {
                setError('Could not load the Privacy Policy. Please try again later.');
            })
            .finally(() => {
                setLoading(false);
            });
    }, []);

    if (loading) return <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', p: 4 }}><CircularProgress /></Box>;
    if (error) return <Alert color="danger" sx={{ mt: 2 }}>{error}</Alert>;
    if (!page) return null;

    return (
        <Box>
            <Typography level="h1" component="h1">{page.title}</Typography>
            <Divider sx={{ my: 2 }} />
            <Box
                dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: page.content }}
                sx={{
                    '& h4, & h5': { mt: 3, mb: 1 },
                    '& ul': { pl: 4 },
                    '& p, & li': {
                        fontFamily: 'var(--joy-font-family-body)',
                        color: 'var(--joy-palette-text-secondary)',
                        lineHeight: 1.7,
                        mb: 2,
                    },
                }}
            />
        </Box>
    );
}

export default PrivacyPolicyPage;
--- END FILE: frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPolicyPage.jsx ---



--- START FILE: frontend/src/pages/PublicProfilePage.jsx ---

// frontend/src/pages/PublicProfilePage.js

import React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
import { useParams, useNavigate, Link as RouterLink } from 'react-router-dom';
import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext';
import axios from 'axios';
import { Box, Typography, Sheet, Avatar, CircularProgress, Alert, Divider, Button, Chip, Dropdown, Menu, MenuButton, MenuItem, Stack, useTheme, IconButton, Tooltip, AspectRatio } from '@mui/joy';
import { useMediaQuery } from '@mui/material';
import MoreVertIcon from '@mui/icons-material/MoreVert';
import PersonAddIcon from '@mui/icons-material/PersonAdd';
import HowToRegIcon from '@mui/icons-material/HowToReg';
import AccessTimeIcon from '@mui/icons-material/AccessTime';
import BlockIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Block';
import PersonRemoveIcon from '@mui/icons-material/PersonRemove';
import ThumbUpOffAltIcon from '@mui/icons-material/ThumbUpOffAlt';
import MailIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Mail';
import CheckCircleOutlineIcon from '@mui/icons-material/CheckCircleOutline';
import { constructImageUrl } from '../utils/url';
import CircleIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Circle';
import UserPostsList from '../components/UserPostsList';
import ConfirmationModal from '../components/ConfirmationModal';
import VerifiedIcons from '../components/VerifiedIcons';
import { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'framer-motion';
import toast from 'react-hot-toast';
import CancelIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Cancel';
import MinecraftAvatar from '../components/MinecraftAvatar';
// [!code focus start]
import { formatDistanceToNow, format } from 'date-fns'; // Импортируем для дат
// [!code focus end]
import GroupAddIcon from '@mui/icons-material/GroupAdd'; // <-- Добавь иконку

function isColorLight(hexColor) {
    if (!hexColor) return false;
    const hex = hexColor.replace('#', '');
    const r = parseInt(hex.substring(0, 2), 16);
    const g = parseInt(hex.substring(2, 4), 16);
    const b = parseInt(hex.substring(4, 6), 16);
    const brightness = ((r * 299) + (g * 587) + (b * 114)) / 1000;
    return brightness > 155;
}

function PublicProfilePage() {
    const { userId } = useParams();
    const navigate = useNavigate();
    const { isLoggedIn, user: currentUser, authToken, socket } = useAuth();
    const theme = useTheme();
    const isMobile = useMediaQuery(theme.breakpoints.down('sm'));
    const [profile, setProfile] = useState(null);
    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    const [error, setError] = useState(null);
    const [friendship, setFriendship] = useState({ status: 'loading' });
    const isAdmin = currentUser && currentUser.rank?.power_level >= 800;
    const [isInviting, setIsInviting] = useState(false);

    const [modalOpen, setModalOpen] = useState(false);
    const [modalContent, setModalContent] = useState({ title: '', content: '', onConfirm: null });
    const [isActionLoading, setIsActionLoading] = useState(false);

    const openCancelRequestModal = () => {
        setModalContent({
            title: 'Cancel Friend Request',
            content: `Are you sure you want to cancel your friend request to ${profile.username}?`,
            confirmText: 'Yes, Cancel Request',
            confirmColor: 'danger',
            onConfirm: () => confirmAction('cancel')
        });
        setModalOpen(true);
    };

    useEffect(() => {
        const fetchData = async () => {
            if (currentUser === undefined) {
                return;
            }

            setLoading(true);
            setError(null);

            try {
                const config = authToken ? { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } } : {};
                const idAsNumber = parseInt(userId, 10);
                const identifier = isNaN(idAsNumber) ? userId : idAsNumber;

                const profileResponse = await axios.get(`/api/users/${identifier}`);
                const fetchedProfile = profileResponse.data;
                setProfile(fetchedProfile);

                if (isLoggedIn && currentUser && currentUser.id !== fetchedProfile.id) {
                    const statusResponse = await axios.get(`/api/friendships/status/${fetchedProfile.id}`, config);
                    setFriendship(statusResponse.data);
                } else if (isLoggedIn && currentUser && currentUser.id === fetchedProfile.id) {
                    setFriendship({ status: 'self' });
                } else {
                    setFriendship({ status: 'guest' });
                }
            } catch (err) {
                setError('Failed to load user profile. The user may not exist.');
            } finally {
                setLoading(false);
