            }
        };

        fetchData();
    }, [userId, currentUser, isLoggedIn, authToken]);

    const handleAction = (action, needsConfirmation = false) => {
        if (needsConfirmation) {
            let modalDetails = {};
            if (action === 'remove') {
                modalDetails = { title: 'Remove Friend', content: `Are you sure you want to remove ${profile.username} from your friends?`, confirmText: 'Remove', confirmColor: 'danger', onConfirm: () => confirmAction(action) };
            } else if (action === 'block') {
                modalDetails = { title: 'Block User', content: `Are you sure you want to block ${profile.username}? You will no longer see their posts or comments, and they won't be able to contact you.`, confirmText: 'Block', confirmColor: 'danger', onConfirm: () => confirmAction(action) };
            }
            setModalContent(modalDetails);
            setModalOpen(true);
        } else {
            confirmAction(action);
        }
    };

   const handleInviteToClan = async () => {
        if (!currentUser.clan) {
            toast.error("You are not in a clan to invite members.");
            return;
        }
        setIsInviting(true);
        try {
            await axios.post(
                `/api/clans/${currentUser.clan.clan_id}/invitations`,
                { userId: profile.id },
                { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } }
            );
            toast.success(`Invitation sent to ${profile.username}!`);
        } catch (err) {
            toast.error(err.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to send invite.');
        } finally {
            setIsInviting(false);
        }
    };

    const confirmAction = async (action) => {
        const config = { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } };
        const previousFriendshipState = friendship;
        setIsActionLoading(true);

        if (action === 'add') {
            setFriendship({ status: 'PENDING_OUTGOING', requestId: null });
        } else if (['cancel', 'reject', 'remove', 'unblock'].includes(action)) {
            setFriendship({ status: 'NONE' });
        }

        try {
            let response;
            switch (action) {
                case 'add':
                    response = await axios.post(`/api/friendships/requests`, { receiverId: profile.id }, config);
                    toast.success('Friend request sent!');
                    setFriendship(prev => ({ ...prev, requestId: response.data.id }));
                    break;
                case 'accept':
                    response = await axios.patch(`/api/friendships/requests/${friendship.requestId}/accept`, {}, config);
                    setFriendship({ status: response.data.status, friendshipId: response.data.id });
                    toast.success('Friend request accepted!');
                    break;
                case 'reject':
                case 'cancel':
                    await axios.delete(`/api/friendships/requests/${friendship.requestId}`, config);
                    toast.success('Request cancelled.');
                    break;
                case 'remove':
                    await axios.delete(`/api/friendships/${friendship.friendshipId}`, config);
                    toast.success('Friend removed.');
                    break;
                case 'block':
                    response = await axios.post(`/api/friendships/block/${profile.id}`, {}, config);
                    setFriendship({ status: response.data.status, friendshipId: response.data.id });
                    toast.success('User blocked.');
                    break;
                case 'unblock':
                    await axios.delete(`/api/friendships/block/${profile.id}`, config);
                    toast.success('User unblocked.');
                    break;
                default:
                    break;
            }
        } catch (err) {
            toast.error(err.response?.data?.message || 'An error occurred.');
            setFriendship(previousFriendshipState);
        } finally {
            setIsActionLoading(false);
            setModalOpen(false);
        }
    };

    const handleToggleBanStatus = async () => {
        if (!profile) return;
        const action = profile.is_banned ? 'unban' : 'ban';
        // Для бана мы будем использовать уже готовую сложную логику
        if (action === 'ban') {
            // Этот вызов просто откроет модальное окно бана из AdminPage, но у нас его тут нет.
            // Поэтому, для простоты, пока оставим window.confirm. 
            // В идеале - вынести модалку бана в отдельный компонент и переиспользовать.
            if (!window.confirm(`Are you sure you want to ban ${profile.username}?`)) return;
        }

        try {
            const config = { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } };
            // Для бана отправляем заглушку, так как реальная причина будет в админке
            const payload = action === 'ban' ? { reason: 'Banned via user profile page.' } : {};
            await axios.post(`/api/admin/users/${profile.id}/${action}`, payload, config);
            setProfile(prev => ({ ...prev, is_banned: !prev.is_banned })); // Optimistic update
            toast.success(`User has been ${action}ned.`);
        } catch (err) { toast.error(`Failed to ${action} user.`); }
    };

    useEffect(() => {
        if (!socket || !profile) return;
        const handleStatusUpdate = (data) => {
            if (data.userId === profile.id) {
                setProfile(prevProfile => ({ ...prevProfile, is_minecraft_online: data.is_minecraft_online }));
            }
        };
        socket.on('userStatusUpdate', handleStatusUpdate);
        return () => { socket.off('userStatusUpdate', handleStatusUpdate); };
    }, [socket, profile]);

    const renderActionButtons = () => {
        if (!isLoggedIn || friendship.status === 'self' || friendship.status === 'guest' || friendship.status === 'loading') return null;

        const animationProps = { initial: { opacity: 0, y: -10 }, animate: { opacity: 1, y: 0 }, exit: { opacity: 0, y: 10 }, transition: { duration: 0.2 } };

        return (
            <AnimatePresence mode="wait">
                {(() => {
                    switch (friendship.status) {
                        case 'ACCEPTED':
                            return (<motion.div key="accepted" {...animationProps}> <Dropdown> <MenuButton endDecorator={<MoreVertIcon />} slots={{ root: Button }} slotProps={{ root: { variant: 'soft', color: 'neutral', startDecorator: <HowToRegIcon /> } }}>Friends</MenuButton> <Menu> <MenuItem onClick={() => handleAction('remove', true)}><PersonRemoveIcon /> Remove Friend</MenuItem> <MenuItem onClick={() => handleAction('block', true)} sx={{ color: 'danger.500' }}><BlockIcon /> Block User</MenuItem> </Menu> </Dropdown> </motion.div>);

                        case 'PENDING_INCOMING':
                            return (<motion.div key="pending_incoming" {...animationProps}> <Stack direction="row" spacing={1}> <Button color="success" onClick={() => handleAction('accept')}>Accept</Button> <Button color="danger" variant="outlined" onClick={() => handleAction('reject')}>Decline</Button> </Stack> </motion.div>);

                        case 'PENDING_OUTGOING':
                            return (
                                <motion.div key="pending_outgoing" {...animationProps}>
                                    <Button
                                        variant="soft"
                                        color="neutral"
                                        startDecorator={<AccessTimeIcon />}
                                        onClick={openCancelRequestModal}
                                        loading={isActionLoading}
                                    >
                                        Pending
                                    </Button>
                                </motion.div>
                            );

                        case 'BLOCKED':
                            return (<motion.div key="blocked" {...animationProps}> <Button color="warning" onClick={() => handleAction('unblock')}>Unblock</Button> </motion.div>);

                        case 'NONE':
                        default:
                            return (<motion.div key="none" {...animationProps}> <Button variant="solid" color="primary" startDecorator={<PersonAddIcon />} onClick={() => handleAction('add')}>Add Friend</Button> </motion.div>);
                    }
                })()}
            </AnimatePresence>
        );
    };

    if (loading) return <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', mt: 4 }}><CircularProgress size="lg" /></Box>;
    if (error) return <Alert color="danger">{error}</Alert>;
    if (!profile) return null;

    return (
        <Box>
            {profile.is_banned && (
                <Alert variant="soft" color="danger" startDecorator={<BlockIcon />} sx={{ mb: 2 }}>
                    <Box>
                        <Typography fontWeight="lg">This user is banned.</Typography>
                        <Typography level="body-sm">
                            <strong>Reason:</strong> {profile.ban_reason || 'Not specified.'}
                        </Typography>
                        {profile.ban_expires_at && (<Typography level="body-xs">Ban expires: {format(new Date(profile.ban_expires_at), 'MMMM d, yyyy HH:mm')}</Typography>)}
                    </Box>
                </Alert>
            )}
            <Sheet variant="outlined" sx={{ borderRadius: 'md', py: { xs: 2, sm: 3, md: 4 }, opacity: profile.is_banned ? 0.6 : 1 }}>
                <Box sx={{ position: 'relative', px: { xs: 2, sm: 3, md: 4 } }}>
                    <AspectRatio ratio="16/5" sx={{ width: '100%', borderRadius: 'sm', bgcolor: 'background.level1' }}>
                        {profile.banner_url ? (<img src={constructImageUrl(profile.banner_url)} alt={`${profile.username}'s banner`} style={{ objectFit: 'cover' }} />) : (<Box sx={{ background: 'linear-gradient(180deg, var(--joy-palette-neutral-700), var(--joy-palette-neutral-800))' }} />)}
                    </AspectRatio>
                    <Box sx={{ position: 'absolute', bottom: 0, left: 0, right: 0, height: '50%', background: 'linear-gradient(to top, var(--joy-palette-background-level1), transparent)', }} />
                </Box>
                <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', flexDirection: { xs: 'column', sm: 'row' }, alignItems: { xs: 'center', sm: 'flex-end' }, gap: { xs: 1, md: 3 }, mt: { xs: -4, sm: -6 }, position: 'relative', px: { xs: 2, sm: 5, md: 8 } }}>
                    <Avatar src={constructImageUrl(profile.pfp_url)} sx={{ '--Avatar-size': { xs: '80px', sm: '128px' }, border: '4px solid', borderColor: 'background.body', boxShadow: 'sm', mx: { xs: 'auto', sm: 0 }, }} />
                    <Box sx={{ textAlign: { xs: 'center', sm: 'left' }, flexGrow: 1 }}>
                        <Typography level="h2" component="h1" sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 1, justifyContent: { xs: 'center', sm: 'flex-start' } }}>
                            {profile.minecraft_uuid && <MinecraftAvatar user={profile} size={28} />}
                            {profile.username}
                            <VerifiedIcons user={profile} />
                        </Typography>
                        <Stack direction="row" spacing={1} sx={{ mt: 0.5, justifyContent: { xs: 'center', sm: 'flex-start' }, flexWrap: 'wrap', gap: 1 }}>
                            {profile.rank && <Chip sx={{ backgroundColor: profile.rank.display_color, color: isColorLight(profile.rank.display_color) ? '#000' : '#FFF' }}>{profile.rank.name}</Chip>}
                            <Chip color="neutral" variant="outlined" startDecorator={<ThumbUpOffAltIcon />}>Reputation: {profile.reputation_count}</Chip>
                        </Stack>
                    </Box>
                    <Stack alignItems={{ xs: 'center', md: 'flex-end' }} gap={1}>
                        {profile.minecraft_username && <Chip variant="soft" color={profile.is_minecraft_online ? 'success' : 'neutral'} startDecorator={<CircleIcon sx={{ fontSize: '10px' }} />}>{profile.minecraft_username} ({profile.is_minecraft_online ? 'Online' : 'Offline'})</Chip>}
                        <Stack direction="row" spacing={1} sx={{ width: { xs: '100%', sm: 'auto' }, flexShrink: 0, justifyContent: 'center', flexWrap: 'wrap', rowGap: 1 }}>
                            {isLoggedIn && friendship.status !== 'self' && friendship.status !== 'BLOCKED' && (<Button variant="solid" color="primary" startDecorator={<MailIcon />} onClick={() => navigate(`/messages/${profile.id}`)}>Chat</Button>)}
                            
                            {/* [!code focus start] */}
                            {/* --- ИЗМЕНЕНИЕ: Обновляем условие отображения кнопки --- */}
                            {isLoggedIn && friendship.status !== 'self' && currentUser.clan && !profile.clan && (
                                <Button
                                    variant="outlined"
                                    color="neutral"
                                    startDecorator={<GroupAddIcon />}
                                    onClick={handleInviteToClan}
                                    loading={isInviting}
                                >
                                    Invite to Clan
                                </Button>
                            )}
                            {/* [!code focus end] */}

                            {renderActionButtons()}
                            {isAdmin && friendship.status !== 'self' && (profile.is_banned ? <Button variant="soft" color="success" startDecorator={<CheckCircleOutlineIcon />} onClick={handleToggleBanStatus}>Unban</Button> : <Button variant="soft" color="danger" startDecorator={<BlockIcon />} onClick={handleToggleBanStatus}>Ban</Button>)}
                        </Stack>
                    </Stack>
                </Box>
                <Divider sx={{ my: 3 }} />
                <Typography level="body-lg" sx={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap', px: { xs: 2, sm: 3, md: 4 } }}>
                    {profile.description || 'No description provided.'}
                </Typography>
            </Sheet>
            <Box sx={{ mt: 4 }}>
                <Typography level="h2" component="h2" sx={{ mb: 2 }}>
                    Posts by {profile.username}
                </Typography>
                <UserPostsList userId={profile.id} />
            </Box>
            <ConfirmationModal
                open={modalOpen}
                onClose={() => setModalOpen(false)}
                onConfirm={modalContent.onConfirm}
                title={modalContent.title}
                content={modalContent.content}
                confirmText={modalContent.confirmText}
                confirmColor={modalContent.confirmColor}
                loading={isActionLoading}
            />
        </Box>
    );
}


export default PublicProfilePage;
--- END FILE: frontend/src/pages/PublicProfilePage.jsx ---



--- START FILE: frontend/src/pages/PurchaseHistoryPage.jsx ---

// frontend/src/pages/PurchaseHistoryPage.jsx

import React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
import { Link as RouterLink } from 'react-router-dom';
import axios from 'axios';
import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext';
import { Box, Typography, CircularProgress, Alert, Sheet, Table, Avatar, Breadcrumbs, Link as JoyLink } from '@mui/joy';
import HomeIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Home';
import ChevronRightIcon from '@mui/icons-material/ChevronRight';
import { constructImageUrl } from '../utils/url';

function PurchaseHistoryPage() {
    const { authToken } = useAuth();
    const [history, setHistory] = useState([]);
    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    const [error, setError] = useState(null);

    const fetchHistory = useCallback(async () => {
        if (!authToken) return;
        setLoading(true);
        try {
            const response = await axios.get('/api/purchases/my-history', {
                headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` },
            });
            setHistory(response.data);
        } catch (err) {
            setError('Failed to load purchase history.');
        } finally {
            setLoading(false);
        }
    }, [authToken]);

    useEffect(() => {
        fetchHistory();
    }, [fetchHistory]);

    if (loading) return <CircularProgress />;
    if (error) return <Alert color="danger">{error}</Alert>;

    return (
        <Box>
            <Breadcrumbs separator={<ChevronRightIcon />} sx={{ mb: 2 }}>
                <JoyLink component={RouterLink} to="/"><HomeIcon /></JoyLink>
                <JoyLink component={RouterLink} to="/profile/settings">Settings</JoyLink>
                <Typography>Purchase History</Typography>
            </Breadcrumbs>

            <Typography level="h2" component="h1" sx={{ mb: 2 }}>
                My Purchase History
            </Typography>

            <Sheet variant="outlined" sx={{ borderRadius: 'sm', overflow: 'auto' }}>
                <Table hoverRow>
                    <thead>
                        <tr>
                            <th style={{ width: '10%' }}> </th>
                            <th>Item Name</th>
                            <th>Price Paid</th>
                            <th>Date</th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                        {history.length > 0 ? (
                            history.map((purchase) => (
                                <tr key={purchase.purchase_id}>
                                    <td>
                                        <Avatar src={constructImageUrl(purchase.item?.image_url)} />
                                    </td>
                                    <td>{purchase.item?.name || 'Item no longer exists'}</td>
                                    <td>{purchase.purchase_price} coins</td>
                                    <td>{new Date(purchase.purchased_at).toLocaleDateString()}</td>
                                </tr>
                            ))
                        ) : (
                            <tr>
                                <td colSpan={4} style={{ textAlign: 'center', padding: '1rem' }}>
                                    You haven't purchased any items yet.
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                        )}
                    </tbody>
                </Table>
            </Sheet>
        </Box>
    );
}

export default PurchaseHistoryPage;
--- END FILE: frontend/src/pages/PurchaseHistoryPage.jsx ---



--- START FILE: frontend/src/pages/RegisterPage.jsx ---

// frontend/src/pages/RegisterPage.js

// [!code focus start]
// --- 1. Добавляем useState ---
import React, { useState } from 'react';
// [!code focus end]
import { useNavigate, Link as RouterLink, NavLink } from 'react-router-dom';
import axios from 'axios';
import {
    Sheet,
    Typography,
    FormControl,
    FormLabel,
    Input,
    Button,
    Link,
    Alert,
    Stack,
    Box,
    Link as JoyLink,
    Checkbox,
    // [!code focus start]
    // --- 2. Добавляем IconButton ---
    IconButton
    // [!code focus end]
} from '@mui/joy';
// [!code focus start]
// --- 3. Импортируем иконки ---
import Visibility from '@mui/icons-material/Visibility';
import VisibilityOff from '@mui/icons-material/VisibilityOff';
// [!code focus end]


function RegisterPage() {
    const navigate = useNavigate();
    const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
        username: '',
        email: '',
        password: '',
    });
    const [agreed, setAgreed] = useState(false);
    const [error, setError] = useState('');
    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
    // [!code focus start]
    // --- 4. Добавляем состояние для видимости пароля ---
    const [showPassword, setShowPassword] = useState(false);
    // [!code focus end]

    const handleChange = (e) => {
        setFormData({ ...formData, [e.target.name]: e.target.value });
    };

    const handleRegister = async (event) => {
        event.preventDefault();
        setLoading(true);
        setError('');
        try {
            await axios.post(`/api/auth/register`, formData);
            navigate('/login');
        } catch (err) {
            setError(err.response?.data?.message || 'Registration failed. Please try again.');
            console.error('Registration error:', err);
        } finally {
            setLoading(false);
        }
    };

    return (
        <Sheet sx={{
            display: 'flex',
            flexFlow: 'column',
            justifyContent: 'center',
            alignItems: 'center',
            minHeight: '100dvh',
            p: 2,
        }}>
            <Sheet
                variant="outlined"
                sx={{
                    width: '100%',
                    maxWidth: '400px',
                    mx: 'auto',
                    py: { xs: 2, sm: 3 },
                    px: { xs: 2, sm: 4 },
                    display: 'flex',
                    flexDirection: 'column',
                    gap: 2,
                    borderRadius: 'sm',
                    boxShadow: 'md',
                }}
            >
                <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', mb: 1 }}>
                    <JoyLink component={RouterLink} to="/" sx={{ textDecoration: 'none' }}>
                        <Box sx={{
                            flexGrow: 1,
                            display: 'flex',
                            alignItems: 'center',
                            justifyContent: 'center',
                            gap: 1
                        }}>
                            <img src="/logo.png" alt="FlameWall Logo" style={{ width: '40px', height: '40px' }} />
                            <Typography fontWeight="lg" level="h2" component="div">FlameWall</Typography>
                        </Box>
                    </JoyLink>
                </Box>

                <div>
                    <Typography level="h4" component="h1"><b>Create an account</b></Typography>
                    <Typography level="body-sm">Join our community!</Typography>
                </div>

                {error && <Alert color="danger">{error}</Alert>}

                <form onSubmit={handleRegister}>
                    <Stack spacing={1.5}>
                        <FormControl required>
                            <FormLabel>Username</FormLabel>
                            <Input name="username" value={formData.username} onChange={handleChange} disabled={loading} autoComplete="username" />
                        </FormControl>
                        <FormControl required>
                            <FormLabel>Email</FormLabel>
                            <Input type="email" name="email" value={formData.email} onChange={handleChange} disabled={loading} autoComplete="email" />
                        </FormControl>
                        {/* [!code focus start] */}
                        {/* --- 5. Обновляем поле для пароля --- */}
                        <FormControl required>
                            <FormLabel>Password</FormLabel>
                            <Input
                                name="password"
                                type={showPassword ? 'text' : 'password'}
                                value={formData.password}
                                onChange={handleChange}
                                disabled={loading}
                                autoComplete="new-password"
                                endDecorator={
                                    <IconButton
                                        aria-label="toggle password visibility"
                                        onClick={() => setShowPassword(!showPassword)}
                                        onMouseDown={(e) => e.preventDefault()}
                                        edge="end"
                                    >
                                        {showPassword ? <VisibilityOff /> : <Visibility />}
                                    </IconButton>
                                }
                            />
                        </FormControl>
                        {/* [!code focus end] */}
                        <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'flex-start', gap: 1.5, mt: 1 }}>
                            <Checkbox
                                name="agreement"
                                checked={agreed}
                                onChange={(e) => setAgreed(e.target.checked)}
                                sx={{ mt: '2px' }}
                            />
                            <Typography level="body-sm">
                                I have read and agree to the{' '}
                                <Link component={RouterLink} to="/terms" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
                                    Terms of Service
                                </Link> and{' '}
                                <Link component={RouterLink} to="/privacy" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
                                    Privacy Policy
                                </Link>.
                            </Typography>
                        </Box>
                        <Button type="submit" loading={loading} disabled={!agreed} fullWidth sx={{ mt: 1 }}>
                            Sign up
                        </Button>
                    </Stack>
                </form>

                <Typography
                    endDecorator={<Link component={RouterLink} to="/login">Log in</Link>}
                    fontSize="sm"
                    sx={{ alignSelf: 'center' }}
                >
                    Already have an account?
                </Typography>
            </Sheet>
        </Sheet>
    );
}

export default RegisterPage;
--- END FILE: frontend/src/pages/RegisterPage.jsx ---



--- START FILE: frontend/src/pages/SearchPage.jsx ---

// frontend/src/pages/SearchPage.js

import React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
import { useSearchParams, Link as RouterLink } from 'react-router-dom';
import axios from 'axios';
import {
    Box,
    Typography,
    CircularProgress,
    Alert,
    Grid,
    Card,
    CardContent,
    Avatar,
    Chip,
    List,
    ListItem,
    ListItemButton,
    ListItemContent as JoyListItemContent,
    Link as JoyLink,
    Divider,
} from '@mui/joy';
import { constructImageUrl } from '../utils/url';

function SearchPage() {
    const [searchParams] = useSearchParams();
    const query = searchParams.get('query');
    const [results, setResults] = useState({ users: [], posts: [] });
    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    const [error, setError] = useState(null);

    const fetchResults = useCallback(async () => {
        if (!query) {
            setLoading(false);
            return;
        }
        setLoading(true);
        setError(null);
        try {
            // Запросы остаются теми же
            const [usersRes, postsRes] = await Promise.all([
                axios.get(`/api/users`, { params: { search: query } }),
                axios.get(`/api/posts`, { params: { search: query } })
            ]);
            
            // --- ИЗМЕНЕНИЕ ЗДЕСЬ ---
            // Мы должны брать массивы из поля .data в каждом ответе
            setResults({ 
                users: usersRes.data.data, 
                posts: postsRes.data.data 
            });

        } catch (err) {
            setError('Failed to fetch search results.');
            console.error(err);
        } finally {
            setLoading(false);
        }
    }, [query]);

    useEffect(() => {
        fetchResults();
    }, [fetchResults]);

    if (loading) {
        return <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', mt: 4 }}><CircularProgress /></Box>;
    }

    if (error) {
        return <Alert color="danger">{error}</Alert>;
    }

    const noResults = results.users.length === 0 && results.posts.length === 0;

    return (
        <Box>
            <Typography level={{ xs: 'h2', sm: 'h1' }} component="h1" sx={{ mb: 3 }}>
                Search Results for: "{query}"
            </Typography>

            {noResults ? (
                <Typography>No results found.</Typography>
            ) : (
                <Grid container spacing={4}>
                    {results.posts.length > 0 && (
                        <Grid xs={12}>
                            <Typography level={{ xs: 'h3', sm: 'h2' }} component="h2" sx={{ mb: 2 }}>Found Posts</Typography>
                            <List variant="outlined" sx={{ borderRadius: 'sm', p: 0 }}>
                                {results.posts.map((post, index) => (
                                    <React.Fragment key={post.id}>
                                        <ListItem>
                                            <ListItemButton component={RouterLink} to={`/posts/${post.id}`}>
                                                <JoyListItemContent>
                                                    <JoyLink component="span" level="title-md">{post.title}</JoyLink>
                                                    <Typography level="body-sm" sx={{
                                                        display: '-webkit-box', WebkitLineClamp: 2, WebkitBoxOrient: 'vertical', overflow: 'hidden', textOverflow: 'ellipsis'
                                                    }}>
                                                        {post.content}
                                                    </Typography>
                                                </JoyListItemContent>
                                            </ListItemButton>
                                        </ListItem>
                                        {index < results.posts.length - 1 && <Divider />}
                                    </React.Fragment>
                                ))}
                            </List>
                        </Grid>
                    )}

                    {results.users.length > 0 && (
                        <Grid xs={12}>
                            <Typography level={{ xs: 'h3', sm: 'h2' }} component="h2" sx={{ mt: results.posts.length > 0 ? 4 : 0, mb: 2 }}>Found Players</Typography>
                            <Grid container spacing={2}>
                                {results.users.map((user) => (
                                    <Grid xs={12} sm={6} md={4} lg={3} key={user.id}>
                                        <Card component={RouterLink} to={`/users/${user.profile_slug || user.id}`} sx={{ textDecoration: 'none', height: '100%' }}>
                                            <CardContent sx={{ alignItems: 'center', textAlign: 'center' }}>
                                                <Avatar src={constructImageUrl(user.pfp_url)} sx={{ '--Avatar-size': '80px', mb: 1 }} />
                                                <Typography level="title-lg">{user.username}</Typography>
                                                <Chip size="sm" color="primary" sx={{ mt: 0.5 }}>{user.rank.name}</Chip>
                                            </CardContent>
                                        </Card>
                                    </Grid>
                                ))}
                            </Grid>
                        </Grid>
                    )}
                </Grid>
            )}
        </Box>
    );
}

export default SearchPage;
--- END FILE: frontend/src/pages/SearchPage.jsx ---



--- START FILE: frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.jsx ---

// frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.js

import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext';
import axios from 'axios';
import {
    Box, Typography, FormControl, FormLabel, Input, Button, Alert,
    CircularProgress, Sheet, Divider, Textarea, Stack, Avatar, AspectRatio, Switch
} from '@mui/joy';
import EditIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Edit';
import LinkIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Link';
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { constructImageUrl } from '../utils/url';
import toast from 'react-hot-toast';
import ImageCropperModal from '../components/ImageCropperModal';
import { usePushNotifications } from '../hooks/usePushNotifications'; // <-- ИМПОРТ ХУКА
import { Link as RouterLink } from 'react-router-dom'; // <-- Добавь RouterLink
import HistoryIcon from '@mui/icons-material/History'; // <-- Добавь иконку


function SettingsPage() {
    const { authToken, updateAuthToken, user } = useAuth();
    const navigate = useNavigate();

    // Данные профиля
    const [profileData, setProfileData] = useState({ username: '', profile_slug: '', description: '' });
    // Данные для смены пароля
    const [passwordData, setPasswordData] = useState({ currentPassword: '', newPassword: '', confirmPassword: '' });

    // Файлы и их превью
    const [avatarFile, setAvatarFile] = useState(null);
    const [avatarPreview, setAvatarPreview] = useState(null);
    const [bannerFile, setBannerFile] = useState(null);
    const [bannerPreview, setBannerPreview] = useState(null);
    const avatarInputRef = useRef(null);
    const bannerInputRef = useRef(null);

    // Состояния UI
    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    const [profileError, setProfileError] = useState('');
    const [passwordError, setPasswordError] = useState('');

    // Состояния для кроппера
    const [cropperOpen, setCropperOpen] = useState(false);
    const [imageToCrop, setImageToCrop] = useState(null);
    const [cropAspect, setCropAspect] = useState(1);
    const [cropType, setCropType] = useState('avatar');


    useEffect(() => {
        if (user) {
            setProfileData({
                username: user.username || '',
                profile_slug: user.profile_slug || '',
                description: user.description || '',
            });
            setAvatarPreview(user.pfp_url);
            setBannerPreview(user.banner_url);
            setLoading(false);
        }
    }, [user]);

    const handleProfileChange = (e) => setProfileData({ ...profileData, [e.target.name]: e.target.value });
    const handlePasswordChange = (e) => setPasswordData({ ...passwordData, [e.target.name]: e.target.value });

    const handleFileChange = (event, type) => {
        const file = event.target.files[0];
        if (!file) return;

        setCropAspect(type === 'avatar' ? 1 : 16 / 5);
        setCropType(type);

        const reader = new FileReader();
        reader.addEventListener('load', () => {
            setImageToCrop(reader.result?.toString() || '');
            setCropperOpen(true);
        });
        reader.readAsDataURL(file);
    };

    const handleCropComplete = (croppedImageBlob) => {
        if (!croppedImageBlob) return;
        const previewUrl = URL.createObjectURL(croppedImageBlob);

        if (cropType === 'avatar') {
            setAvatarFile(croppedImageBlob);
            setAvatarPreview(previewUrl);
        } else {
            setBannerFile(croppedImageBlob);
            setBannerPreview(previewUrl);
        }

        setCropperOpen(false);
    };

    const handleProfileSubmit = async (e) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        setLoading(true);
        setProfileError('');

        try {
            if (avatarFile) {
                const formData = new FormData();
                formData.append('file', avatarFile, 'avatar.png');
                await axios.post('/api/media/avatar', formData, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } });
            }

            if (bannerFile) {
                const formData = new FormData();
                formData.append('file', bannerFile, 'banner.png');
                await axios.post('/api/media/banner', formData, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } });
            }

            const profileUpdateResponse = await axios.patch('/api/users/me', profileData, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } });

            updateAuthToken(profileUpdateResponse.data.access_token);
            toast.success('Profile updated successfully!');
            setAvatarFile(null);
            setBannerFile(null);

        } catch (err) {
            const message = err.response?.data?.message;
            const errorMessage = Array.isArray(message) ? message.join(', ') : message;
            setProfileError(errorMessage || 'Failed to update profile.');
            toast.error(errorMessage || 'Failed to update profile.');
        } finally {
            setLoading(false);
        }
    };

    const handlePasswordSubmit = async (e) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        if (passwordData.newPassword !== passwordData.confirmPassword) {
            setPasswordError('New passwords do not match.');
            return;
        }
        setLoading(true);
        setPasswordError('');
        try {
            await axios.post('/api/auth/change-password',
                { currentPassword: passwordData.currentPassword, newPassword: passwordData.newPassword },
                { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } }
            );
            toast.success('Password changed successfully!');
            setPasswordData({ currentPassword: '', newPassword: '', confirmPassword: '' });
        } catch (err) {
            setPasswordError(err.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to change password.');
        } finally {
            setLoading(false);
        }
    };

    const { subscribe, isSubscribed, error: pushError } = usePushNotifications(); // <-- ИСПОЛЬЗУЕМ ХУК

    useEffect(() => {
        if (pushError) {
            toast.error(pushError);
        }
    }, [pushError]);

    const handleNotificationsToggle = async (event) => {
        const checked = event.target.checked;
        if (checked && !isSubscribed) {
            const permission = await Notification.requestPermission();
            if (permission === 'granted') {
                subscribe();
                toast.success('Push notifications enabled!');
            } else {
                toast.error('Permission denied for notifications.');
            }
        }
        // TODO: Добавить логику отписки
    };

    if (loading && !profileData.username) return <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', mt: 4 }}><CircularProgress /></Box>;

    return (
        <>
            <Stack spacing={4}>
                <Typography level={{ xs: 'h2', sm: 'h1' }}>Account Settings</Typography>

                <Sheet variant="outlined" sx={{ p: { xs: 2, sm: 3, md: 4 }, borderRadius: 'md' }}>
                    <form onSubmit={handleProfileSubmit}>
                        <Typography level={{ xs: 'h4', sm: 'h3' }} component="h2" sx={{ mb: 2 }}>Edit Profile</Typography>
                        {profileError && <Alert color="danger" sx={{ mb: 2 }}>{profileError}</Alert>}
                        <Stack spacing={3}>
                            <FormControl>
                                <FormLabel>Profile Picture</FormLabel>
                                <Stack direction={{ xs: 'column', sm: 'row' }} spacing={2} alignItems="center">
                                    <Avatar src={constructImageUrl(avatarPreview)} sx={{ '--Avatar-size': '80px' }} />
                                    <Button startDecorator={<EditIcon />} variant="outlined" onClick={() => avatarInputRef.current.click()} sx={{ width: { xs: '100%', sm: 'auto' } }}>Upload</Button>
                                    <input type="file" accept="image/*" hidden ref={avatarInputRef} onChange={(e) => handleFileChange(e, 'avatar')} />
                                </Stack>
                            </FormControl>
                            <FormControl>
                                <FormLabel>Profile Banner</FormLabel>
                                <AspectRatio ratio="16/5" sx={{ width: '100%', borderRadius: 'md', mb: 1, bgcolor: 'background.level1' }}>
                                    {bannerPreview ? <img src={constructImageUrl(bannerPreview)} alt="Banner" /> : <Box component="div" />}
                                </AspectRatio>
                                <Button startDecorator={<EditIcon />} variant="outlined" onClick={() => bannerInputRef.current.click()} sx={{ alignSelf: 'flex-start', width: { xs: '100%', sm: 'auto' } }}>Upload Banner</Button>
                                <input type="file" accept="image/*" hidden ref={bannerInputRef} onChange={(e) => handleFileChange(e, 'banner')} />
                            </FormControl>
                            <Divider />

                            {/* [!code focus start] */}
                            {/* --- ВОССТАНОВЛЕННЫЕ ПОЛЯ --- */}
                            <FormControl>
                                <FormLabel>Username</FormLabel>
                                <Input name="username" value={profileData.username} onChange={handleProfileChange} />
                            </FormControl>
                            <FormControl>
                                <FormLabel>Profile Slug (@your-name)</FormLabel>
                                <Input name="profile_slug" value={profileData.profile_slug || ''} onChange={handleProfileChange} />
                            </FormControl>
                            <FormControl>
                                <FormLabel>Description</FormLabel>
                                <Textarea name="description" value={profileData.description || ''} onChange={handleProfileChange} minRows={3} />
                            </FormControl>
                            {/* --- КОНЕЦ ВОССТАНОВЛЕННЫХ ПОЛЕЙ --- */}
                            {/* [!code focus end] */}

                            <Button type="submit" loading={loading} sx={{ mt: 1, alignSelf: { xs: 'center', sm: 'flex-start' }, width: { xs: '100%', sm: 'auto' } }}>Save All Changes</Button>
                        </Stack>
                    </form>
                </Sheet>

                <Sheet variant="outlined" sx={{ p: { xs: 2, sm: 3, md: 4 }, borderRadius: 'md' }}>
                    <Typography level={{ xs: 'h4', sm: 'h3' }} component="h2" sx={{ mb: 2 }}>
                        Notifications
                    </Typography>
                    {/* [!code focus start] */}
                    <FormControl sx={{ flexDirection: 'row', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'space-between' }}>
                        <FormLabel>Enable Push Notifications</FormLabel>
                        <Switch
                            checked={isSubscribed}
                            onChange={handleNotificationsToggle}
                        />
                    </FormControl>
                    {/* [!code focus end] */}
                </Sheet>

                <Sheet variant="outlined" sx={{ p: { xs: 2, sm: 3, md: 4 }, borderRadius: 'md' }}>
                    <Typography level={{ xs: 'h4', sm: 'h3' }} component="h2" sx={{ mb: 2 }}>Minecraft Integration</Typography>
                    {user?.minecraft_uuid ? (
                        <Box>
                            <Typography>Your account is linked to Minecraft account: <strong>{user.minecraft_username}</strong></Typography>
                            <Button sx={{ mt: 2, width: { xs: '100%', sm: 'auto' } }} variant="outlined" color="neutral" onClick={() => navigate('/profile/link-minecraft')}>Manage</Button>
                        </Box>
                    ) : (
                        <Box>
                            <Typography>Link your Minecraft account to sync your status and more.</Typography>
                            <Button sx={{ mt: 2, width: { xs: '100%', sm: 'auto' } }} startDecorator={<LinkIcon />} onClick={() => navigate('/profile/link-minecraft')}>Link Account</Button>
                        </Box>
                    )}
                </Sheet>
                <Sheet variant="outlined" sx={{ p: { xs: 2, sm: 3, md: 4 }, borderRadius: 'md' }}>
                    <Typography level={{ xs: 'h4', sm: 'h3' }} component="h2" sx={{ mb: 2 }}>
                        Purchase History
                    </Typography>
                    <Box>
                        <Typography>View all items you have purchased from the shop.</Typography>
                        <Button
                            component={RouterLink}
                            to="/profile/purchase-history"
                            sx={{ mt: 2, width: { xs: '100%', sm: 'auto' } }}
                            startDecorator={<HistoryIcon />}
                            variant="outlined"
                            color="neutral"
                        >
                            View History
                        </Button>
                    </Box>
                </Sheet>
                <Sheet variant="outlined" sx={{ p: { xs: 2, sm: 3, md: 4 }, borderRadius: 'md' }}>
                    <Typography level={{ xs: 'h4', sm: 'h3' }} component="h2" sx={{ mb: 2 }}>Change Password</Typography>
                    <form onSubmit={handlePasswordSubmit}>
                        <Stack spacing={2}>
                            {passwordError && <Alert color="danger">{passwordError}</Alert>}
                            <FormControl required><FormLabel>Current Password</FormLabel><Input type="password" name="currentPassword" value={passwordData.currentPassword} onChange={handlePasswordChange} /></FormControl>
                            <FormControl required><FormLabel>New Password</FormLabel><Input type="password" name="newPassword" value={passwordData.newPassword} onChange={handlePasswordChange} /></FormControl>
                            <FormControl required><FormLabel>Confirm New Password</FormLabel><Input type="password" name="confirmPassword" value={passwordData.confirmPassword} onChange={handlePasswordChange} /></FormControl>
                            <Button type="submit" loading={loading} sx={{ mt: 1, alignSelf: { xs: 'center', sm: 'flex-start' }, width: { xs: '100%', sm: 'auto' } }}>Change Password</Button>
                        </Stack>
                    </form>
                </Sheet>
            </Stack>

            <ImageCropperModal
                open={cropperOpen}
                onClose={() => setCropperOpen(false)}
                imageSrc={imageToCrop}
                onCropComplete={handleCropComplete}
                aspect={cropAspect}
            />
        </>
    );
}

export default SettingsPage;
--- END FILE: frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.jsx ---



--- START FILE: frontend/src/pages/ShopPage.jsx ---

// frontend/src/pages/ShopPage.js
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import axios from 'axios';
import { Box, Typography, CircularProgress, Alert, Grid, Card, CardContent, Button, AspectRatio } from '@mui/joy';
import { constructImageUrl } from '../utils/url';
import PurchaseModal from '../components/PurchaseModal'; // <-- 1. ИМПОРТИРУЕМ

function ShopPage() {
    const [items, setItems] = useState([]);
    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    const [error, setError] = useState(null);

    // --- 2. ДОБАВЛЯЕМ СОСТОЯНИЯ ДЛЯ МОДАЛЬНОГО ОКНА ---
    const [isModalOpen, setIsModalOpen] = useState(false);
    const [selectedItem, setSelectedItem] = useState(null);

    const handlePurchaseClick = (item) => {
        // --- 3. ОБНОВЛЯЕМ ЛОГИКУ КЛИКА ---
        setSelectedItem(item);
        setIsModalOpen(true);
    };

    useEffect(() => {
        const fetchItems = async () => {
            try {
                setLoading(true);
                const response = await axios.get('/api/shop');
                setItems(response.data);
            } catch (err) {
                setError('Failed to load items. The shop might be temporarily unavailable.');
                console.error(err);
            } finally {
                setLoading(false);
            }
        };
        fetchItems();
    }, []);

    if (loading) return <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', mt: 4 }}><CircularProgress /></Box>;
    if (error) return <Alert color="danger">{error}</Alert>;

    return (
        <Box>
            <Typography level="h1" component="h1" sx={{ mb: 3 }}>
                Shop
            </Typography>
            <Grid container spacing={3}>
                {items.length > 0 ? items.map((item) => (
                    <Grid xs={12} sm={6} md={4} key={item.item_id}>
                        <Card sx={{ height: '100%', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column' }}>
                            <AspectRatio sx={{ minHeight: '120px', minWidth: '160px' }}>
                                <img
                                    src={constructImageUrl(item.image_url) || 'https://via.placeholder.com/300x150'}
                                    alt={item.name}
                                    loading="lazy"
                                />
                            </AspectRatio>
                            <CardContent sx={{ flexGrow: 1, display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column' }}>
                                <Typography level="title-lg">{item.name}</Typography>
                                <Typography level="body-sm" sx={{ mb: 1, flexGrow: 1 }}>{item.description}</Typography>
                                <Typography level="h4" sx={{ mb: 2 }}>
                                    Price: {item.price} coins
                                </Typography>
                                <Button
                                    variant="solid"
                                    size="md"
                                    color="primary"
                                    onClick={() => handlePurchaseClick(item)}
                                >
                                    Purchase
                                </Button>
                            </CardContent>
                        </Card>
                    </Grid>
                )) : (
                    <Typography sx={{ p: 2 }}>There are no items in the shop yet.</Typography>
                )}
            </Grid>
            
            {/* --- 4. ДОБАВЛЯЕМ КОМПОНЕНТ МОДАЛЬНОГО ОКНА --- */}
            <PurchaseModal
                open={isModalOpen}
                onClose={() => setIsModalOpen(false)}
                item={selectedItem}
            />
        </Box>
    );
}

export default ShopPage;
--- END FILE: frontend/src/pages/ShopPage.jsx ---



--- START FILE: frontend/src/pages/SingleNewsPage.jsx ---

// frontend/src/pages/SingleNewsPage.js

import React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
import { useParams, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import axios from 'axios';
import {
    Typography, CircularProgress, Alert, Box, Sheet, Divider, Button,
    Link as JoyLink
} from '@mui/joy';
import ArrowBackIcon from '@mui/icons-material/ArrowBack';
import PersonIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Person';
import CalendarTodayIcon from '@mui/icons-material/CalendarToday';
import RenderedHtmlContent from '../components/RenderedHtmlContent'; // <-- Главное

function SingleNewsPage() {
    const { newsId } = useParams();
    const navigate = useNavigate();
    const [article, setArticle] = useState(null);
    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    const [error, setError] = useState(null);

    useEffect(() => {
        if (!newsId) return;
        const fetchArticle = async () => {
            try {
                setLoading(true);
                const response = await axios.get(`/api/news/${newsId}`);
                setArticle(response.data);
            } catch (err) {
                setError('Failed to load news article.');
            } finally {
                setLoading(false);
            }
        };
        fetchArticle();
    }, [newsId]);

    if (loading) return <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', mt: 4 }}><CircularProgress size="lg" /></Box>;
    if (error) return <Alert color="danger">{error}</Alert>;
    if (!article) return <Typography>Article not found.</Typography>;

    return (
        <Box>
            <Button variant="plain" startDecorator={<ArrowBackIcon />} onClick={() => navigate('/news')} sx={{ mb: 2, ml: -1 }}>
                Back to All News
            </Button>
            <Sheet variant="outlined" sx={{ p: { xs: 2, sm: 3, md: 4 }, borderRadius: 'md' }}>
                <Typography level="h1" component="h1" sx={{ mb: 2 }}>{article.name}</Typography>
                 <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', gap: 2, flexWrap: 'wrap', alignItems: 'center', color: 'text.tertiary', mb: 2 }}>
                    <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 0.5 }}>
                        <PersonIcon fontSize="sm" />
                        <Typography level="body-sm">
                             {article.author ? article.author.username : 'System'}
                        </Typography>
                    </Box>
                    <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 0.5 }}>
                         <CalendarTodayIcon fontSize="sm" />
                        <Typography level="body-sm">
                            {new Date(article.created_at).toLocaleDateString()}
                        </Typography>
                     </Box>
                </Box>
                <Divider sx={{ my: 2 }} />
                {/* [!code focus start] */}
                {/* --- НАЧАЛО ИЗМЕНЕНИЙ --- */}
                <Box sx={{ mb: 3 }}>
                    <RenderedHtmlContent htmlContent={post.content} />
                </Box>                {/* --- КОНЕЦ ИЗМЕНЕНИЙ --- */}
                {/* [!code focus end] */}
            </Sheet>
        </Box>
    );
}

export default SingleNewsPage;
--- END FILE: frontend/src/pages/SingleNewsPage.jsx ---



--- START FILE: frontend/src/pages/SinglePostPage.jsx ---

// frontend/src/pages/SinglePostPage.js

import React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
import { useParams, useNavigate, NavLink, Link as RouterLink } from 'react-router-dom';
import axios from 'axios';
import {
    Typography, CircularProgress, Alert, Box, Sheet, Divider, Avatar, List, ListItem, ListItemDecorator, ListItemContent, Textarea, Button, Link as JoyLink, IconButton, Dropdown, Menu, MenuButton, MenuItem,
    useTheme, Stack
} from '@mui/joy';
import { useMediaQuery } from '@mui/material';
import SendIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Send';
import EditIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Edit';
import DeleteForeverIcon from '@mui/icons-material/DeleteForever';
import MoreVertIcon from '@mui/icons-material/MoreVert';
import ArrowBackIcon from '@mui/icons-material/ArrowBack';
import BlockIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Block';
import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext';
import VoteButtons from '../components/VoteButtons';
import { constructImageUrl } from '../utils/url';
import toast from 'react-hot-toast';
import ConfirmationModal from '../components/ConfirmationModal';
import VerifiedIcons from '../components/VerifiedIcons';
import Comment from '../components/Comment';
import CloseIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Close';
import RenderedHtmlContent from '../components/RenderedHtmlContent';

function SinglePostPage() {
    const { postId } = useParams();
    const navigate = useNavigate();
    const { isLoggedIn, user: currentUser, authToken } = useAuth();


    const theme = useTheme();
    const isMobile = useMediaQuery(theme.breakpoints.down('sm'));
    const [post, setPost] = useState(null);
    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    const [error, setError] = useState(null);
    const [newCommentContent, setNewCommentContent] = useState('');
    const [isSubmittingComment, setIsSubmittingComment] = useState(false);
    const [editingCommentId, setEditingCommentId] = useState(null);
    const [editedContent, setEditedContent] = useState('');
    const [modalOpen, setModalOpen] = useState(false);
    const [modalContent, setModalContent] = useState({ title: '', content: '', onConfirm: null });
    const [isActionLoading, setIsActionLoading] = useState(false);
    const [replyingTo, setReplyingTo] = useState(null);

    const fetchPost = useCallback(async () => {
        try {
            setLoading(true);
            setError(null);
            const config = authToken ? { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } } : {};
            const response = await axios.get(`/api/posts/${postId}`, config);
            console.log('ОТВЕТ ОТ БЭКЕНДА:', JSON.stringify(response.data, null, 2));

            setPost(response.data);
        } catch (err) {
            setError('Failed to load post. It may have been deleted or the link is incorrect.');
        } finally {
            setLoading(false);
        }
    }, [postId, authToken]);
    
    useEffect(() => { if (postId) fetchPost(); }, [postId, fetchPost]);

    const openBanModal = (userToBan) => {
        if (!userToBan) return;
        setModalContent({
            title: 'Confirm Ban',
            content: `Are you sure you want to ban ${userToBan.username}?`,
            confirmText: 'Ban User',
            confirmColor: 'danger',
            onConfirm: () => confirmBanUser(userToBan)
        });
        setModalOpen(true);
    };

    const openDeletePostModal = () => {
        setModalContent({
            title: 'Confirm Post Deletion',
            content: 'Are you sure you want to permanently delete this post?',
            confirmText: 'Delete Post',
            confirmColor: 'danger',
            onConfirm: confirmDeletePost
        });
        setModalOpen(true);
    };

    const countAllComments = (comments) => {
        let count = comments.length;
        for (const comment of comments) {
            if (comment.children && comment.children.length > 0) {
                count += countAllComments(comment.children);
            }
        }
        return count;
    };

    const totalCommentCount = post ? countAllComments(post.comments || []) : 0;

    const openDeleteCommentModal = (commentId) => {
        setModalContent({
            title: 'Confirm Comment Deletion',
            content: 'Are you sure you want to delete this comment?',
            confirmText: 'Delete',
            confirmColor: 'danger',
            onConfirm: () => confirmDeleteComment(commentId)
        });
        setModalOpen(true);
    };

    const confirmBanUser = async (userToBan) => {
        setIsActionLoading(true);
        try {
            await axios.post(`/api/admin/users/${userToBan.id}/ban`, {}, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } });
            toast.success(`${userToBan.username} has been banned.`);
        } catch (err) {
            toast.error('Failed to ban user.');
        } finally {
            setIsActionLoading(false);
            setModalOpen(false);
        }
    };

    const confirmDeletePost = async () => {
        setIsActionLoading(true);
        try {
            await axios.delete(`/api/posts/${postId}`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } });
            toast.success('Post deleted.');
            navigate('/posts');
        } catch (error) {
            toast.error(error.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to delete the post.');
            setIsActionLoading(false);
            setModalOpen(false);
        }
    };

    const confirmDeleteComment = async (commentId) => {
        setIsActionLoading(true);
        try {
            await axios.delete(`/api/comments/${commentId}`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } });
            toast.success('Comment deleted.');
            fetchPost();
        } catch (err) {
            toast.error(err.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to delete comment.');
        } finally {
            setIsActionLoading(false);
            setModalOpen(false);
        }
    };

    const handleVote = useCallback(async (targetType, targetId, value) => {
        if (!isLoggedIn) { toast.error('Please log in to vote.'); return; }
        try {
            await axios.post(`/api/votes/${targetType}s/${targetId}`, { value }, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } });
            fetchPost();
        } catch (error) {
            toast.error(error.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to vote.'); fetchPost();
        }
    }, [isLoggedIn, authToken, fetchPost]);

    const handleCommentSubmit = async (event) => {
        event.preventDefault();

        const isReply = !!replyingTo;
        const content = isReply ? newCommentContent.reply : newCommentContent.main;

        if (!content.trim()) return;

        setIsSubmittingComment(true);
        try {
            await axios.post(
                `/api/posts/${postId}/comments`,
                { content, parentId: isReply ? replyingTo.id : null },
                { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } }
            );
            setNewCommentContent({ main: '', reply: '' });
            setReplyingTo(null);
            fetchPost();
        } catch (err) {
            toast.error(err.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to submit comment.');
        } finally {
            setIsSubmittingComment(false);
        }
    };

    const handleEditClick = (comment) => { setEditingCommentId(comment.id); setEditedContent(comment.content); };
    const handleCancelEdit = () => { setEditingCommentId(null); setEditedContent(''); };
    const handleUpdateSubmit = async (event) => {
        event.preventDefault();
        try {
            const response = await axios.patch(`/api/comments/${editingCommentId}`, { content: editedContent }, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${authToken}` } });
            setPost(prev => ({ ...prev, comments: prev.comments.map(c => c.id === editingCommentId ? response.data : c) }));
            handleCancelEdit();
        } catch (err) {
            toast.error(err.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to update comment.');
        }
    };

    if (loading) return <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', mt: 4 }}><CircularProgress size="lg" /></Box>;
    if (error) return <Alert color="danger">{error}</Alert>;
    if (!post) return <Typography>Post not found.</Typography>;

    const canManagePost = isLoggedIn && currentUser?.id === post?.author?.id;
    const isAdmin = currentUser && currentUser.rank?.power_level >= 800;


    return (
        <Box>
            <Button variant="plain" startDecorator={<ArrowBackIcon />} onClick={() => navigate('/posts')} sx={{ mb: 2, ml: -1 }}>
                {!isMobile && 'Back to All Posts'}
            </Button>
            <Sheet variant="outlined" sx={{ p: { xs: 2, sm: 3 }, borderRadius: 'md', mb: 4 }} data-testid="post-container">
                <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 2, mb: 2 }}>
                    {post.author ? <JoyLink component={RouterLink} to={`/users/${post.author.profile_slug || post.author.id}`}><Avatar src={constructImageUrl(post.author?.pfp_url)}>{post.author.username.charAt(0)}</Avatar></JoyLink> : <Avatar>?</Avatar>}
                    <Box sx={{ flexGrow: 1 }}>
                        <Typography level="title-md" component="span">
                            {post.author ? (
                                <Typography level="title-lg" component="span" sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', maxWidth: '150px' }}>
                                    <JoyLink component={RouterLink} to={`/users/${post.author.profile_slug || post.author.id}`} sx={{ color: post.author.rank?.display_color }} onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}>
                                        {post.author.username}
                                    </JoyLink>
                                    <VerifiedIcons user={post.author} sx={{ ml: 0.5 }} />
                                </Typography>
                            ) : 'Anonymous'}
                        </Typography>
                        <Typography level="body-xs">Posted on {new Date(post.created_at).toLocaleDateString()}</Typography>
                    </Box>
                    {(canManagePost || isAdmin) && (
                        <Box sx={{ ml: 'auto' }}>
                            <Dropdown>
                                <MenuButton slots={{ root: IconButton }} slotProps={{ root: { variant: 'plain', color: 'neutral' } }}><MoreVertIcon /></MenuButton>
                                <Menu size="sm">
                                    {/* [!code focus start] */}
                                    {/* --- ИЗМЕНЕНИЕ ЗДЕСЬ: Убираем лишнее условие --- */}
                                    <MenuItem onClick={() => navigate(`/posts/${post.id}/edit`)}><EditIcon /> Edit Post</MenuItem>
                                    {/* [!code focus end] */}
                                    <MenuItem color="danger" onClick={openDeletePostModal}><DeleteForeverIcon /> Delete Post</MenuItem>
                                    {isAdmin && !canManagePost && (<MenuItem color="danger" onClick={() => openBanModal(post.author)}><BlockIcon /> Ban Author</MenuItem>)}
                                </Menu>
                            </Dropdown>
                        </Box>
                    )}
                </Box>
                <h1 style={{ fontFamily: 'var(--joy-font-family-display)', color: 'var(--joy-palette-text-primary)', fontWeight: 'var(--joy-font-weight-bold)', fontSize: '2rem', lineHeight: 1.3, wordBreak: 'break-all', margin: '0 0 16px 0' }}>
                    {post.title}
                </h1>
                <Box sx={{ mb: 3 }}>
                    <RenderedHtmlContent htmlContent={post.content} />
                </Box>
                <VoteButtons initialScore={post.score} currentUserVote={post.currentUserVote} onVote={(value) => handleVote('post', post.id, value)} disabled={!isLoggedIn} />
            </Sheet>

            <Box>
                <Typography level="h2" component="h2" sx={{ mb: 2 }}>
                    Comments ({totalCommentCount})
                </Typography>

                {isLoggedIn ? (
                    !isMobile && (
                        <Box component="form" onSubmit={handleCommentSubmit} sx={{ mb: 3 }}>
                            <Textarea
                                placeholder="Write a comment..."
                                minRows={3}
                                value={newCommentContent.main}
                                onChange={(e) => setNewCommentContent(prev => ({ ...prev, main: e.target.value }))}
                                sx={{ mb: 1 }}
                                onKeyDown={(e) => {
                                    if (e.key === 'Enter' && !e.shiftKey) {
                                        e.preventDefault();
                                        handleCommentSubmit(e);
                                    }
                                }}
                            />
                            <Button type="submit" loading={isSubmittingComment} endDecorator={<SendIcon />} sx={{ width: { xs: '100%', sm: 'auto' } }}>
                                Submit Comment
                            </Button>
                        </Box>
                    )
                ) : (
                    <Typography sx={{ mb: 3 }}>
                        Please <JoyLink component={RouterLink} to="/login">log in</JoyLink> to leave a comment.
                    </Typography>
                )}

                <List sx={{ p: 0 }}>
                    <Stack spacing={3}>
                        {(post.comments || []).map((comment) => (
                            <Comment
                                key={comment.id}
                                comment={comment}
                                onCommentAdded={fetchPost}
                                onReplyClick={(commentToReply) => setReplyingTo(commentToReply)}
                            />
                        ))}
                    </Stack>
                </List>
            </Box>

            {isLoggedIn && replyingTo && isMobile && (
                <Sheet
                    variant="outlined"
                    sx={{
                        position: 'fixed',
                        bottom: 'var(--chat-widget-height, 0px)',
                        left: 0,
                        right: 0,
                        p: 1,
                        bgcolor: 'background.surface',
                        borderTop: '1px solid',
                        borderColor: 'divider',
                        zIndex: 1100,
                        transition: 'bottom 0.2s ease-in-out',
                    }}
                >
                    <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'space-between', mb: 0.5, px: 1 }}>
                        <Typography level="body-xs">
                            Replying to <strong>{replyingTo.author?.username || '[Deleted]'}</strong>
                        </Typography>
                        <IconButton size="sm" onClick={() => setReplyingTo(null)}><CloseIcon /></IconButton>
                    </Box>
                    <Textarea
                        placeholder="Write a reply..."
                        value={newCommentContent.reply}
                        onChange={(e) => setNewCommentContent(prev => ({ ...prev, reply: e.target.value }))}
                        autoFocus
                        minRows={1}
                        maxRows={4}
                        endDecorator={<IconButton onClick={handleCommentSubmit} disabled={isSubmittingComment}><SendIcon /></IconButton>}
                        onKeyDown={(e) => {
                            if (e.key === 'Enter' && !e.shiftKey) {
                                e.preventDefault();
                                handleCommentSubmit(e);
                            }
                        }}
                    />
                </Sheet>
            )}

            <ConfirmationModal
                open={modalOpen}
                onClose={() => setModalOpen(false)}
                onConfirm={modalContent.onConfirm}
                title={modalContent.title}
                content={modalContent.content}
                confirmText={modalContent.confirmText}
                confirmColor={modalContent.confirmColor}
                loading={isActionLoading}
            />
        </Box>
    );
}

export default SinglePostPage;
--- END FILE: frontend/src/pages/SinglePostPage.jsx ---



--- START FILE: frontend/src/pages/SinglePostPage.spec.jsx ---

// frontend/src/pages/SinglePostPage.spec.js

import React from 'react';
import { render, screen, waitFor, within } from '@testing-library/react';
import userEvent from '@testing-library/user-event';
import { MemoryRouter, Route, Routes } from 'react-router-dom';
import { vi } from 'vitest';
import axios from 'axios';
import { CssVarsProvider } from '@mui/joy/styles';
import { AuthContext } from '../context/AuthContext';
import SinglePostPage from './SinglePostPage';
import theme from '../theme';

vi.mock('axios');

const createMockAuthContext = (user) => ({
  isLoggedIn: !!user,
  user: user,
  authToken: user ? 'mock-token' : null,
  login: vi.fn(),
  logout: vi.fn(),
  updateAuthToken: vi.fn(),
  socket: null,
});

const AllTheProviders = ({ children, mockUser, initialRoute = '/posts/1' }) => {
  const authContextValue = createMockAuthContext(mockUser);
  return (
    <MemoryRouter initialEntries={[initialRoute]}>
      <CssVarsProvider theme={theme}>
        <AuthContext.Provider value={authContextValue}>
          <Routes>
            <Route path="/posts/:postId" element={children} />
          </Routes>
        </AuthContext.Provider>
      </CssVarsProvider>
    </MemoryRouter>
  );
};

const customRender = (ui, { mockUser, ...options } = {}) =>
  render(ui, { wrapper: (props) => <AllTheProviders {...props} mockUser={mockUser} />, ...options });

describe('SinglePostPage', () => {
  const authorUser = { id: 1, username: 'PostAuthor', rank: { name: 'Admin', power_level: 900 } };
  const regularUser = { id: 2, username: 'Commenter', rank: { name: 'User', power_level: 10 } };
  const mockPost = {
    id: 1,
    title: 'My Test Post',
    content: 'This is the post content.',
    score: 10,
    currentUserVote: 0,
    created_at: new Date().toISOString(),
    author: authorUser,
    comments: [
      { id: 101, content: 'First comment!', author: regularUser, score: 5, currentUserVote: 0, created_at: new Date().toISOString() },
    ],
  };

  afterEach(() => {
    vi.clearAllMocks();
  });

  test('renders the post and comments for a guest', async () => {
    axios.get.mockResolvedValue({ data: mockPost });
    customRender(<SinglePostPage />, { mockUser: null });
    expect(await screen.findByText('My Test Post')).toBeInTheDocument();
    expect(screen.getByText('This is the post content.')).toBeInTheDocument();
    expect(screen.getByText('First comment!')).toBeInTheDocument();
    expect(screen.getByRole('link', { name: /log in/i })).toBeInTheDocument();
  });

  test('allows a logged-in user to submit a comment', async () => {
    axios.get.mockResolvedValue({ data: mockPost });
    axios.post.mockResolvedValue({ data: { id: 102, content: 'A new test comment', author: regularUser } });
    customRender(<SinglePostPage />, { mockUser: regularUser });
    expect(await screen.findByText('My Test Post')).toBeInTheDocument();
    const textarea = screen.getByPlaceholderText(/write a comment/i);
    const submitButton = screen.getByRole('button', { name: /submit comment/i });
    await userEvent.type(textarea, 'A new test comment');
    await userEvent.click(submitButton);
    await waitFor(() => {
      expect(axios.post).toHaveBeenCalledWith(
        '/api/posts/1/comments',
        { content: 'A new test comment' },
        expect.any(Object)
      );
    });
    expect(textarea).toHaveValue('');
  });

  test('shows edit/delete buttons for the post author', async () => {
    axios.get.mockResolvedValue({ data: mockPost });
    customRender(<SinglePostPage />, { mockUser: authorUser });

    const postContainer = await screen.findByTestId('post-container');
    const moreIcon = await within(postContainer).findByTestId('MoreVertIcon');
    const menuButton = moreIcon.closest('button');
    await userEvent.click(menuButton);
    
    // ИСПРАВЛЕНИЕ: Ищем пункты меню по всему экрану, а не только внутри контейнера
    expect(screen.getByRole('menuitem', { name: /edit post/i })).toBeInTheDocument();
    expect(screen.getByRole('menuitem', { name: /delete post/i })).toBeInTheDocument();
  });

  test('does not show edit/delete buttons for a regular user', async () => {
    axios.get.mockResolvedValue({ data: mockPost });
    customRender(<SinglePostPage />, { mockUser: regularUser });

    const postContainer = await screen.findByTestId('post-container');

    expect(within(postContainer).queryByTestId('MoreVertIcon')).not.toBeInTheDocument();
  });
});
--- END FILE: frontend/src/pages/SinglePostPage.spec.jsx ---



--- START FILE: frontend/src/pages/SupportPage.jsx ---

// frontend/src/pages/SupportPage.jsx

import React from 'react';
import { Box, Typography, Breadcrumbs, Link as JoyLink, Sheet, Stack, Button, Divider } from '@mui/joy';
import { Link as RouterLink } from 'react-router-dom';
import HomeIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Home';
import ChevronRightIcon from '@mui/icons-material/ChevronRight';
import SupportAgentIcon from '@mui/icons-material/SupportAgent';

function SupportPage() {
    return (
        <Box>
            <Breadcrumbs separator={<ChevronRightIcon />} sx={{ mb: 2 }}>
                <JoyLink component={RouterLink} to="/">
                    <HomeIcon />
                </JoyLink>
                <Typography>Support</Typography>
            </Breadcrumbs>
            
            <Typography level="h2" component="h1" sx={{ mb: 2 }}>
                Support & Contacts
            </Typography>

            <Sheet variant="outlined" sx={{ p: { xs: 2, md: 3 }, borderRadius: 'md' }}>
                <Stack spacing={2}>
                    <Typography>
                        If you encounter any issues with the website, payments, or have questions about the game server, please don't hesitate to reach out.
                    </Typography>
                    <Typography>
                        The primary way to get in touch with the administration is through our official Discord server. This is the fastest way to get a response for most issues.
                    </Typography>
                    <Button 
                        component="a" 
                        href="https://discord.gg/your-invite-code" // <-- Замени на свою ссылку-приглашение!
                        target="_blank" 
                        rel="noopener noreferrer"
                        startDecorator={<SupportAgentIcon />}
                        sx={{ width: { xs: '100%', sm: 'auto' }, alignSelf: 'flex-start' }}
                    >
                        Join our Discord
                    </Button>
                    <Divider />
                    <Typography>
                        For critical issues, business inquiries, or if you cannot use Discord, you can contact us via email. Please note that response times may be longer.
                    </Typography>
                    <Typography>
                        [cite_start]Email: <JoyLink href="mailto:sknery.official@gmail.com">sknery.official@gmail.com</JoyLink> [cite: 364]
                    </Typography>
                </Stack>
            </Sheet>
        </Box>
    );
}

export default SupportPage;
